**Part 1: The Medicaid Paradox - Growth, Costs, and Misleading "Cuts"**
The Big Beautiful Bill's Medicaid cuts are a gross distortion of what is actually happening and ignores the larger problem in our healthcare system that has been _**increasing the costs and reducing access to care for, working class, middle class, self-employed, and small businesses**_.
Physician and other healthcare burnout worsens the situation.
_**A closer look reveals that these cuts represent such a small fraction of overall healthcare spending and that the system's fundamental flaws -- particularly over-regulation, lack of competition, and escalating costs -- are the primary drivers of reduced access and physician burnout.**_
## Medicaid's Expanding Footprint in Connecticut and the Proposed Cuts
Medicaid enrollment in Connecticut surged by 61% between 2012 and 2023, reaching over a million enrollees across various Husky plans. **The proposed federal budget cuts, estimated at $100 billion annually, represent only about 2% of the nation's over $5 trillion annual healthcare expenditure**. This "cut" is framed against a backdrop of Medicaid spending that is still 51% higher than in 2019. A significant concern for hospitals is a reduction in the provider tax from 6% to 3.5%, which currently helps subsidize Medicaid reimbursements.
Husky Breakdown:
* Husky A - for low income children, caregivers and pregnant women 43% (660,000 enrollees)
* Husky B -for children who's family income is too high for Medicaid (21,800 enrollees)
* Husky C - for seniors (84,700* enrollees )
* Husky D - adults 19-64 without dependent children (increasing from 132,000 in 2012 to 397,000 in 2024)
(SEE - Many more people are on Medicaid in CT than a decade ago, July 11, 2025 [available here ](https://substack.com/redirect/167a4a69-7b02-49e9-8fc3-9b58657aa202?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

**Medicaid's Financial Footprint on Connecticut:**
Connecticut is expected to spend $11.6 billion dollars or almost 45% of the state budget on Medicaid with the Federal Government paying 59% of the cost. Medicaid is a huge cost to Connecticut (almost 20% of all tax revenue collected, including income tax, sales tax and business, in Connecticut goes to pay for Medicaid) and Federal taxpayers (including Connecticut federal taxpayers) covering 59% of the Medicaid costs.
**The Medicaid "Cuts" in Context:** The notion of "massive Medicaid cuts" is often misleading. The current government is spending 51% more on Medicaid today than in 2019. The proposed $100 billion annual reduction, while significant, represents only about 2% of the total $5 trillion spent on healthcare. A key element of these proposed changes is a reduction in the provider tax paid by individuals and insurance companies from 6% to 3.5%. This tax, currently used to subsidize Medicaid and boost hospital reimbursements, is a hidden cost passed on to those with private insurance. The true impact on hospitals may stem more from this provider tax adjustment than from headline-grabbing "cuts."
**Why the Panic for a 2% reduction in healthcare spending?** Medicaid patients account for a disproportionately higher percentage of hospitalizations (25% of discharges while covering 20% of the population). This disparity is likely due to the lack of out-of-pocket expenses for Medicaid recipients, which can encourage emergency department use over preventative or primary care. The proposed adjustments are primarily aimed at the non-working adult Husky D population, with data suggesting that a large majority of Husky D recipients are already working and would not be at risk of losing coverage. The debate often overlooks the larger problem of healthcare affordability for the working population.
_**Stay Tuned for - Part 2: The Unjust Burden - How the Current System Fails Working Americans**_

---
Since launching this campaign, I have visited communities all across the Commonwealth — from Farmville to Fairfax, Richmond to Roanoke — to hear directly from Virginians about the challenges they face.
_And that's informed what we communicate and how we spend our resources._
My opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, has shown she's in lockstep with Trump's agenda. She downplayed the White House laying off thousands of Virginia workers by saying, "don't fret." And she boasted that Trump's disastrous tax law does "so many great things." _We're talking about a policy that cuts $1 trillion from Medicaid and slashes resources for public schools here._
I've given voters my word: **As Governor, I will always put them first and stand up to the chaos coming out of Washington.**
We can't be defined by what we're against — we must focus on moving our Commonwealth forward.
That's why I have announced my plans to grow our workforce and raise the minimum wage, to reduce the cost of childcare, and to make life more affordable from healthcare and prescription drugs to housing costs and utility bills.
With the days left in this campaign, I'm counting on a surge of grassroots donations to:
✅ Visit every corner of Virginia.
✅ Reach undecided voters with ads and counter the GOP's attacks.
✅ Build the largest organizing operation our Commonwealth's ever seen.
It's a major undertaking, but I know this team is not intimidated by hard work. No matter what the National Republicans throw at us, we'll be ready to respond.
**[Everything depends on us raising what we need from grassroots donors. So, I'm asking: will you pitch in $10 or more to my campaign and Heartland Patriots to help us win on November 4th and in the years ahead?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92981?refcode=em20250806-9230&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9230%2E614464%2E94eeQX)**

And that's informed what we communicate and how we spend our resources. My opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, has shown she's in lockstep with Trump's agenda. She downplayed the White House laying off thousands of Virginia workers by saying, "don't fret." And she boasted that Trump's disastrous tax law does "so many great things." We're talking about a policy that cuts $1 trillion from Medicaid and slashes resources for public schools here. I've given voters my word: As Governor, I will always put them first and stand up to the chaos coming out of Washington. We can't be defined by what we're against — we must focus on moving our Commonwealth forward. That's why I have announced my plans to grow our workforce and raise the minimum wage, to reduce the cost of childcare, and to make life more affordable from healthcare and prescription drugs to housing costs and utility bills. With the days left in this campaign, I'm counting on a surge of grassroots donations to: ✅ Visit every corner of Virginia. ✅ Reach undecided voters with ads and counter the GOP's attacks. ✅ Build the largest organizing operation our Commonwealth's ever seen. It's a major undertaking, but I know this team is not intimidated by hard work. No matter what the National Republicans throw at us, we'll be ready to respond. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: I'm grateful to have you on my team, Abigail Spanberger | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

name: AOC
subject: New Yorkers knew Andrew Cuomo was backed by Trump’s orbit.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Now we have confirmation.
#
New Yorkers knew Andrew Cuomo was backed by Trump’s orbit. That’s why he lost the primary.
**Now we have confirmation:**
****
It’s time for Democratic leaders to unite behind Zohran Mamdani. If they don’t now, how can they call for party unity later?
We must lead by example.
Let’s win together,
Alexandria
The Trump trifecta has taken hold, and so too have their billionaire, right-wing donors.
Our movement for real progress will have to push harder than ever these next four years.
[Help us continue the fight against Trump’s extremism with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250806.SOl19N&refcode=em20250806-9492-P_FND_RES_TWT&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9492%2E2526796%2EbqZNFk)

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Gumming up the works in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
The legislators who fled Texas to stop this extreme, highly partisan attempt at gerrymandering these districts are bravely standing up for our fundamental right to a democracy where our voice is heard.
The maps below don't just show fair representation circling down the drain, folks. It's a visual representation of what one party thinks of our right to vote and our ability to have voters determine the outcome of our elections.
This is about power and control -- they have it, they want to keep it, and they'll do anything they can to protect it. RUSH $25 or more to protect our right to vote and try to stop this sham redistricting process in Texas and other states considering it, like Missouri and Florida >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=080625_2&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Team: Texas's new gerrymandered maps are so bad, it's easy to see why lawmakers from the Texas House of Representatives left the state to deny suppressive lawmakers the quorum ( the number of legislators required present in person to pass legislation ) they need in order to push these terrible new districts through.
You can see by the spiral around each city below -- Houston, Dallas, and San Antonio -- how vengeful partisans in Texas are trying to spread out voters and dilute groups who generally vote against them. Nothing about the way these are drawn includes fair representation.
Proposed Houston Area [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/HoustonRedistrict2025.jpg] Proposed Dallas Area [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/DallasRedistrict2025.jpg] Proposed San Antonio Area [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/SanAntonioRedistrict2025.jpg]
For background: The opponents of voting rights who run Texas have opened a special "emergency session" of the state legislature to tackle another round of partisan redistricting, after having recruited the top national conservative map-drawer and a leading Washington, D.C.-based anti-voting group to ram through a new gerrymander that aims to expand the U.S. House majority.
These new maps aim to dilute the voting power of the state’s Black and brown voters, looking to follow Trump's orders to create five new MAGA-aligned congressional seats in Texas.
Voter suppression anywhere changes the balance of Congress and hurts everyone, everywhere. Help us fight back for fair maps with $25 or whatever you can today and defend our fundamental right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=080625_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=080625_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=080625_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=080625_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=080625_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=080625_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=080625_2&amount=35]
This is all part of a sweeping national strategy that uses map-drawing to boost one party’s power at the expense of non-white voters and is now playing out at the local level.
How do we know? The D.C.-based attorney who oversaw much of these redistricting fights for a conservative law firm just took over as the top anti-voting lawyer at the MAGA version of the Justice Department.
The involvement from the start of national-level anti-voting operatives highlights the striking sophistication and coordination of this multi-pronged campaign to suppress our democracy.
This isn't some secret cabal trying to steal our power. This is happening in plain sight , with little media attention, directed from the Oval Office and being run from a party headquarters. Protecting our right to vote means stopping them.
Opponents of voting rights will stop at nothing in their pursuit of power and control. Please, chip in $25 or whatever you can to protect voting rights and fair representation >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=080625_2&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=080625_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=080625_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=ipC35rEBRI4MPmuS%2BN4KIAx6TBpg2vXVsCcduxj0EEYsTeNXndvfm%2BPiEXgGd6j2gmklscCDZbazb3nRgVZY9ZXoPyM2fZQxFb0Du9cwBXywRp%2B3Zc4qzuVoUTw6SJJFpw0Muib7cTtfUDk%2BGQM6X9elFzdeG27FUVujRWbeBbQwUv4Cp2VE%2BJFyHNkywfKG8tWZqd%2F2oo784XVFLRBjvN6sZYvS8Lt6CfFgk%2FUyg%2FyBRp5kiHrc5cE2mrXQ2l43cryd0RKlR55ihDbOMxUfD%2F5MO8PHH1AGskOQEnRqWp32M4%2BmxHMq9n7tIVlAPehfAoXvbBaD3ZGeWXIKj6ylNMjcZ%2FVWuEiKtVyM5X9arwks8MZXbOhD05BrhEueppm%2F7%2Bi4%2Fbe%2Fzq8ySeL6p6I%2Baxtx%2F0cCdiwklt74NgwzGcI%3D .

subject: Trump: ‘Punish MSNBC’
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We need Democrats to stand up and save MSNBC >>
| Folks, Trump has gone after CBS, PBS, NPR, and CNN... **and he’s hinting that MSNBC is next:** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-msnbc/?source=VPP_20250806_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=20816%2E878179%2EaXguB1) [**We can’t stop MSNBC from becoming a far-right Trump-obsessed channel like Fox News if Democrats aren’t willing to fight for it — so we need to know if you still watch and support MSNBC, friend:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-msnbc/?source=VPP_20250806_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20816%2E878179%2EaXguB1) | [I PROUDLY STAND WITH MSNBC »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-msnbc/?source=VPP_20250806_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20816%2E878179%2EaXguB1)
---
Look, Trump will do _ANYTHING_ to silence newscasts that tell the truth and expose his crimes... **and MSNBC is his next target! 🎯**

We need a **MASSIVE** coalition of grassroots supporters like YOU to show solidarity with the free press — _before Trump DESTROYS it entirely!_

[**Please, friend: Do your part and add your name to our petition standing with MSNBC »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-msnbc/?source=VPP_20250806_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=20816%2E878179%2EaXguB1)

_The Voter Protection Project_

(www.protectvoting.org)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20816%2E878179%2EaXguB1). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20816%2E878179%2EaXguB1).**

name: Ruiz HQ
subject: This isn’t normal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=7f46Nps5fBb3kGQ0K4D2RQfEXf%2BQ9jBnayIAHORCHSEO4F4UKqgwnRKGo6PfV%2Byjap9F0I2HC5bj3gKlmAsPmwobwTUXVrYmr%2FiM0ZfhoggiZAik0WiNzu1Uy8aRcX16fYmMRvmGTMABSYIKVfxLz15BZyKBWUy2l90dvD2GVtLSUyRSsdQ3Po9R67escoETVcqjDNMYA9kboGP6w6L%2FbJUY8ncP%2FN0VRljZFxPVAhI8j8k0tCvO0bMOVkX87LTE84dyuVnnJFQmqF7vXINv3ZHdIpn0iJCD9RQCqOe3w3QMgU%2Bj0vWta1W1c4m8DDPLG36tXAKs%2BrScdHxU6b%2BMhdmw%2FVCGASHd5bNZTsxL1B7CNf1doRF5wRtGNlbJhL7ACaLz0e3izPnMfULAcVD4CO%2FSdXQfJNK2UDOD2Wf%2FRI6OUf7d0QRGh2j6duRCVMMr)
---
| |
---
Just four years after redistricting, Republicans across the country are already trying to redraw the maps **_again._** This is not normal. Redistricting usually only happens once every ten years, but Republicans are jumping the gun in a blatant attempt to steal the House and guarantee their majority for the rest of Trump’s term. In Texas, Democratic state reps literally had to flee the state to break quorum in an effort to stop Republicans from forcing through a new map. If Republicans in Texas insist on redrawing their maps, California may be forced to revisit its own lines — to fight fire with fire. If California redraws its maps, it could put Congressman Ruiz at risk. We don’t know what the new CA-25 will look like, but we’re concerned the District will become more competitive. Our campaign didn’t anticipate this curveball at the beginning of the year. We couldn’t have imagined that we would be campaigning in a new and more challenging District. We’re already making plans to hire more staff, buy more ads, hold more rallies — drastically adding to our original budget. We need to defend CA-25 in order to flip the House in the Midterms. Whether we are redistricted or not, people are depending on us to re-elect Congressman Ruiz. Team Ruiz will have to be prepared either way... [Will you chip in $10 and help us fill the gap in our new budget so that we can prepare for redistricting?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112870322/561891624/-533936924?amount=10&source=SBD_RR_EM_FR_080625_Maps_30DO30DNTL_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWVmZGJiNTQtMjI3My1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zKu5rDU9JrHdznge8jLT-FYdrOPBh7tPeeSYOm89md0=) _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately._ | | **[DONATE $10 NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112870323/561891647/-533936924?amount=10&express_lane=true&source=SBD_RR_EM_FR_080625_Maps_30DO30DNTL_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWVmZGJiNTQtMjI3My1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zKu5rDU9JrHdznge8jLT-FYdrOPBh7tPeeSYOm89md0=)**
---

The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

clean_body: While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Just four years after redistricting, Republicans across the country are already trying to redraw the maps again. This is not normal. Redistricting usually only happens once every ten years, but Republicans are jumping the gun in a blatant attempt to steal the House and guarantee their majority for the rest of Trump’s term. In Texas, Democratic state reps literally had to flee the state to break quorum in an effort to stop Republicans from forcing through a new map. If Republicans in Texas insist on redrawing their maps, California may be forced to revisit its own lines — to fight fire with fire. If California redraws its maps, it could put Congressman Ruiz at risk. We don’t know what the new CA-25 will look like, but we’re concerned the District will become more competitive. Our campaign didn’t anticipate this curveball at the beginning of the year. We couldn’t have imagined that we would be campaigning in a new and more challenging District. We’re already making plans to hire more staff, buy more ads, hold more rallies — drastically adding to our original budget. We need to defend CA-25 in order to flip the House in the Midterms. Whether we are redistricted or not, people are depending on us to re-elect Congressman Ruiz. body:
We want to hear your “Big, Beautiful Bill” thoughts.

[|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/O0bVZx8UhHsUWcgGr8cP6A~~/AAUS1hA~/G4aj0KlNDT0WX8xcZHFKnBpF7QIdAJOB4xhgoCmyntpeSrYcLilhKWKrpjB1mJ3eoaM4PtFx-OBeJUgMLoDLt4mMOat4m_Q7ckaX-KJdfuNJip6Rnkv1Rj4Dq6qQrx4WngYFdrN0PK4Ke_JVgV-jQAJA_Uc7ljOFL4OTYPQ477M~)
| | | | Hi Peter, Let’s talk. The race for Tennessee’s Seventh District is happening because Mark Green passed the so-called “Big, Beautiful Bill”... and then resigned. We think he stepped down because he knew what would happen next – rural hospitals closing, hardworking Tennesseans losing their health care, and voters holding him accountable. But we want to hear from you: **Are you concerned about the impact of the “Big, Beautiful Bill”?** **[**I’m extremely concerned** ](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/2nBLMRfvm79JMc5V1_oLxw~~/AAUS1hA~/O_gYl6D29C0P66aCBkfM7Xu37q13zV7RJGOG5JJ41MeamQ96ATcvLVhwSEfW_tndEN7vudoO8fGVeSRS3OpdRzi7wdrLjv1yPjywEWGCUqGGuJ3TrOW6R4IKgJI4f4HkH2vL-LFQEZZu2syAI5EU-qEk3OBfc1tlk_4O0yWob4Fw-47h8D_wbre-1mf7YY9R2ID02sQMgEIvGlwICUqlsAuO6s4SLNcKfLfGKDOZ0Xk2F2urP7OGJx5mbPbQ37TCUiiL-QUPpDXZpvtpQtP428jxpb1aWzwj4Qo93QCLw6Y~) ** **[**I have questions** ](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/2nBLMRfvm79JMc5V1_oLxw~~/AAUS1hA~/O_gYl6D29C0P66aCBkfM7Xu37q13zV7RJGOG5JJ41MeamQ96ATcvLVhwSEfW_tndEN7vudoO8fGVeSRS3OpdRzi7wdrLjv1yPjywEWGCUqGGuJ3TrOW6R4IKgJI4f4HkH2vL-LFQEZZu2syAI5EU-qEk3OBfc1tlk_4O0yWob4Fw-47h8D_wbre-1mf7YY9R2ID02sQMgEIvGlwICUqlsAuO6s4SLNcKfLfGKDOZ0Xk2F2urP7OGJx5mbPbQ37TCUiiL-QUPpDXZpvtpQtP428jxpb1aWzwj4Qo93QCLw6Y~) ** **[**I think it's fine** ](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/2nBLMRfvm79JMc5V1_oLxw~~/AAUS1hA~/O_gYl6D29C0P66aCBkfM7Xu37q13zV7RJGOG5JJ41MeamQ96ATcvLVhwSEfW_tndEN7vudoO8fGVeSRS3OpdRzi7wdrLjv1yPjywEWGCUqGGuJ3TrOW6R4IKgJI4f4HkH2vL-LFQEZZu2syAI5EU-qEk3OBfc1tlk_4O0yWob4Fw-47h8D_wbre-1mf7YY9R2ID02sQMgEIvGlwICUqlsAuO6s4SLNcKfLfGKDOZ0Xk2F2urP7OGJx5mbPbQ37TCUiiL-QUPpDXZpvtpQtP428jxpb1aWzwj4Qo93QCLw6Y~) ** **[**I’m still learning about it** ](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/2nBLMRfvm79JMc5V1_oLxw~~/AAUS1hA~/O_gYl6D29C0P66aCBkfM7Xu37q13zV7RJGOG5JJ41MeamQ96ATcvLVhwSEfW_tndEN7vudoO8fGVeSRS3OpdRzi7wdrLjv1yPjywEWGCUqGGuJ3TrOW6R4IKgJI4f4HkH2vL-LFQEZZu2syAI5EU-qEk3OBfc1tlk_4O0yWob4Fw-47h8D_wbre-1mf7YY9R2ID02sQMgEIvGlwICUqlsAuO6s4SLNcKfLfGKDOZ0Xk2F2urP7OGJx5mbPbQ37TCUiiL-QUPpDXZpvtpQtP428jxpb1aWzwj4Qo93QCLw6Y~) ** Thank you for sharing your thoughts – your voice matters in this race. Team Dixie

_Vincent Dixie is a small business owner, husband, and State Representative who has passed bipartisan laws, taken on corruption, and delivered real results for Tennessee families. name: Mark Harris
subject: I'm Defending Religious Freedom – Will You Stand With Me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Harris for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/markharrisforcongress.com/im-defending-religious-freedom-will-you-stand-with-me?e=4024c5123e)
---
| | [ ](https://markharrisforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=82117f51bb8b79bb18d514427&id=d0f6d370f6&e=4024c5123e)
---
| **Dear Friend,**
In a world where our values are under attack, I'm fighting to ensure that every American can live out their faith without fear. **I have been at the forefront of a critical issue that strikes at the heart of our constitutional rights: the protection of religious freedom in the workplace.**

The Trump administration has taken a bold step by issuing new guidelines that allow federal employees to express their faith openly, whether through displaying religious symbols, engaging in prayer, or discussing their beliefs with colleagues. **This is a victory for religious liberty, and I am proud to stand with President Trump in this effort.**

**But this fight isn’t over. **We need your help to keep pushing back against those who would silence our beliefs. Your donation today will fuel our efforts to defend religious liberty, support our communities, and ensure that our voices are heard in Washington. **Join me in this critical mission. Every dollar counts. Together, we can make a difference.** A contribution of [**$25, $50, or even $100**](https://markharrisforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=82117f51bb8b79bb18d514427&id=3a2752070b&e=4024c5123e) will help us continue this battle for faith and freedom. **Your support makes all the difference.**
👇 **WATCH MY RECENT INTERVIEW BELOW **👇
---
| [ ](https://markharrisforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=82117f51bb8b79bb18d514427&id=fa048fc659&e=4024c5123e)

Mark Harris

#
We’ve got some bad news, Peter: **Democrats running in must-win races across the country are already getting pummeled with well-funded GOP attacks.**
Billionaire-backed groups are pouring millions of dollars into these races — and we’re still more than a year away from the 2026 election! **[Will you help us fight back now?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93276?refcode=em20250806-9232&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9232%2E614464%2E7Gf9Rv)**

name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: 60 Years Since the Voting Rights Act Was Signed
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100170441.172289.10&gen=1).
| Share On | [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=share&piv=2100170441.172289.10&snid=2)
---|---
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170441.172289.10&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15122)
**Today Marks 60 Years Since the Voting Rights Act Was Signed** On this day in 1965, [President Lyndon B. Johnson signed the Voting Rights Act](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170441.172289.10&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15123), a history making piece of legislation that prohibited racial discrimination in voting. Martin Luther King Jr., Rosa Parks, and John Lewis were present for the signing. [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170441.172289.10&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15124) **60 Years Later** 60 years later, we celebrate this landmark legislation and the leadership of all the civil rights leaders, lawmakers, and Americans that believed and fought for equality in our democracy. As we continue to fight against threats to our freedoms, equality, justice, and democracy, we remember this pivotal moment in history that brought our country forward. **Voting is Your Voice ** **** Now is a great time to check your [voter registration status](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170441.172289.10&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15125) and make sure that you're ready to vote in the next election. Elections happen twice every year, even when there isn't a presidential election. Use your vote to share your voice! Stay engaged by following Senator Hughes' Office on [Instagram](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170441.172289.10&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15126), [TikTok](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170441.172289.10&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15127), [Facebook](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170441.172289.10&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15128), [Bluesky](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170441.172289.10&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15129), and [X](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170441.172289.10&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15130).
* * *
| Offices of Senator Vincent Hughes

name: Powered by People
subject: We won’t give up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Earlier today, Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton launched an investigation into Powered by People.
**Why? Because we’re standing with the lawmakers who left Texas to fight for our democracy.**
Donald Trump and Greg Abbott are trying to redraw Texas’ congressional maps to steal five Democratic-held seats in Congress. And now Ken Paxton—the same guy impeached for bribery—is going after the people trying to save our democracy from these thugs.
Texas Democrats left the state to stop Republicans from stealing our country. Now more than ever, they need to know we have their backs.
Republicans are going to do everything they can to slow us down, intimidate us, and scare us into silence.
But we won’t back down and we won’t give up. This is the fight of all fights, and we’re ready to stay in it to protect our democracy.
[**If you’re with us, rush a donation to Powered by People right now. Your contribution will be put to work standing up to Paxton, Abbott, Trump, and anyone else who tries to silence our voices.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250806-3.zemCCl&refcode=ema20250806-240288&t=2&akid=240288%2E444211%2E4AbLqb)

Thank you,

---
* The overlooked warning signs Ben is seeing in today’s economy
* Why your current mix of stocks and bonds may NOT be enough
* A simple, 3-step strategy to diversify and help protect your wealth
* How gold and silver have helped Ben protect his assets during past crises
* And what you can do today to potentially safeguard your retirement before it’s too late

---
If you’re in or nearing retirement, this guide could be one of the most important things you read this year. Don't wait for another market crash to take action...

name: Updates For Great Americans
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes.

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z35m1h115d2ie2kfqeiugb3agp4horno6j2i3dbo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clhm8pr1c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people--and you may be among them--I'm thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: _[**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zcsfj627k3clfmdapk322d6oe76d5h28conmc28g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clhm8pr1c1h2bs)_
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmes3hachil45bt1msom4usskbqurqev4u373p2o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clhm8pr1c1h2bs)
---
| | "Tax cuts for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zucetkgg8q22dt6m56lk4h91nulq9jbn38v77opg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clhm8pr1c1h2bs) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge.[**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" _****now.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zkembd447bneupprrsadajv29f567uuvfbc59id0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clhm8pr1c1h2bs) Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Two seemingly foreign truck drivers were ticketed while driving transport trucks through rural Alabama.A state trooper from Dekalb County, Alabama, may have been among the first in the nation to issue tickets under President Trump's executive order that compels the use of "commonsense rules" in the trucking industry.'They can't communicate, and they can't read road signs.'The state trooper pulled over one driver from Texas and another from Florida to issue them tickets for not abiding by a simple new rule applied to truckers: Be proficient in English.

## US-Russia Standoff Hits India With 50% Tariff
President Trump raised [tariffs on Indian goods to 50%](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2OrDAQBODTmAzUNGBD4OAlZPPSDZGx24NX_kG2Z9DcfsVeYZNKSvpKqq_H9lDOu_j8rwLJatMW6SqeaqW8ReupnDHQUxlSPlCllMuRrg0BpxbmFsRmlPOfbWyMtERIQ0OyF9M48R5xaQ7J50lpzZWliS80wMJnMY89Kk09IO2Nk7cGM4geQIDoAAeY9gV6LfS448JGIONqyt13crEeZP0nvSl3OoXGy6PWs7DhH8OV4XpdV6fjru-S4XrTDFeY7-AM15pf4WxrVoZaF41TbVXZWVva_CrFqe6owTdZmvNy3rvCBRvhGZTzv3P1Tx-9Jf4EAAD___9meac) Wednesday, citing the country’s continued imports of Russian oil as a help to Russia financing the war in Ukraine. The move follows an earlier 25% tariff and comes days before Trump’s deadline for a Ukraine cease-fire. Meanwhile, Trump is preparing for a possible [meeting with Russian President Vladimir Putin](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD3O3CAQQE-DOywY7GVdUGwUuYm-NClSWtiM12T5sQAv2ttH5AopR2_0NPN-fy1f2jobnj-1R1X2uASs2WEpmJawO8xn8PjUBrXzWDCmfMS6AIORsjtlcjHaus8ydEbtiICiQ8XlOIw3DjB1h0IjJr6bYQUY2Z3dJlhhFMCl1GICHDqrmo3dmeSMSSZ7BoKN68T4JrdhhYkMDI0tMfV_og3lwN194htTv0XfOXWUcmYiHgRmAnOttfc5NEZgxkCvTGBuTzUYkzME5pIuf1IM7_ih1ZZX3HfqEUtu00HPq9hAdabpytlqmhFfmZZID9SGtuWsw1ZsDE2qE308-A_O_UjEHDdriPj-rSXFmn9hOrukzFmtczbfJBnY02vr_h1f_qv4W8HfAAAA___b1ZYg) to push for a peace deal, following special envoy Steve Witkoff's trip to Moscow this week. The White House says Trump is also open to talks with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky, though no date or location has been announced.
## Five Soldiers Shot at Georgia Army Base
Five soldiers were injured in a [shooting at Georgia’s Fort Stewart](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkM2KpDAUhZ8m7iLX_JhykcXA4K5mMwyzlJhcNU00ktwuqbdv7Ffo7TlwON_3_zk9XUzxWP-4HS0teTrwqgmJsEzHkrCex46rC-jSjoS51C1fkwChOTw4mCm4mN6TaoJdEAXKBm1ntNJ9J8TQbFbLXiwoZ697AYNRQy_lsODDzzD3wwxNtPcaPMB0AAZMC0KCngfovPFqFgNTgCFSLu1HjgdtuKR3fmFpfd6bZDeiszL5i4mRidHN_iZo13zXTIz__t6pp_hCXrecCQuPh48BD-Le1U-XKGLlBc9cCANfciFeCS9XiK-YyxodE2OlXN5MjjEw-bsTSnUajG6KDecVU4q1N0zBuruYvo_Rj2y-rPgKAAD__xCWiWg) on Wednesday, prompting a temporary lockdown of the base and nearby schools. The [suspected shooter](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGupDAQRE9jMo-ahsGewMEmZH_TDZGxG_BfYyO7BzS3X7FX-EklJT1VvT9f05cNMaT1t93J8JKnRFeNxExlSkukeqSdVuvJxp2YcqlbviYEfErQEtTkbYifqW-8WYiQuoZMq579c2gRX81m9KLJDWCpm19qwHbWClG32utBQedUE8xNAw2qBVCgHoAdPOcXtE65fsaX6IF84Fwe3zkk3miJn3xSebi8N9FszEcV3S-Bo8AxfY5c-a4EjjdY4Aj6jkHg-K7y_idwXCmXNdgql1xYVqbLFpY5yZjdX5-vJCudVGyUIX2_C3kZkrSOw0mybjkzFRmSC54SCxybYvxxhRhDHZToYd1tiP8H8o-sngb_BQAA__9beovn), Sgt. Quornelius Radford, allegedly used his personal handgun during what officials described as a workplace incident in the 2nd Armored Brigade Combat Team area. He was tackled by other soldiers and apprehended within 40 minutes, and is now in pretrial confinement. The victims are in stable condition, and the motive remains unclear.
## ESPN Inks NFL, Wrestling Mega-Deals
Disney-owned ESPN announced a [series of landmark sports deals](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDuO4zAMQE8jdzJo-iOnUJHFws0iu8UWUxqyTcWa6GNISozk9ANnjjAd8Qg8kO_jMl6UscZf_ypHMuswetqTpZwpjl5bSpt3dFULKesoU4hpDfuIgC2HnoMYF2Xsc2yKRWoipLogWYm2absK8VSsEieYdT-3c9d3_SKaBrBvW12jAKqo1oWRhw16EBWAAFEC1tBOJ6hmMTcTnlgDtJgcYvkZjM8rafsMD4rlHFxh5Zrzllh9ZjgwHPZ9L13yx47hQJ7fE8MhbSHmY_DaHjhtnq9ho8RNTvx4jk_W5Bd36vaGXHF3T5lP9yfXIfJvAdfKHxYV-flc_an-vW6sHsJsFlb__nVUpD39p7gVUS7bbqw1qROsgatTxr7vzT-K_JD4FQAA__9nEZFg) this week, including the acquisition of NFL Network and other NFL properties and a separate agreement for rights to WWE’s WrestleMania and other marquee wrestling events. The NFL deal, announced Tuesday, saw ESPN [giving up a 10% equity stake](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uxCAQhU-DO6wxGGMXFGncbdqUFobxmhU_GyBr7e0jcoU0o5Ge9Ol97-u23bTzLt4_dUBVj7RFvIrHWjFv8fBYnjHgXVvUPmDFlMuZro0BExRmCnKz2vn3NnZWHYgMeYdqkGIU08DY0p1qMtMOXOoZFmlRc4F8RyM0Bw7TMYjOqUaDGeQAIEH2wDiIfYHBSDPubCEjoHU15f6RXKwnHv6dXph7k0Ln1VnrsxD-QdhK2HpdV2_iblpI2NrQhK0wt9M-60rEd6FNjNZEtfn-cRlpPDwNaJ2muhSshbpIg36kTJt6f9bgu6zs83LeuzJJMsI9aOf_StR_LfdS7DcAAP__tnuBfQ) in exchange for NFL Network and NFL RedZone. Analysts say that stake could be worth $2 billion to $3 billion for the NFL. On Wednesday, ESPN acquired streaming rights to all [WWE Premium Live Events](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGy4yAMRb8Gd2RkBRtSUGxD97bd0kOCSNgB4wGeGf_9DvsLr5Eaje6558_X9mVDDPv7t02km8_bTr1Gao3KtvtI9dgTva0jGxM1yqV-ct8QcOGgOMjN2RCvTUxOeyKk-0R6lotY1hnxMX00qCd5K5ywQAu9JD5WqVbvlSXp59lNQY9voEDOABLkDfAOy_MB80u-xBMfTAC50HK5_c1hbx_y8conldsrpynqT2tHZfdfDA1D03u_fVfbsrPXOGBoasvlGvvIpVWGZuQxNKDGWBma0ZL3Try2Qjbxo1AK34nHcBKnk_ZW-TDAe6HaIiW7B8vQqGW5KyUGN0MzFe2OHmIMdZVMwDvZEP9Dth-ZPTX-CwAA__8thov_) for the next five years, which includes the popular WrestleMania shows. That deal totaled $1.6 billion, or roughly $325 million per year. News of the programming investments comes just a few weeks before ESPN launches its new streaming service, set to debut Aug. 21 for $29.99 a month.

Meanwhile, Trump is preparing for a possible to push for a peace deal, following special envoy Steve Witkoff's trip to Moscow this week. The White House says Trump is also open to talks with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky, though no date or location has been announced. Five Soldiers Shot at Georgia Army Base Five soldiers were injured in a on Wednesday, prompting a temporary lockdown of the base and nearby schools. The , Sgt. Quornelius Radford, allegedly used his personal handgun during what officials described as a workplace incident in the 2nd Armored Brigade Combat Team area. He was tackled by other soldiers and apprehended within 40 minutes, and is now in pretrial confinement. The victims are in stable condition, and the motive remains unclear. ESPN Inks NFL, Wrestling Mega-Deals Disney-owned ESPN announced a this week, including the acquisition of NFL Network and other NFL properties and a separate agreement for rights to WWE’s WrestleMania and other marquee wrestling events. The NFL deal, announced Tuesday, saw ESPN in exchange for NFL Network and NFL RedZone. Analysts say that stake could be worth $2 billion to $3 billion for the NFL. On Wednesday, ESPN acquired streaming rights to all for the next five years, which includes the popular WrestleMania shows. That deal totaled $1.6 billion, or roughly $325 million per year. News of the programming investments comes just a few weeks before ESPN launches its new streaming service, set to debut Aug. 21 for $29.99 a month. # **Trump’s 2025 Economic Revolution Is Here
Are Your Retirement Savings Ready?
**
---
**President Trump’s “One Big Beautiful Bill” strives to deliver the largest tax cuts for working and middle class Americans in our country’s history.** His bold plan not only extends the historic 2017 tax cuts but introduces even deeper reforms aimed at empowering American workers and retirees. If you are retired or near retirement, this could mean more money in your savings and a once-in-a-generation opportunity to help protect lasting wealth—**if you’re prepared**. **But here’s the catch:**
This new economic agenda may come with both massive opportunity and serious risk for anyone with a traditional retirement account—like a 401(k), IRA, or TSP. The fatal flaw? These accounts are built on a Wall Street system that assumes stability, free from manipulation and political shocks. And in today’s world, all it could take is one major event—another bank failure, a geopolitical crisis, a market crash—to wipe out decades of your savings like it did in the 2008 Financial Crisis. **If you have a retirement account and want to help safeguard—not just survive—during Trump’s economic revolution, this is your wake-up call.** We’ve outlined a wealth protection strategy inside the **[2025 Retirement Protection Guide](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** — and it’s completely FREE. **Inside this guide, you'll discover an IRS-approved loophole that allows you to move your retirement savings tax-free and penalty-free into a safe haven asset and hedge your wealth against inflation, market volatility and geopolitical crises.** **Time is short.** Trump’s reforms may be coming fast—and the financial system roller coaster may be a ride that you don’t want to take with your retirement savings.

Texas has received a waiver from the U.S. Department of Agriculture to disallow the purchase of candy and sweetened drinks using SNAP benefits, or food stamps. Five other states [also received waivers](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGSsyAUBeCn0Q7ngqBYUPxNuvztlg7IJZIQyMjdaN5-x32F7c-cM9_5us5XG1PMt__2iYaOUOaMe01IhNt8_86PUIp3Nm9Y17KhvxdXbZ4FCMVAMxhnb2P6zLL1xoGfeIuGj0qqQUqt2tXApPoAotceBrmIAUNQI19QaARU3rbRnGWgYeQcOJ-6wNE5vowCe71wgEYC-khl62hFwsPWkD7ljVu3lGebzEr0qk3_rxGXRlz2fe9Owo74OAONuNR4sEqWsDJnMztV7GSxmu2LOcwYIlUmOOgJoN2Mf-0xpViHsZFwe9qYfqfobwe9jfgJAAD__4DYewA), bringing the total to 12 states that now ban SNAP purchases of junk food.

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1935, a strike by Dallas dressmakers [generated international headlines](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFyhCAUgOHTYKcDKKIFRRq7TZvSAXkqK_J24GXdvX0muUIu8P8z39dtvtkQQ9o-7QmGXivOCa4SgQjyfP9Ox4ronU0Zyo4Z_B1dsWmWXKqaDzXXs7chvueu8sZxP4oKjNCqU33XDaraDR-dV0K3Sgxt7xY3rotr275Ti9VO8b4K5jfGB66F4EKMzSrAObFoCe2wCM5Zx8EHwtzQDgQvW9b4xifkZsGzimYnehTWfjA5MTld19VQ2S2mGBI0mDcmp90m7xAPJidIlAMUJidvY7Sl3mw-IVF9YT4gl7pQDgdU2fjHFWIMpdes49tpQ_wb0v-Ynkb-BAAA___Xen6H) when picketers entered two local factories and stripped the clothing from 10 female employees. The ensuing melee was covered by the _New York Times_ and papers in Italy and Australia. The State Fair of Texas announced the [finalists](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO6yAQRb8Gd1iAsbELite4y2u3tAYzxJMlJgI2Tv5-5fzCdjPS1bk69-uyXIAi7df_cEdbXyEtOx4lYq2Yl9vP_h1S8g72jGVLGf0tuQL7ooTquRi5MIsHiu9FN9464SfZoJWm1_2g9dg3m51cD8qDcQa7vsPBD1OAUYvB47BqgQ3ZEyZGYaQUUk5tkOicXI3CblylEEwL9FRTbuuGFV9QQnynJ-Z2Tfcm2q3WR2HdP6ZmpubjONqQXvrUOANMzefJ1FwqVOQBKPMPhX8kHF3Pl69bohU5HJA9D7RDpFJLk61_HBQjlcEwLa53oPjprX9b62nVbwAAAP__TpyAYQ) for this year's Big Tex Choice Awards, including those for a new drink category. Let us know which ones you'd like to try! 📬 **Heads up:** You’ll get a special note later today from our sponsor, [Miso Kitchen AI](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDtu3DAQQE9DdbsY_iRuwSKAsZ3TpiT4Ga3o8COQ1Nq-fSAnyAXcznuYGbxfr-bVxhTL46fNqMfHWk3B955wDGzm7Si_11qDs6Vh32rD8FZdt8UwYPIC6gKLCTamTyOmoB2EG51Q00UKOQuh5LRppWa_LhwcgAUrPQpHbzYsMwPpqFRT1OcyULBQCpTeritF56hfGHLlKQARgCGO2q5jw4Eftq_psz6xXX3NU9LbGHsn_Adhd8LusTyxj2uOvbbq6oi-n94J-f0Y2fR6NI-Ev2C2MRE2n8OMIR6Z8JfdxnDZbRsFW9_i_o97m3cbH-XL-A-pggu_KfM3BOdUgRSSAkxNh_09phT7vBABj_PU17vje5Gfmv0JAAD__5FbkRI), offering a chance to invest in their fry-cooking robot, Flippy. ## AG Probing Group Funding Absent Democrats
Attorney General Ken Paxton has [launched an investigation](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDvSozAQhE8jMqgZWTwUKNiEzJtuSEloMLIF4xXC2Lf_C1_hTzrq-vrx7zpcbYhhvf21C5n8nnhY6dgi5UxpuO_rY2L2zq6JtpkT-Tu7za6DBFmX0JXQDt6G-BlU4Y0Dr7Egg22t6kapri5mAwROa992k4VWuqlBjYCkba2xkaMqgjlh0EGLCIi6mpCcw7GVdOlGBBAKyIfMqcozZXrbbYofflGqRl6KaOacn5u4_BGyF7I_jqN6cgw5jHwahOzPRUL2Z4yQPXSnNEL2jjKXnHhPDyq_4PL_zmlfyrC-aMvhZnPgtQRQukF1KZLxzyPEGLamFQpuiw3xWyL_7rqXkT8BAAD__9Rxgck) into former El Paso congressman Beto O’Rourke’s Powered by People PAC for “[unlawfully funding runaway Democrats](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGuozAQBdCvgc7INhBI4WIburftlmiMB_CL40H2AOHvV4l2v-B1UxyN7r1_vsYv8MHH5Tc80fBrpjHimQMyYxq_9_iYiZyFmDCvlNB9k80QRy11K2QvZDc68OEam9IZK91dlWhU1zbtrWn6tlzNrdduVrJ1tXK9Behu011rWbcSaqtrW3rzfiZ72SkllbpXs0Jr1dRprPtJSVk0Ep1nShWvyPiCPIeLDkzVRM8ymJV5y0X9q9BDoYfzPKsPAmZKEa8FIyYI1UJHoYd3u0IPCQNCxvf534l_UDwwig1eTFEE2OO0YhY-HpjZL8CeorDIJCjRnh6YRQLnJwhiSbRvYo8BznkP4RLzHp2PS5mM204fgs-3rmjk8gQfPtn5Z4sfRv8NAAD__3UFnFg).” O’Rourke’s organization has reportedly picked up much of the tab for the absent Democrats’ expenses. Paxton also insisted Abbott didn’t have the authority to remove Texas House Democratic Chair Gene Wu from office for leaving the state. Abbott [pushed back](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGy4yAMRb8Gd3iAhx-koNjG3dt2S48MckyMIQNKnPz9jjOzX7CNmjtHR7p_fqYfiCnm62_Y0dFrKVPGoyUkwjrdHnlbSgkz5IptLRXDrcwN8qSEGriwXJgpQEzvSXfBzSJcZIdOmkEP31rboVudRamEMReLg0EMAUXwWtnFa8AZNXTRncuEFUZKIeWlXyTOs_RG4Zf1UgimBYZIpfa0IuEL2pLe5Ym192XvkluJ7o19_WJqZGo8jqPfGtAZMjWe3zA1fjCmxlPF1CjsOYZ_AQeiUjO--RUzVkj8Di8qmR8xJQ5t4748KjVOhT_BAyEPuBdfgaLnCY4dNqyNNwQ6LV114X6ysX0bpsV1h5g-19L_dfx06m8AAAD__9XOkxI) in a public letter, arguing Paxton was mistaken. For its part, the Texas Supreme Court ordered Wu to file a [response to Abbott’s lawsuit](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0Dty6yAUgOHVoM6ec3gIqaBwo1v5VplJOgbEkYWDhQfwa_cZZwtp_-Ir_s-jPbqY4nb67y5k2nPJdqNHTdQaFXu-bd9LzsG7rVBdc6Fwzr66zXLgagfDDrQNLqaXlV0wHsKIHRnUSqpeykF1q1FyobGXJLUQbg4DICgYvBO9cIA976J5YzCARgTEcb8geY-z5iSGGQGYBAqx5bJvKzV6urqkV75T2c_50iWztnatTBwYnxifnu_K-PSv0OngfW7NfnwxPtXm2q0yPuGo-Ci0Voi613zQgnfFhOsjphRrr5mE08XF9Ku3vz25G_4TAAD__1mScns) by Friday. “ _Denying the governor a quorum was not an abandonment of my office; it was a fulfillment of my oath_ ,” [Wu said in a statement](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1ywyAQQOHToM6eBYGAgiKNOqdNyYBYLGwsPIB_dPuMc4W0r_iK93OyJ5dy2s7f7oamv2OxG75axt6x2stju8ZSgndbxbaWiuFSfHObZcDEAdQBpA0u5d3yIRgPQdMBDZWCi4lzJYbVTDg5jFzyJaJETyeNDoKOQocoGPohmQ8GCiSlQKk-Rore00UyHNVCAQgHDKmXeuwrdny7FvNenliPS7kN2ay93xsZvwibCZvfn0rYfHV7dudHsYTNrbv-aITNVAumFIhxgpFzqrRSQzXh_ko5pzZJwuF8cyn_yf1_P56G_QYAAP__I7Fy7g). Meanwhile, nine of 11 Texas Senate Democrats were absent from the Capitol yesterday—not enough to break quorum—after [traveling to Massachusetts](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDFy5CAURE-DMqY-CAQKCDZR5k03VCH4GuFBMAV_Lfv2W-M9guPuetX9_rytbz7lVO6__YmOPve6Frx6RiJs6_vf8thrjZsvDftRG8b3unVfVglSc7AczBp9yl-rGqLbIM5iQCeMVnpSyurhcJNCC14LtVuwczCTGfdxnLRVSgP4eUjuBQMLRggQYr7tArdNBCNxtEEAMAUYE9V2owMJP33f81f9wHYL9RyyO4ienY2_mFyYXK7rupUtbLVTLa8Gk8vrEpNLrsFnJpf_GU-dF7x4p_rkqfBvMm8YU6eWAqVy53u6H8QjnjU0Tynw7K_TP7B1TpX3J_oH98QFjMDkMhqrplkzuQzNxeeVck59MkzB_fQpf8-ln0n-cPJfAAAA__83xJGw), where they were joined by several of their colleagues in the House.
## Texas Banning SNAP Purchases of Junk Food
Texas has received a waiver from the U.S. Department of Agriculture to disallow the purchase of candy and sweetened drinks using SNAP benefits, or food stamps. Five other states [also received waivers](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGSsyAUBeCn0Q7ngqBYUPxNuvztlg7IJZIQyMjdaN5-x32F7c-cM9_5us5XG1PMt__2iYaOUOaMe01IhNt8_86PUIp3Nm9Y17KhvxdXbZ4FCMVAMxhnb2P6zLL1xoGfeIuGj0qqQUqt2tXApPoAotceBrmIAUNQI19QaARU3rbRnGWgYeQcOJ-6wNE5vowCe71wgEYC-khl62hFwsPWkD7ljVu3lGebzEr0qk3_rxGXRlz2fe9Owo74OAONuNR4sEqWsDJnMztV7GSxmu2LOcwYIlUmOOgJoN2Mf-0xpViHsZFwe9qYfqfobwe9jfgJAAD__4DYewA), bringing the total to 12 states that now ban SNAP purchases of junk food. “ _The new SNAP guidelines will ensure taxpayer dollars are used to purchase foods that provide real nutritional value_ ,” [Gov. Greg Abbott said](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDtywyAURVeDOjSAfqigSKPOaVNq-DwsbAwaeLbs3WeULaS_c-ec83NZLzrEkK7f-gEK3z6vCY4aARHKenumu8_ZGZ0K1C0XcLdsqk6rYGKgTFI2rU6H-Fn7xinD3MwbUHwa-mHsezk0m-q4BemAD2KUroN57OxoBnAzSD4K75ugzjMm2cQ543xuPQdjuJ0EdNJyxkjPwAXMpcUNEN66-vjJLyitzY8mqg1xr6T7ImIhYjmOo_X5PelnxZDOCRHL6UTEcs0vqo3JiHQveQsmYKX7s9hNV6D1AEBI4KgrId0rtTq5D61J79RAAh-wNkW5_QgxhjpOpGfXhw7xjwP_V--lxG8AAAD__2FCh_I) in a Tuesday announcement. Around 3.5 million low-income Texans receive SNAP benefits via the Lone Star Card. FDA Commissioner Marty Makary said the objective is to get all 50 states to [adopt similar SNAP restrictions](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOozAQxvGnMd1EtmMCFBRpKE7aa1dXoQGPgzfGRvawbN7-RO4Rrh7pp_l_nx_jB_rg4-M3rtTzj0tjpKMEYqY8fu3x6VKyE8ZMZUmZ7FeaCsZRS12DbEE2o0UfXqOpbD9J26mKetXUpr4Z09bV0qNFtLdOdrO5dq6d5umqjEZn0ci5nmTl-xOTrWyUkkp1F6domtTcaLq2s5JSGEnWc8oXXojpB4sLr_RN-TKntQr9wrwVcb0LPQg9HMdxWUs8b0IPFGEvQg8LYeBF6CHunD37FIUe3hYwPqnAmQpnKyTnoETcIPjCgAU2zAzJAed93WDbywKcYMUnAa6U_Yzwj38BPtCfMma439WvP_lzqHJvt8OH4MutEUY-VvTh_Tn_397fvf4bAAD___ZFmEw) as part of the Trump administration’s Make America Healthy Again initiative. Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has argued sugary and processed foods “fuel America’s diabetes and chronic disease epidemics.” The state will [work with retailers](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykULGu6yAU-xqyEQGBAAPDW7L1rW-MDuGkoY9CFbhN-_dXqXS_4I62ZVv2v8t8gZhivv6FO7r2Wsuc8agJW8N9vn3l_2spwUPesW5lx3ArvkKeBROKMkOZngPE9J5lF5xnwfIOHddKqlFKo7rNBalVGMVgg7HjsDAjQathlQDWWOVtF90ZxgzTnDPObb9y9J4vWuBgFs4YkQxDbGXv24YNX1DX9C5P3Pul3LvkttYelQx_iJiImI7j6BdfzxWnTsT0sRAxndQPpDXDg3rItJYAdIEc3lQwMRIxdbsLjyOmFOuoiWTXO8T06Wq_e-jpxHcAAAD__zA-eiI) to implement the restrictions, which go into effect next April.
## Texas Team Headed to Little League World Series
A youth baseball team from Richmond is heading to the Little League World Series, which starts next Tuesday in Williamsport, Pennsylvania. It’s the fourth year in a row that a [team from Texas](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSpDAMRL_GZJ6yBQwQOLiEbC-9kBK2GLxjbMoWw87fXzG_sIkSSd2v-9_X9IU--Pj4ixsZ_lnSFOksgZgpT99HfC4puRljprKmTO47zQXjBApaqXqpusmhD--pqZyZlRt0RUZ3bdPem6Zvq9XUS9PbdpjruoGu7meLy-BsW0ONw72HpfLmElO96rRWWg-3RdM8a9sB1b3VSolGkfOc8o1XYvrBsoR3elG-2bRVwazMexH1HwGjgPE8z5sN3j5hTUfhFK8rAeMVS8AYksUgYLw8BYyqv8b9WuCGWQbPHEgGwsdBcj-iXalI9vZJLDnJ04fgcSt7yix9lK0E-fKWU37LC0mGdPjiMaKAscrG7Z-Pcu9Eox4b-vCB5t9V_TLwPwAA__-i0pQt) has qualified for the two-week tournament. Representing the Southwest Region, Lamar Little League won the regional championship in Waco on Tuesday, defeating the top team from Louisiana 5-2. Lamar lost to Louisiana [earlier in the tournament](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSsyAURp8GOx1AjVhQ_I1d_nZLB-GqZK-QgWtI3n7HfYUtz1d8Z-Z83ee78ejD9t8coOm9xjlAyQhEkObHGb7XGN1iQoK8xwTuEZdswiy57Guuaj7Mznj8zF3l9MLdKCrQYui7_tZ1qq92rXqhlLVWjUPbWj4Yucqej52zclWy5ZXX1xlXfBCCCzE2q4BlEXaQ0CorOGcdB-cppoZ2IHibvOInviA1Nh4V6p3omVn7j8mJyamU0qAnQkAw2wlNTNs1x4SuzpA8ZCanS8nkhLiUCymeKZgDAl2U40l7gUx1gs3HwORUJe2exSP6fBtYx7fDePz109-qvbT8CQAA__9q2oJD) but bounced back with wins over Oklahoma and Midway Little League from Hewitt, representing Texas West. Since the first tournament in 1947, teams from Texas have [won twice](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3OozAQAJ_GdEZrY_4KF9fQ5dorkY2X4NyCkb0Jydufcq_w1SONRvPnNt9cpHjcf7sdLb_XNB94FUJmzPPjefxdUwreHRnLljKGR_LFHbMG3UoYJPRzcJE-s6mC9RBGVaFVfWvazpihrTa7doNZF9Ta9OgXvzroGuw6M_bt4NH4KtqvDAbolQKlxnpV6L1aeo3NsCgAYQBD5JRr3pDx7cpKn_TCXC9pr8huzGcRzS-hJ6Gn67rqZcvp-FKhp3KmzEXoyWWOC6HQ05aehdMhye0uS4rMhJLQ3Z8or5QpyII5YpEaBmjGcazP7ayyDecViWLpemHgvrtI_wv4Z99eVv8LAAD__4WNg8w)—in 1950 and 1966. Lamar qualified for the tournament in 2003 and 2004. Last year, a team from Boerne [lost to Florida](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGOpDAQRL8Gsh7ZBgYICC4h20svRG27Ae8aG7l7l5m_P3G_cNmTnlSlUv35WD4wxJC233jQJK81L4kujiRCZfn8Tl9rzt5iKsR7LuQ_s2VMi1GmAzWA6hePIb6XtvaTVX7UNU2679ru2bZDV-_T2mPjXIuj8aPrnH0-9eiNapTR2vnG1mG6w9Sgeq2V1uNj1WStdr2hZnBaqapV5IPk8pCdhF7Ia3znHyoPl486TrvIyVXzqzJzZebruh5fjHLLysx85iJcmdko01ZmVsPNN7kdswQHEVlArgwhpZA2BoelvGGNuQSPcBeBzVQSAcYILFgYJEMMIpEgEm7fBBaZ7O2vXKIHphKIwe14nCEn3sMJGx5Umbkukz-vEGPgZ1-1ajswxH9T5P8O-JnM3wAAAP__nyOdhg) in the U.S. Championship. A 16-and-under team from Victoria represented the Southwest Region in the recently concluded Senior League World Series in South Carolina, but was eliminated [after two losses](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGP4yAQhX8N7mIxBMe4oLjGXa690oIwtsmNIYJJnPz7lbfdcsv39PQ-6ft3na4uUkzLX7eh5fecp4R7JWTGMt2f6f-cc_AuFaxrLhju2VeXJiVVd5LmJPspuEifSTfBehkGaNBC3-nuorXpmtVqMwwAc1Bd7wHMcEY1SATlDMoZjG6iPc6kkT2ABBjaGdB7uPUKz-YGUgotMUTOpeUVGd-uzvTJLyztLW8N2ZX5UcX5j1CjUOO-7y1FZkJCtzyxzWU56lwonCqWiFWo8UAKNVby-xE5P0tyGyauP7dNseGxR6JYL73QctlcpG82_87Yy6qvAAAA__8PaIBU). A 14-and-under team from Needville [plays tonight](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGP4yAQhX8N7mIxBAenoLjGXa690gIztsmNIYJJnPz7lbfdcsv39PQ-6ft3G28uUkzLX7eh5fecx4R7JWTGMt6f6f-cc_AuFaxrLhju2VeXRiVVd5L9SZoxuEifUTfBehmu0KAF0-nuonXfNatFIw34qfdw0ZMLQaFzMAMYracZnG6iPc5kLw2ABLi2M6D3MBmF534CKYWWGCLn0vKKjG9XZ_rkF5Z2yltDdmV-VHH-I9Qg1LDve0uRmZDQLU9sc1mOOhcKp4olYhVqOJBCDXfy-xE5P0tyGyauP7dNseGxR6JYL0ZouWwu0jebf2fsZdVXAAAA__9P4IF8) in the Junior League World Series quarterfinals, with a trip to the U.S. Championship on the line.

What’s more shocking? [**_This unusual method_**](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAYhJ8Gb7F-MMT2wBC18tRUqjp0RGB-YhJsIsBx8vaV-wrdTrrTfdL3c1Zn7YNfLp96RlmeLqoFtxywFEzqui43F6M1ekmYp5jQXqPJelEMmDhAd4BWWe3DS_HKSgO2pxVK2goujpx3oppk79yRCwoajUFE4XrBES21HR1HrbvKy_0MOmgpBUr72lE0ho4tw6YbKQDhgNaXmOoyYcGnzi684gNTPca5CnIq5Z5JcyJsIGzYtq3WJjAo6bYPCBvYx9dbs3fnjjXfeyDNkOOaRlTekubdhXnNxaKF9rRemDhVSdr75kPw-dgSDpdZ-_CHK_-T9JDsNwAA__8GSnq4) has been shown to be up to 10 times more effective than retinol—without any of the harsh side effects like redness, irritation, or dryness. **➤ Fort Worth:** The city council voted 7-4 Tuesday night to suspend its Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) programs, despite testimony from dozens of residents who objected to the move. Proponents of the measure argued that it would ensure the city remained eligible for up to $277 million in federal funding. clean_body: Texas has received a waiver from the U.S. Department of Agriculture to disallow the purchase of candy and sweetened drinks using SNAP benefits, or food stamps. Five other states , bringing the total to 12 states that now ban SNAP purchases of junk food. | | | | | | Thursday, August 7, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1935, a strike by Dallas dressmakers when picketers entered two local factories and stripped the clothing from 10 female employees. The ensuing melee was covered by the New York Times and papers in Italy and Australia. The State Fair of Texas announced the for this year's Big Tex Choice Awards, including those for a new drink category. Let us know which ones you'd like to try! 📬 Heads up: You’ll get a special note later today from our sponsor, , offering a chance to invest in their fry-cooking robot, Flippy. Inbox watch: on. Today's sponsor is . Fight aging and improve your appearance with their health advice in today's edition. Abilene ☀️ 102/75° | Amarillo 🌤️ 102/74° | Austin ☀️ 98/74° | Brownsville 🌤️ 96/79° | Corpus Christi 🌤️ 95/78° | DFW ☀️ 98/76° | El Paso ☀️ 104/75° | Houston ⛅ 94/78° | Laredo 🌤️ 104/78° | Lubbock ⛅ 101/75° | Midland ☀️ 100/74° | San Antonio ☀️ 100/76° | Tyler ☀️ 97/74° | Waco ☀️ 97/75° Don’t feel like reading the national edition of The Flyover? Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | - | AG Probing Group Funding Absent Democrats Attorney General Ken Paxton has into former El Paso congressman Beto O’Rourke’s Powered by People PAC for “.” O’Rourke’s organization has reportedly picked up much of the tab for the absent Democrats’ expenses. Paxton also insisted Abbott didn’t have the authority to remove Texas House Democratic Chair Gene Wu from office for leaving the state. Abbott in a public letter, arguing Paxton was mistaken. For its part, the Texas Supreme Court ordered Wu to file a by Friday. “ Denying the governor a quorum was not an abandonment of my office; it was a fulfillment of my oath ,” . Meanwhile, nine of 11 Texas Senate Democrats were absent from the Capitol yesterday—not enough to break quorum—after , where they were joined by several of their colleagues in the House. Texas Banning SNAP Purchases of Junk Food Texas has received a waiver from the U.S. Department of Agriculture to disallow the purchase of candy and sweetened drinks using SNAP benefits, or food stamps. Five other states , bringing the total to 12 states that now ban SNAP purchases of junk food. “ The new SNAP guidelines will ensure taxpayer dollars are used to purchase foods that provide real nutritional value ,” in a Tuesday announcement. Around 3.5 million low-income Texans receive SNAP benefits via the Lone Star Card. FDA Commissioner Marty Makary said the objective is to get all 50 states to as part of the Trump administration’s Make America Healthy Again initiative. Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has argued sugary and processed foods “fuel America’s diabetes and chronic disease epidemics.” The state will to implement the restrictions, which go into effect next April. Texas Team Headed to Little League World Series A youth baseball team from Richmond is heading to the Little League World Series, which starts next Tuesday in Williamsport, Pennsylvania. It’s the fourth year in a row that a has qualified for the two-week tournament. Representing the Southwest Region, Lamar Little League won the regional championship in Waco on Tuesday, defeating the top team from Louisiana 5-2. Lamar lost to Louisiana but bounced back with wins over Oklahoma and Midway Little League from Hewitt, representing Texas West. Since the first tournament in 1947, teams from Texas have —in 1950 and 1966. Lamar qualified for the tournament in 2003 and 2004. Last year, a team from Boerne in the U.S. Championship. A 16-and-under team from Victoria represented the Southwest Region in the recently concluded Senior League World Series in South Carolina, but was eliminated . A 14-and-under team from Needville in the Junior League World Series quarterfinals, with a trip to the U.S. Championship on the line. | Flying together with our sponsor Scientists at University College Cork have validated a surprising that’s transforming how women fight signs of aging—without creams or invasive treatments. In a study involving 674 women with deep wrinkles, sagging skin, and dark spots, researchers found that using this simple technique in front of the mirror each day led to dramatic improvements in appearance within just a few weeks. What’s more shocking? has been shown to be up to 10 times more effective than retinol—without any of the harsh side effects like redness, irritation, or dryness. It’s fast, painless, and surprisingly easy to do at home. Thousands of women are already using it to look 10, 15, or even 20 years younger—and the results speak for themselves. Watch the short video below to discover exactly how this method works—and why so many scientists and skincare experts are calling it the future of anti-aging. ! | ➤ Fort Worth: The city council voted 7-4 Tuesday night to suspend its Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) programs, despite testimony from dozens of residents who objected to the move. Proponents of the measure argued that it would ensure the city remained eligible for up to $277 million in federal funding. () ➤ Waco: Protesters gathered outside the downtown Federal Building on Tuesday, calling for the release of Mexican national Noe Guerrero, who was by ICE during an immigration arrest. () ➤ Houston: The FBI rolled out its first-ever Houston Most Wanted fugitives list on Tuesday. One of the fugitives was arrested less than two hours later. () ➤ Keller: The city council unanimously approved a 287(g) partnership with ICE during a packed meeting Tuesday night, allowing jailers to check the immigration status of detainees when they are booked. A requires sheriffs in counties with more than 100,000 residents to join the program. Keller is the largest city in Texas to do so. () ➤ Lago Vista: Construction crews are making progress on a new bridge spanning Cow Creek on RM 1431. The old bridge was wiped out during last month's flash floods, forcing drivers between Marble Falls and Lago Vista to take a 40-mile detour. () ➤ Amarillo: Claims related to last year's Smokehouse Creek Fire, which burned over 1 million acres, have reached nearly $300 million, according to a report from Xcel Energy. The Texas A&M Forest Service concluded the fire was ignited when the company's power lines fell. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: The GOP thinks they can ignore us
body:
It has to be America First, No Compromises!

| | | | |
---
Friend, this makes me sad to say, but I have to tell you the truth.****
****
******The Republican Party is turning its back on YOU - on US!**
They’re ignoring the America First movement that President Trump and I have fought for tooth and nail. It’s clear as day that the GOP has lost its spine, and I’m done with their weak, sellout ways.

It’s the GOP that keeps sending BILLIONS to foreign countries while OUR families are crushed by inflation. All while they’re dragging their feet on slashing government waste through DOGE, tackling our $34 TRILLION debt, and exposing the truth in the Epstein files.****
**The GOP might be leaving me, but I’ll never leave YOU. Together, we can take back our party and our country.**
I’m not here to play nice with the DC swamp. I’m here to FIGHT for YOU. But I need your help to keep the heat on these spineless RINOs.
**_[Will you stand with me and chip in $25, $50, $100, or even $250 right now to send a message](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aWBz/?__vbtrk=MzA5MzQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA5MzQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_?**
[STAND WITH MTG](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aWBz/?__vbtrk=MzA5MzQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA5MzQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
I’m loyal to President Trump and his America First vision, but the GOP establishment is trying to sabotage us. They don’t get it - YOU do. Your donation today fuels our battle to stop foreign aid, cut bloated budgets, fix the economy, and demand transparency.**__**
**_[Patriot, let’s show the good ole boys in the Uniparty that we’re not backing down](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aWBz/?__vbtrk=MzA5MzQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA5MzQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_!**
_Your fellow patriot,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aWBz/?__vbtrk=MzA5MzQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA5MzQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aWBz/?__vbtrk=MzA5MzQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA5MzQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**_[P.S. The GOP thinks they can ignore us. Let’s prove them wrong. Chip in $25 or more today and let’s MAKE AMERICA FIRST AGAIN](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aWBz/?__vbtrk=MzA5MzQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA5MzQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**

### **_[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aWBB/?__vbtrk=MzA5MzQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA5MzQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**
| [Unsubscribe](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=309343&trkid=831031433&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

subject: Everything is bigger in Texas, but this is bigger than Texas.

Peter ,
What’s happening in Texas isn’t just about five congressional seats.
It’s about whether Trump and Greg Abbott can jail their political opponents and get away with it. It’s about whether Republicans can launch a nationwide gerrymandering assault on democracy and silence anyone who fights back.
Texas House Democrats are putting everything on the line.
They’ve broken quorum to stop Trump’s plan to steal House seats. Now they’re risking arrest, facing $500-a-day fines, and being smeared in GOP attack ads. Why? Because they’re doing their jobs. Because they’re honoring their oaths. Because they’re the fighters we’ve been waiting for.
And they can’t do it alone.
GOTV PAC is planning to launch rapid-response ads, texts, and phone banks to tell voters the truth before it’s too late, but we need your help to fund it fast. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08042025&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Convicted criminals like disgraced former congressman George Santos are prepping for pardons. Ghislaine Maxwell is getting cushy treatment in Texas. Meanwhile, Texas Democrats doing their jobs are being treated like fugitives.
We’re at the breaking point. And if they get away with it in Texas, they’ll try it everywhere.
This is bigger than redistricting. This is a test: will we stand with those who fight back, or let them stand alone? Donate now to show your support >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08042025&amount=25]

Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

body:

|
## **Criminal Clown Show**
---
---
| [](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=689495f48b20bd3cc392d598&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.thekaramoreport.com%2Fshows%2Fmpzpzdk3n05vud3kwj6qw567zw2vme-8patg-p8wan-fw4sp-lhkxr-2hew5-sftbb-nfhhf-b33w3-mtm8d-yfclw-elwgt-kphk8%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D68945c8bbbd1be6801d42dd4%26ss_email_id%3D689495f48b20bd3cc392d598%26ss_campaign_name%3DThe%2BCriminal%2BClown%2BShow%2BContinues%25E2%2580%25A6%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-08-07T12%253A03%253A20Z&w=65f0e736d50a2765a4caf2af&c=b_68945c8bbbd1be6801d42dd4&l=en-US&s=30-oC4WK4rirQBOJ6arVcoYcMhQ%3D)

### [**Click Image to Watch Episode!**](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=689495f48b20bd3cc392d598&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.thekaramoreport.com%2Fshows%2Fmpzpzdk3n05vud3kwj6qw567zw2vme-8patg-p8wan-fw4sp-lhkxr-2hew5-sftbb-nfhhf-b33w3-mtm8d-yfclw-elwgt-kphk8%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D68945c8bbbd1be6801d42dd4%26ss_email_id%3D689495f48b20bd3cc392d598%26ss_campaign_name%3DThe%2BCriminal%2BClown%2BShow%2BContinues%25E2%2580%25A6%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-08-07T12%253A03%253A20Z&w=65f0e736d50a2765a4caf2af&c=b_68945c8bbbd1be6801d42dd4&l=en-US&s=30-oC4WK4rirQBOJ6arVcoYcMhQ%3D)
---
---
Ask yourself, why are you involved in politics? Is it for camaraderie or entertainment? Or to save our nation? Many feel disillusioned, unsure about where our state and country will be in five or ten years. If we are to save our children’s future, we must secure our elections; otherwise, we simply have selections, and our political activity is futile.In this episode of the Karamo Report, I interviewed former Michigan State Senator Pat Colbeck, and we discussed how the smoke and mirrors election system continues to be a threat to national survival. These crimes and cover-up are flagrantly and arrogantly carried out, as though these government gangsters KNOW they will never be held accountable.This conspiracy to defraud the American people of Constitutional political representation and usher in globalist tyranny in America requires removing people with a schizophrenic relationship with the Constitution from office, or electing a Constitutionalist. The evidence of systemic election corruption at the county, state, and federal levels is not only overwhelming, but the level of precision and coordination suggests a vast criminal conspiracy that operates in secret, that has infiltrated every level of government and other influential institutions. If we are going to effectively implement strategy and tactics to save our nation and our children, we must have accurate situational awareness regarding the threat we are up against.Be sure to share this episode with your family and friends!To keep up to date with Pat’s work, follow him on X:https://x.com/pjcolbeckBe sure to visit [www.thekaramoreport.com](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=689495f48b20bd3cc392d598&u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.thekaramoreport.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D685cf1f68103a672b80be764%26ss_email_id%3D685d37a2e854b420e08ef975%26ss_campaign_name%3DAI%2Band%2Bthe%2BComing%2BYouth%2BRevival%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-06-26T12%253A06%253A03Z&w=65f0e736d50a2765a4caf2af&c=b_68945c8bbbd1be6801d42dd4&l=en-US&s=mDdXEKdDMMHzqLjAGcM7PjBxYHc%3D) to stay informed and share the content we create to support this project, disseminating critical information that equips people to save our nation and secure our children’s future. Friend,
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.

The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._
---
Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn.
---
Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under _booking # 2313757_.

_...Or so I thought!_

**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust.

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Reaching out as a man without options
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
This is the situation I’m caught in:

This is the situation I’m caught in:
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1fphp0r1cdosg7c3j6infputubq41n3hl77bmb8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clgeap36cph2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._
---
Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn.
---
Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under _booking # 2313757_.
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zb2fcdkcsb2hr8v3vks66h2tesq571lgr6m3b97o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clgeap36cph2bs)
__
---

But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could **_at least defend myself_** from the Left’s bogus charges...
---
_...Or so I thought!_
---
**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z595och3g6gr8q8v5rivnfh9dn3ckmbt3nl63udo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clgeap36cph2bs)

body:
Trump will do ANYTHING to stop Americans from knowing the truth about his MAGA lies.
| Trump is threatening _any_ news organization that is willing to speak truth to his MAGA lies — [**_so now we need emergency assistance to save PBS »_**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-pbs/?source=VPP_20250807_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=20819%2E878179%2ErzXwup) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-pbs/?source=VPP_20250807_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20819%2E878179%2ErzXwup) **Folks, we know Trump will do ANYTHING to stop Americans from knowing the truth about his ILLEGAL overhaul of our government.**

_That’s why he’s wasting HIS time and OUR taxpayer dollars to go after PBS!_

[**Team, we still need 100 signatures from your state to reach conclusive data: Will you add your name to STAND WITH PBS? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-pbs/?source=VPP_20250807_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20819%2E878179%2ErzXwup) | [25,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: STAND WITH PBS »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-pbs/?source=VPP_20250807_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=20819%2E878179%2ErzXwup)
---
Folks, it’s absolutely CRITICAL that Democrats are willing to stand with PBS in the face of ESCALATING MAGA attacks. **This fight is only going to get worse.**

_That’s why we’re calling on you to sign our urgent petition standing with PBS:_

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf8153961-1067-4bd3-af29-2aa7f1cb930b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
