name: Andy Ngo
subject: Hold Antifa Accountable
body:
I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs

| |
---
| |
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkj5i1um5f32n3ms38pnj5rt2aj0e2p0rbvtfg8o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clge6p72c3h2bs)
---
My fellow concerned American, I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs.And unless we do something to stop them today, I won’t be the last. **[I’m asking you to donate $35 or more today to help me bring Antifa and its members who assaulted me to justice.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuqb43im8288h1o13m1t2qtb7ef70h1b11a146jo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clge6p72c3h2bs) ****I was at Antifa's "ground zero" in Portland, Oregon during the summer of 2019.** This was before most Americans had ever heard of the Antifa movement, but they'd caused havoc and violence before.I went to an Antifa "protest" as a journalist to document and report on their “protest.”As soon as I arrived, I feared for my safety.The mob was angry, and violence always follows Antifa. Most of them wore masks to prevent being identified when they commit crimes. Many had on helmets and carried riot gear. Some, I later learned, secretly had weapons like baseball bats, brass knuckles and even bricks.I was scared, but I had a job to do, so I pressed on.**People like you needed to know what was happening.** But I didn't go unnoticed for long.Somebody recognized me and bashed me on the back of my head in an ambush."F*** you, Andy Ngo!" shouted voices around me. "Go home, fascist!"**Fists started flying at my face and head. Then came the projectiles.** Before I knew it, I was being repeatedly punched, kicked, and hit with objects.I tried to protect my head. I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger.The thugs robbed me of my camera so that I wouldn’t have evidence of the assault. What they did to me is unacceptable and criminal. And now they're trying to do the same to other innocent Americans like you.That's why I sued members of the Rose City Antifa organization to bring them to justice and send the loud clear message that they are NOT above the law.Now I need your help to hold their feet to the fire and make sure justice is served. [**Will you donate $35 or more to help me hold Antifa accountable?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsvsfgk99dbvm8m79ev13f8vgvi9jb4s3ushncr8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clge6p72c3h2bs) This is bigger than me alone. After I got away from the mob, police finally showed up when I was in the hospital. But my attackers stole my evidence and nearly silenced me permanently with a traumatic brain injury.Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured part of the attack, clear as day.I hoped I'd get the justice I deserved.Wrong.To this day, six years later, the Portland Police have done nothing.**No charges. No arrests. No suspects questioned.** It's not much of a surprise, though.Radical politicians have long since bowed to the dangerous left-wing mobs that terrorize their streets. That’s why the Center for American Liberty helped me file a lawsuit against my attackers. A judge ordered three of them to pay damages – but more than a year later and they have not paid a dime.So now the Center for American Liberty is helping me track them down and make them pay for nearly killing me and trampling upon the First Amendment.Unfortunately it’s going to cost at least $20,000 to get justice.[**That's why I hope you'll join the fight by donating $35 or more to fund my efforts to hold Antifa and its members accountable.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqkbmrgg20jk1bptr20lp4dip18m40rvul0lt6gg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clge6p72c3h2bs) We have to stop Antifa and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family.Antifa wants the literal end of America -- and they'll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that's not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse – open violent anarchists who want to tear down civilization and remake it in their own twisted vision with no law and order.By any means necessary.**_Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem._** And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. They did that with BLM. They’re doing it now against ICE.It's a sick strategy, but very smart – because so far, they've been successful.**For the most part, they've gotten off scot-free.** Our politicians and media are treating this terrorist group like peaceful protestors!As we saw in Los Angeles earlier this summer, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continue to escape consequences.**So now I'm taking justice into my own hands – with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty.**

[**You can be a part of bringing Antifa to justice with a donation of $35 or more today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh9c7mq06qe0kimgn4j7mhrmkh0eb35q5u5ddob8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clge6p72c3h2bs) Though I'm seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger.This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won't.This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe.And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver.By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. **[Can I count on you to donate $35 or more to help me get justice from Antifa?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zls5blas994k8tqbbr768j5almpacd3312t8u6s0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clge6p72c3h2bs) **Please don't wait – if we don't fight back and win now, **these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America** , destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zub70bv1kg3d1qv2r2emgnjtmqa79dbsieri4i8g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clge6p72c3h2bs)
---
**Andy Ngo**
---
|
---
| | P.S. I know firsthand that America's troubles with Antifa aren't over -- **they're just beginning**. Just look at what happened in Los Angeles earlier this summer. Today, we can make them face the consequences that left-wing politicians refuse to dole out. [**Please donate as generously as you can right away.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqh0anknq66c8jl1dbfvag4ucpfd3tdls82m8ldo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clge6p72c3h2bs)
---
[ **DONATE** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z39qbhrmq85jacii4gdbbr8qmgcvu1e2d1s1el48_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clge6p72c3h2bs)
---
| | |
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc06ru5cb3or4uqh1jcgf5apm2c5jjgjdbr3ma70_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clge6p72c3h2bs)

name: DNC Community Engagement
subject: DNC Announces Initial Seven-Figure Investment Into NJ Coordinated Campaign
body:
| | | | | |
---
|
---
|
# DNC Announces Initial Seven-Figure Investment Into NJ Coordinated Campaign To Help NJ Democrats Win Up and Down the Ballot This November and Next
---
| | | _Democrats continue to turbocharge ‘Organizing Summer’ with an initial $1.5 million investment in New Jersey ahead of high-stakes elections this fall._
---
| | | As New Jersey Democrats like Congresswoman and gubernatorial nominee Mikie Sherrill fight for New Jersey residents ahead of critical November elections, the DNC has their back with a new, seven-figure investment into the New Jersey Democratic Coordinated Campaign.

New Jersey residents are already feeling the impacts of Donald Trump’s chaotic administration on their health care and their wallets, and New Jersey Democrats’ victory in the upcoming November elections will offer a powerful rebuke of Trump and Republicans’ dangerous policies.

This initial $1.5 million investment into the New Jersey Democratic Coordinated Campaign is one of the largest and earliest initial investments the DNC has ever made to the New Jersey Democratic Coordinated Campaign in an off-year election cycle.

This investment will:
* Help the New Jersey coordinated campaign to continue to hire regional directors, organizers, and other key staff in order to talk to voters across the state
* Fund voter contact efforts in the field
* Test new tactics and tools to ensure our message is resonating with voters across the state
* Expand our reach to key constituencies that we lost ground with in the November 2024 elections — such as Black, Latino, and AANHPI voters who make up a large share of New Jersey’s population

_**DNC Chair Ken Martin released the following statement:**_
“Six months into his second term, Donald Trump has given New Jersey families higher costs, fewer job opportunities, and has gone after their health care and food assistance — but this November, we’re going to give Republicans a lesson in consequences. Republicans, like Jack Ciattarelli, are all too happy to betray the families they represent to further the agenda of Trump and his billionaire friends. New Jerseyans deserve Democratic leaders who will fight back against Trump’s chaos and cruelty while delivering better days for their families. Through the tireless work of the New Jersey Democratic Coordinated Campaign, we’ll get it done. The DNC is proud to support through this investment Congresswoman Mikie Sherrill and New Jersey Democrats up and down the ballot. Folks across the Garden State can count on the DNC’s support to ensure working families have champions in the governor’s mansion and legislature in 2026 and beyond.”
_**New Jersey Democratic Party Chair LeRoy J. Jones, Jr. issued the following statement:**_
“With all eyes on New Jersey as Mikie Sherrill takes on Trump-lackey Jack Ciattarelli, we are thankful for the DNC investment in our state ahead of the November election. New Jersey deserves a governor like Mikie who will fight to lower costs, protect our health care, and stand up to Donald Trump. Today’s investment from the DNC will support the personnel and campaign tactics that will help send Ciattarelli packing and elect big majorities in the state house this fall.”
---
| ###

name: Scott Presler - Early Vote Action
subject: Voter Registration Sponsors Needed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Early Vote Action PAC](https://link
body:
We are making massive gains
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e5717939/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvTUszOUJYd3RDcg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDc/LbmNsRFpRU3I3TQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNuekJTS01OY3hieWVscw/gaJSq1A/s9g2e9d2252)

Dear Patriot,
It’s Scott Presler, writing to you from the front lines of Pennsylvania and New Jersey, where my team at Early Vote Action is rewriting the political map.
Thanks to our voter registration staff, we’ve slashed Pennsylvania’s Democratic voter lead by over 300,000 since 2020, flipping counties like Bucks and Luzerne red for President Trump in 2024. In New Jersey, we’ve cut the Dems’ advantage from over 1 million to just 834,000 - and we’re not stopping there.
**_But here’s the deal: our voter registration staff - real patriots hitting gun shows, farmers’ markets, and VFW halls - are running on fumes._**
Democrats are fighting back, pouring money into their machine to hold their ground. To keep registering new Republicans for New Jersey’s 2025 gubernatorial race and Pennsylvania’s 2026 elections,**_[we need your help to fund our staff](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e5717939/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9lYXJseS12b3RlL2V2YV9kb25fb21fZXJfc3AtdnJzX3JzXzIwMjUwODA1Lw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDc/LbmNsRFpRU3I3TQ/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjExNTNfd3Ix/gaJSq1A/sfh01be43b1)_.**
**Can you sponsor a voter registration staffer today?**
Just $15 covers an hour of their work - knocking doors, signing up truckers, veterans, and hunters to secure a red wave. Every new voter we register is a step toward flipping these states for good.

[SPONSOR A VOTER REGISTRATION STAFFER](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e5717939/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9lYXJseS12b3RlL2V2YV9kb25fb21fZXJfc3AtdnJzX3JzXzIwMjUwODA1Lw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDc/LbmNsRFpRU3I3TQ/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjExNTNfd3Ix/gaJSq1A/sfh01be43b1)
We’re not just talking about change - we’re making it happen.
In Pennsylvania, we flipped Bucks County from a 15,000-voter Democratic lead to a 2,000-voter Republican edge.
In New Jersey, we’ve added 145,611 new GOP voters since 2021.
Patriot, your support keeps this momentum alive.
Let’s make Pennsylvania the next Ohio and turn New Jersey purple in 2025. **_[If we have enough staffers, and sponsors, we can change the electorate for a generation](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e5717939/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9lYXJseS12b3RlL2V2YV9kb25fb21fZXJfc3AtdnJzX3JzXzIwMjUwODA1Lw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDc/LbmNsRFpRU3I3TQ/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjExNTNfd3Ix/gaJSq1A/sfh01be43b1)_.**

I’d be honored to have your support,

**Scott Presler** Founder, Early Vote Action

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e5717939/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9lYXJseS12b3RlL2V2YV9kb25fb21fZXJfc3AtdnJzX3JzXzIwMjUwODA1Lw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDc/LbmNsRFpRU3I3TQ/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjExNTNfd3Ix/gaJSq1A/sfh01be43b1)

name: Andy Ngo
subject: Help me bring Antifa to justice
body:
I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs

| |
---
| |
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbcncem4n5nkjuglnu2vfbfaj8mqe4t1lrki1b3o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clgeeo74cph2bs)
---
My fellow concerned American, I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs.And unless we do something to stop them today, I won’t be the last. **[I’m asking you to donate $35 or more today to help me bring Antifa and its members who assaulted me to justice.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp9gb5qtp56sgofj8u8o9obmhl3p87dj6fdpd82g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clgeeo74cph2bs) ****I was at Antifa's "ground zero" in Portland, Oregon during the summer of 2019.** This was before most Americans had ever heard of the Antifa movement, but they'd caused havoc and violence before.I went to an Antifa "protest" as a journalist to document and report on their “protest.”As soon as I arrived, I feared for my safety.The mob was angry, and violence always follows Antifa. Most of them wore masks to prevent being identified when they commit crimes. Many had on helmets and carried riot gear. Some, I later learned, secretly had weapons like baseball bats, brass knuckles and even bricks.I was scared, but I had a job to do, so I pressed on.**People like you needed to know what was happening.** But I didn't go unnoticed for long.Somebody recognized me and bashed me on the back of my head in an ambush."F*** you, Andy Ngo!" shouted voices around me. "Go home, fascist!"**Fists started flying at my face and head. Then came the projectiles.** Before I knew it, I was being repeatedly punched, kicked, and hit with objects.I tried to protect my head. I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger.The thugs robbed me of my camera so that I wouldn’t have evidence of the assault. What they did to me is unacceptable and criminal. And now they're trying to do the same to other innocent Americans like you.That's why I sued members of the Rose City Antifa organization to bring them to justice and send the loud clear message that they are NOT above the law.Now I need your help to hold their feet to the fire and make sure justice is served. [**Will you donate $35 or more to help me hold Antifa accountable?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zod8bak2uq6akg0o6mtnbs3beptj7nipdab9vvj0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clgeeo74cph2bs) This is bigger than me alone. After I got away from the mob, police finally showed up when I was in the hospital. But my attackers stole my evidence and nearly silenced me permanently with a traumatic brain injury.Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured part of the attack, clear as day.I hoped I'd get the justice I deserved.Wrong.To this day, six years later, the Portland Police have done nothing.**No charges. No arrests. No suspects questioned.** It's not much of a surprise, though.Radical politicians have long since bowed to the dangerous left-wing mobs that terrorize their streets. That’s why the Center for American Liberty helped me file a lawsuit against my attackers. A judge ordered three of them to pay damages – but more than a year later and they have not paid a dime.So now the Center for American Liberty is helping me track them down and make them pay for nearly killing me and trampling upon the First Amendment.Unfortunately it’s going to cost at least $20,000 to get justice.[**That's why I hope you'll join the fight by donating $35 or more to fund my efforts to hold Antifa and its members accountable.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zium8ee2h0acta9v7cetv0vtaqn5jac01o16tvv8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clgeeo74cph2bs) We have to stop Antifa and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family.Antifa wants the literal end of America -- and they'll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that's not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse – open violent anarchists who want to tear down civilization and remake it in their own twisted vision with no law and order.By any means necessary.**_Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem._** And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. They did that with BLM. They’re doing it now against ICE.It's a sick strategy, but very smart – because so far, they've been successful.**For the most part, they've gotten off scot-free.** Our politicians and media are treating this terrorist group like peaceful protestors!As we saw in Los Angeles earlier this summer, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continue to escape consequences.**So now I'm taking justice into my own hands – with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty.**

[**You can be a part of bringing Antifa to justice with a donation of $35 or more today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfgn74gv90esf6t2vltlkkffa5acbn8neucl41t8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clgeeo74cph2bs) Though I'm seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger.This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won't.This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe.And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver.By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. **[Can I count on you to donate $35 or more to help me get justice from Antifa?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze3vgbs7c6hjmbhd57mjjuspmif2l7sbfg82nqgo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clgeeo74cph2bs) **Please don't wait – if we don't fight back and win now, **these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America** , destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo1m655jhremgdoosu161usn3l34012mg9btvl3g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clgeeo74cph2bs)
---
**Andy Ngo**
---
|
---
| | P.S. I know firsthand that America's troubles with Antifa aren't over -- **they're just beginning**. Just look at what happened in Los Angeles earlier this summer. Today, we can make them face the consequences that left-wing politicians refuse to dole out. [**Please donate as generously as you can right away.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjph82mdfki3mhe6etkmvfejlh8o502ajvcvufko_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clgeeo74cph2bs)
---
[ **DONATE** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4slpfh49u3hl0qa8me4ag7tjnf3au8gm414rbg8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clgeeo74cph2bs)
---
| | |
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8v9j66ufieqrfg2n7gv49ojpberl65l103shmu8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clgeeo74cph2bs)
---

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Did you see this article in the Washington Post?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Derek, the Washington Post has an article out that details some of the work I’m doing in the Senate to fight back against Trump’s agenda.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/nUZuXEaC_EisRMTjMM4UuA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/nUZuXEaC_EisRMTjMM4UuA2]
There’s a law from 1961 called the Foreign Assistance Act. It established USAID, shaped much of our country’s foreign aid programs, and it also includes a measure that allows a single senator to force votes that require the State Department to produce reports on human rights.
I’m using that law to force votes on the conditions in six countries that the Trump Administration is deporting migrants to: Costa Rica, Eswatini, Mexico, Panama, Rwanda, and South Sudan.
I want to see reports on human rights abuses, due process violations, the conditions in detention centers and prisons, and human trafficking — and I also want to know the details of any agreements or arrangements Trump made with these countries.
The American public deserves to know these things.
Trump is using taxpayer dollars to send people to random countries — not their home countries from which they came — and we owe it to the American people to conduct meaningful congressional oversight here.
The American public also deserves to know if their U.S. Senator is voting *against* such reports and transparency.
This isn’t the first time I’ve pushed my colleagues to go on the record on Trump’s agenda. I’ve forced votes on Trump’s idiotic tariffs, to block the President from striking Iran without congressional authorization, and to repeal his fake “national energy emergency.”
We won’t win every vote — or even most of them. But voters deserve to know where their elected officials stand on these issues. If a member of Congress is going to stand up and say, “I’m not interested in knowing about the use of taxpayer dollars to send people to random countries” ... well, that’s important information for people to have.
This won’t be the last time I force votes, either. I am committed to pulling every single lever and using every single legislative tool I can find to push back on this lawless and reckless Administration and to get my GOP colleagues on the record.
If you’re with me and you want to see this fight continue, will you let me know by adding your name? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/nUZuXEaC_EisRMTjMM4UuA2]
SIGN ON [https://secure.ngpvan.com/nUZuXEaC_EisRMTjMM4UuA2]
Thanks for reading and for staying up to date with our work.
-Tim Kaine

clean_body: [] Derek, the Washington Post has an article out that details some of the work I’m doing in the Senate to fight back against Trump’s agenda. [] There’s a law from 1961 called the Foreign Assistance Act. It established USAID, shaped much of our country’s foreign aid programs, and it also includes a measure that allows a single senator to force votes that require the State Department to produce reports on human rights. I’m using that law to force votes on the conditions in six countries that the Trump Administration is deporting migrants to: Costa Rica, Eswatini, Mexico, Panama, Rwanda, and South Sudan. I want to see reports on human rights abuses, due process violations, the conditions in detention centers and prisons, and human trafficking — and I also want to know the details of any agreements or arrangements Trump made with these countries. The American public deserves to know these things. Trump is using taxpayer dollars to send people to random countries — not their home countries from which they came — and we owe it to the American people to conduct meaningful congressional oversight here. The American public also deserves to know if their U.S. Senator is voting against such reports and transparency. This isn’t the first time I’ve pushed my colleagues to go on the record on Trump’s agenda. I’ve forced votes on Trump’s idiotic tariffs, to block the President from striking Iran without congressional authorization, and to repeal his fake “national energy emergency.” We won’t win every vote — or even most of them. But voters deserve to know where their elected officials stand on these issues. If a member of Congress is going to stand up and say, “I’m not interested in knowing about the use of taxpayer dollars to send people to random countries” ... well, that’s important information for people to have. This won’t be the last time I force votes, either. I am committed to pulling every single lever and using every single legislative tool I can find to push back on this lawless and reckless Administration and to get my GOP colleagues on the record. If you’re with me and you want to see this fight continue, will you let me know by adding your name? [] SIGN ON [] Thanks for reading and for staying up to date with our work. -Tim Kaine [] CONTRIBUTE [] Paid for by Kaine for Virginia 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272 Williamsburg, VA 23185 Emails like this one are a critical part of staying in touch during this important election year. # _Opinion:_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/109e814e-8899-48e0-b08a-38fd91e3840a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_**By Marion Mass**_
Since 2022, there have been no less than five Congressional hearings and a **[critical executive order from President Trump targeting the drug industry middlemen](https://substack.com/redirect/521da93d-1625-489a-8c2a-5b5817d7827e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that rip off American patients - Pharmacy Benefit Managers (PBMs).
These middlemen deserve the scrutiny. Between overcharging patients and steering patients away from independent pharmacies, they have created an anti-competitive environment responsible for higher prices and reduced access.
The three biggest PBMs, CVS Caremark, Optum Rx, and Express Scripts, **[control an astounding 80% of the prescriptions Americans take](https://substack.com/redirect/08de3f94-bc42-47d8-8c9b-c13b0cf43e41?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).** Beyond this horizontal integration, each of those PBMs is integrated with a big insurer that can prescribe, Aetna, United, and Cigna, respectively. Each PBM also operates a lucrative pharmacy. With this level of control over every stage of a healthcare plan, it's no surprise these companies can pull many levers that harm patients clinically and financially, while lining their own pockets behind the scenes.
While 20 states passed PBM reform in 2024 to keep these companies in check, few have hit as hard at PBM anti-competitive practices as a pair of Republican governors.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below):**
* * *
**[Together with Goldco](https://substack.com/redirect/4710d976-1f26-4254-bff5-b84bf72bf99b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[The $18,000 House You Missed](https://substack.com/redirect/4710d976-1f26-4254-bff5-b84bf72bf99b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4710d976-1f26-4254-bff5-b84bf72bf99b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Pop quiz:**
It's 1970. You have $18,000 in gold coins.
Option A: Sell the coins, buy the house ($18,000 price tag)
Option B: Keep the 500 gold coins
Most people pick the house.
Smart move, right?
**Dead wrong.**
Fast-forward to 1980. That house now costs $47,000. But those 500 gold coins?
**You only need 77 of them to buy that house.**
You pocket the other 423 coins. Today, those leftover coins are worth nearly $1.4 million.
While your neighbors are still paying mortgages, you're sitting on a goldmine. But now there's something _new_ that could boom the price like 50 years ago...
**[Get the full story[here ](https://substack.com/redirect/4710d976-1f26-4254-bff5-b84bf72bf99b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)->]**
[Read FullStory](https://substack.com/redirect/4710d976-1f26-4254-bff5-b84bf72bf99b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Continued)**
In Arkansas, Governor Sarah Huckabee Sanders **[signed a first of its kind law](https://substack.com/redirect/81e19691-d007-40c2-af0c-8c6b4f1d9417?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **preventing PBM from owning pharmacies. Policymakers haven't done this level of trust-busting since the days of Ma Bell. PBMs have embraced lawfare to protect their monopolistic scheme. They found a federal district court judge to play ball and temporarily block reform, but Huckabee Sanders is thankfully appealing the decision.
Governor Jeff Landry pushed hard for the same PBM measure in Louisiana's state legislature. Undeterred by his failure to get the measure through, he and his Attorney General have slapped PBM giant CVS Caremark and its subsidiaries with three lawsuits. **[One of the suits](https://substack.com/redirect/583cdb86-85d6-4165-a4c2-6ae513d758fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** involves text messages sent by CVS to its customers that effectively lobbied against the trust-busting measure - where the State of Louisiana alleges that CVS "allegedly misused health-related information of Louisiana citizens... for improper commercial or political gain."
These red-state governors are following President Trump's lead on PBMs because they know how deeply involved these organizations are in setting drug prices for their constituents. When a drug company sells their product, PBMs are responsible for negotiating "discounts" for medicines before sending them to pharmacies. These so-called "rebates" can be massive. But rarely do those rebates make their way to patients.
PBMs often reimburse independent pharmacies at a much lower price than what pharmacies charge patients in a practice called "spread pricing." **[An FTC report found](https://substack.com/redirect/24e614c8-89d6-4799-866c-17751cde80b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **that top PBMs CVS Health and Express Scripts recorded $1.4 billion in revenue thanks to this tactic alone.
These middlemen also steer patients away from lower-cost alternatives. Medications for simple conditions like allergies can have hundred-dollar price variations from name-brand to generic. But PBMs nearly always opt for the high-cost option. Even more, most pharmacy benefit managers direct patients to pharmacies owned and operated by the PBMs themselves - leaving independent pharmacies behind.
Once the mom-and-pop pharmacy has been squeezed dry, PBMs like CVS even **[have arms](https://substack.com/redirect/a839318f-a5aa-45ac-8703-b95e64bba247?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to acquire formerly independent businesses, effectively diverting money from the community and into corporate coffers.
All of these tactics - in addition to PBMs materially marking up the price of over 50 different specialty drugs - allowed companies like CVS to post record profits over the past five years. It seems that it's lucrative to shortchange patients without accountability from Washington or elsewhere.
But it's clear that with these new state policies, the governors of Arkansas and Louisiana have the PBM industry on the defensive. The Pharmaceutical Care Management Association, the lobbying group representing PBMs, **[are suing the Arkansas state government for their law](https://substack.com/redirect/f4055514-88ce-40cd-865d-c663253ad723?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , and the Louisiana lawsuits from Governor Landry are still ongoing.
Protecting the free market from disruptive industries like PBMs is a cornerstone of the Republican platform, and it's great to see leaders following through on that promise.
Yet this fight against drug middlemen has room to grow. Governor Landry encouraged lawmakers to take further steps to crack down on abusive PBM practices. Future measures ought to limit spread pricing and ensure drug discounts are passed on to the patients who need the drugs, not the middlemen that peddle them.
What has transpired in Arkansas and Louisiana should be a rallying cry to other state leaders and the constituents they swore to serve. Fighting against anti-competitive practices is the path to fiscal solvency in drug pricing.
* * *
_Marion Mass, M.D. is a Bucks County pediatrician and the co-founder of the Practicing Physicians of America._

clean_body: What has transpired in Arkansas and Louisiana should be a rallying cry to other state leaders and the constituents they swore to serve... | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? What has transpired in Arkansas and Louisiana should be a rallying cry to other state leaders and the constituents they swore to serve... | | | Aug 7 | | | | | | | | | | | | Opinion: | | ---|---|--- By Marion Mass Since 2022, there have been no less than five Congressional hearings and a that rip off American patients - Pharmacy Benefit Managers (PBMs). These middlemen deserve the scrutiny. Between overcharging patients and steering patients away from independent pharmacies, they have created an anti-competitive environment responsible for higher prices and reduced access. The three biggest PBMs, CVS Caremark, Optum Rx, and Express Scripts, . Beyond this horizontal integration, each of those PBMs is integrated with a big insurer that can prescribe, Aetna, United, and Cigna, respectively. Each PBM also operates a lucrative pharmacy. With this level of control over every stage of a healthcare plan, it's no surprise these companies can pull many levers that harm patients clinically and financially, while lining their own pockets behind the scenes. While 20 states passed PBM reform in 2024 to keep these companies in check, few have hit as hard at PBM anti-competitive practices as a pair of Republican governors. A message from our sponsor (piece continues below): | | ---|---|--- Pop quiz: It's 1970. You have $18,000 in gold coins. Option A: Sell the coins, buy the house ($18,000 price tag) Option B: Keep the 500 gold coins Most people pick the house. Smart move, right? Dead wrong. Fast-forward to 1980. That house now costs $47,000. But those 500 gold coins? You only need 77 of them to buy that house. You pocket the other 423 coins. Today, those leftover coins are worth nearly $1.4 million. While your neighbors are still paying mortgages, you're sitting on a goldmine. But now there's something new that could boom the price like 50 years ago... ->] (Continued) In Arkansas, Governor Sarah Huckabee Sanders preventing PBM from owning pharmacies. Policymakers haven't done this level of trust-busting since the days of Ma Bell. PBMs have embraced lawfare to protect their monopolistic scheme. They found a federal district court judge to play ball and temporarily block reform, but Huckabee Sanders is thankfully appealing the decision. Governor Jeff Landry pushed hard for the same PBM measure in Louisiana's state legislature. Undeterred by his failure to get the measure through, he and his Attorney General have slapped PBM giant CVS Caremark and its subsidiaries with three lawsuits. involves text messages sent by CVS to its customers that effectively lobbied against the trust-busting measure - where the State of Louisiana alleges that CVS "allegedly misused health-related information of Louisiana citizens... for improper commercial or political gain." These red-state governors are following President Trump's lead on PBMs because they know how deeply involved these organizations are in setting drug prices for their constituents. When a drug company sells their product, PBMs are responsible for negotiating "discounts" for medicines before sending them to pharmacies. These so-called "rebates" can be massive. But rarely do those rebates make their way to patients. PBMs often reimburse independent pharmacies at a much lower price than what pharmacies charge patients in a practice called "spread pricing." that top PBMs CVS Health and Express Scripts recorded $1.4 billion in revenue thanks to this tactic alone. These middlemen also steer patients away from lower-cost alternatives. Medications for simple conditions like allergies can have hundred-dollar price variations from name-brand to generic. But PBMs nearly always opt for the high-cost option. Even more, most pharmacy benefit managers direct patients to pharmacies owned and operated by the PBMs themselves - leaving independent pharmacies behind. Once the mom-and-pop pharmacy has been squeezed dry, PBMs like CVS even to acquire formerly independent businesses, effectively diverting money from the community and into corporate coffers. All of these tactics - in addition to PBMs materially marking up the price of over 50 different specialty drugs - allowed companies like CVS to post record profits over the past five years. It seems that it's lucrative to shortchange patients without accountability from Washington or elsewhere. But it's clear that with these new state policies, the governors of Arkansas and Louisiana have the PBM industry on the defensive. The Pharmaceutical Care Management Association, the lobbying group representing PBMs, , and the Louisiana lawsuits from Governor Landry are still ongoing. Protecting the free market from disruptive industries like PBMs is a cornerstone of the Republican platform, and it's great to see leaders following through on that promise. Yet this fight against drug middlemen has room to grow. Governor Landry encouraged lawmakers to take further steps to crack down on abusive PBM practices. Future measures ought to limit spread pricing and ensure drug discounts are passed on to the patients who need the drugs, not the middlemen that peddle them. What has transpired in Arkansas and Louisiana should be a rallying cry to other state leaders and the constituents they swore to serve. Fighting against anti-competitive practices is the path to fiscal solvency in drug pricing. * Marion Mass, M.D. is a Bucks County pediatrician and the co-founder of the Practicing Physicians of America. # [Education funding restored](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=170206986&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwMjA2OTg2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTQ1NzU5MzQsImV4cCI6MTc1NzE2NzkzNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExNDUwMjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.iy5bZj59r_tq3JK4I02XmPk9HsPDeaPDu5zR5QzqavY)
### Some good news
| | [Jeff Jackson](https://substack.com/@jeffjacksonnc)
---
| Aug 7
---
| [](https://substack.com/@jeffjacksonnc)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=170206986&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwMjA2OTg2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NDU3NTkzNCwiZXhwIjoxNzU3MTY3OTM0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTE0NTAyMSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.jrp1Mi9pct5JC6YEFQocVo6WjpgRytPgwTvn6-OH1X0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=170206986&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwMjA2OTg2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTQ1NzU5MzQsImV4cCI6MTc1NzE2NzkzNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExNDUwMjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.iy5bZj59r_tq3JK4I02XmPk9HsPDeaPDu5zR5QzqavY&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/jeffjacksonnc/p/education-funding-restored?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cd04b620-b1dc-41ae-b7cf-4e5ab3ecb854?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Friends,
I don't get to write many emails like this.
In short:
_**Total victory.**_
Last month, I told you about the Department of Education suddenly freezing $165 million in funding for North Carolina schools - money that was supposed to arrive the next day.
No clear reason was given, and it would have meant laying off roughly 1,000 educators just a few weeks before school starts.
I told you it was unlawful because that money wasn't the Department's to cancel. It was appropriated by Congress, and we were going to court to enforce the law.
Well, faced with near-certain defeat in court, they folded - completely. All of the funds will arrive, a little late, but certainly welcome.
So, the question is, _why?_
Why the sound and fury to accomplish nothing?
As you've heard from me a few times, _deliberate failure_ has become a media strategy. If the goal is attention, then picking high-profile losing battles works just fine for some folks.
Which means, _this will happen again._
We're already fighting similar battles - like FEMA's cancellation of $200 million for water and sewer projects, which I wrote about last week. There are others. Not all are born-to-lose, but some clearly are.
Regardless, my job is to win. We did that here, and we're gearing up for the next one.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b882210f-be89-4013-8d43-06b82583ee63?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_Visiting the Dream Center, an after-school and summer program that would have lost half its funding if this freeze hadn 't been reversed._
### **Avery meets the sheriffs**
North Carolina has 100 sheriffs - one for each county.
I spoke to a large group of them last week, and when I told my daughter Avery about it, she asked, "Can I come on stage?"
So she did.
I introduced her to the crowd, and Sheriff Roberson gave her a badge, which she proudly wore for the rest of the day. It was a great moment for her.
Many thanks to the sheriffs for being so kind to Avery and the rest of our family.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6a7a4d9d-6e58-4b88-97a3-579b54f4a047?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### **Did he sink it ... or did he air-ball?**
Here's me lining up a shot with some students at the Dream Center:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f0499000-a5c7-4b80-847f-69e3d3fc577f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
So, did I make the shot?
Well, I'm giving you a chance to cast your vote one way or the other - with a donation of any amount.
You can pick one:
**[🟢 ](https://substack.com/redirect/1c312eb7-48c9-4ee6-b344-f977ee971430?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_**["He sinks it!"](https://substack.com/redirect/1c312eb7-48c9-4ee6-b344-f977ee971430?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
**[🔴 ](https://substack.com/redirect/972f84a3-5c9c-48a8-9b5c-0562e7a2e4d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_**["He air-balls!"](https://substack.com/redirect/972f84a3-5c9c-48a8-9b5c-0562e7a2e4d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
I just feel that, looking at my form here, this really could go either way. The footwear, the stance, none of this inspires confidence.
But then again, I'm not that far away, right? And even ugly shots can go in.
So it really is a tough call, and you're going to want to weigh in.
A contribution of any amount let's you cast a vote, and I'll reveal the vote totals - and the correct answer - next week.
Best,
Jeff

In the 2022 election for this seat, Republican John James won by 0.5% – not even a full 1%. Now, John James is running for Governor, which makes this an open and highly competitive seat. All of the other U.S. House races in swing districts have Republican incumbents, which makes it tougher for a Democrat to break through.

In 2018, John James said he is “100% Pro-Life” and compared abortion to “genocide.” Most recently, **Representative James proudly voted YES on Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill** ,” which is one of the worst bills to become law in modern history.

Here’s how Christina responded:

_“The Republicans passed their bill. It's a direct hit to the people who work the hardest and carry the heaviest burdens – and it will make life more expensive for almost all of us. As a prosecutor and as an advocate, I believe that public servants are supposed to work FOR the people, not against them.

I’m running for Congress because I want to make sure my neighbors - the working families in our community - have affordable healthcare, housing, groceries, and daycare. We have a lot of work to do, but together, we can continue to fight for a better future.” _**

Larry Sabato’s ‘Crystal Ball’ has rated MI-10 as a Tossup in 2026, and this district is one of the DCCC’s targeted races for 2026.** When Christina was on the ballot as the Democratic Nominee for County Prosecutor in 2024, she **outperformed** both the Democratic congressional nominee AND Kamala Harris. Now, it's time to ensure she has what she needs to replace John James and get us a step closer to regaining control of the House.

**This is our _most realistic opportunity_ of the entire 2026 cycle to flip a House seat from red to blue – and we need your help to make that happen.**

[****This is the time that Christina needs the most help, as institutional support groups are evaluating where to invest. Help us ensure Christina has what she needs to catch up to her all-male opponents and get her as much attention as possible by rushing a contribution to her campaign today. →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-hines/?refcode=EM_F_250806Tossup_N_EH_NO_11_G_N_L2&amount=20.26)

Together,

Erica Henry
Senior Political Advisor
Her Bold Move

name: Mesoscale News with Rebekah Jones
subject: News and analysis you need, from someone actually qualified to do it
body:
If they want me to shut up, they're going to have to kill me.

| |
---|---|---
|
# News and analysis you need, from someone actually qualified to do it
### If they want me to shut up, they're going to have to kill me.
| | Aug 7
---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..hmvc-k9J_G1CLS4fLo12skgDLPeOKRfJBIGUBM_7vwI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=170362613)
The planet is on fire--figuratively, yes, but also literally.
Floodwaters rise, forests burn, and skies choke with smoke.
And just as we need good information most--clear-eyed, science-driven, unflinching--newsrooms are cutting their environmental desks, shuttering the very windows through which we might still glimpse a way forward.
For years now, I've stood in the path of disaster, trying to track it, understand it, and--where possible--push back.
During the COVID-19 pandemic, I [defied threats from the state](https://substack.com/redirect/62ba64c7-167d-438e-8ca6-1c36dbcaf639?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to make data public--because truth is oxygen, and people were suffocating without it.
Later, when I ran for Congress, it wasn't to climb a ladder--it was to stand firm for science, community, and the [fragile threads of democracy](https://substack.com/redirect/2f81d4d5-d7f9-4e0b-acc2-66db31caf4ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Now I write to you through this newsletter, continuing to provide breaking news and analysis about issues that impact people's lives.
It's not just commentary; it's an effort to trace the fault lines between people and planet, to explain how those fractures became chasms, and how we might yet build bridges across them.
I won't pretend to have all the answers. But I've learned how to read the signals--both the quiet ones whispered in data, and the loud ones shouted by the wind. And I can help you read them too. Because understanding the world is the first step toward changing it.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..hmvc-k9J_G1CLS4fLo12skgDLPeOKRfJBIGUBM_7vwI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=170362613)
As a free subscriber, you get access to most of this work already.
I am humbly asking you upgrade to a paid subscription so that I can afford to remove all paywalls from my posts and media -- for everyone, for good.
If only 10% of my free subscribers upgraded to a paid plan, I would be able to continue this important work freely and independently.
My hope is that you will see the value in this work and upgrade to a paid subscription to help me continue this public service.
As the media stifles important content in order to "fall in line," we need to support voices who will, without hesitation, be willing to _step out of line._ That's who I've proven myself to be.
They've threatened me, jailed me, and kidnapped my child.
If they want me to shut up, they're going to have to kill me.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..hmvc-k9J_G1CLS4fLo12skgDLPeOKRfJBIGUBM_7vwI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=170362613)
(C) 2025 Rebekah Jones
PO BOX 3371, Silver Spring, MD 20918
[Unsubscribe](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubWVzb3NjYWxlbmV3cy5jb20vYWN0aW9uL2Rpc2FibGVfZW1haWw_.5YdS4Nw7-JY5ciwxeZdu0BRIdbKjuLiIA1hCFrQjJ2M?)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d8aaf4a2-627c-4951-979a-35130acd3907?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[](https://substack..hxoTkUmUZ3ETuDxaM-82KbQqNZusIPnpZUZ6hIjlccU?)

Fellow activist,
Did you hear the news? Trump’s latest judicial nominee, Emil Bove, was confirmed and appointed to the U.S. Court of Appeals for the 3rd Circuit, which has jurisdiction in Pennsylvania.

As I told _WHYY_ , my first thought when I heard the news was that I hope Bove never gets to hear a voting rights case that’s going to impact Pennsylvania. I think he was put in place _specifically_ to make decisions about our 2026 and 2028 elections here in the commonwealth. In fact, I believe this is all strategic – that he was put in place to carry out what it is he’s supposed to do.

[**It’s crucial that the PA Supreme Court remains fair and independent this November to maintain checks and balances on the Trump regime’s attack on our free and fair elections in the Commonwealth. Support our get-out-the-vote (GOTV) efforts by donating $25 now →**](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7cnf2nT45L4TDLL79xclFmlYUKVz-2FZIWg-2FtTcyX6kz-2Fk-2BqL1Z9sJuRWsgRfle2lStVNA80kV4qbULJTjUPx6wuPL8SUMIt9r7ylHY1hPHxGFGFBjhKwarezUmWgTcbi-2Bs-3DhWby_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYRBr-2BoukjahnjSNZwAxgk4dD-2B9AnBViuiMMJvIOBvHcmHNeFnW0HIAg1mBeYVAQbkhu6RA8aGlr3VFwr1yBVW-2BZ6fao-2Fhpm2xx44fD-2F53-2BK9lU9wN-2Bhkjrg1nZ7-2FEMDtQM2x2WLNWZ2tOKklAqeS8z8lGBDWUbpIdM9Zh8NgQH8ow458Z627uLj6AIl3Hk-2Bcc)

**Here’s some background:** the legacy of this highly controversial appointment of Bove for a lifetime to the U.S. 3rd Circuit Court of Appeals includes; as deputy attorney general in the Department of Justice, Bove firing career federal prosecutors who convicted Jan. 6 rioters, ordering prosecutors to drop the corruption case against NY Mayor Eric Adams, and a whistleblower told Congress that Bove himself **told Department of Justice officials that they might have to disobey court orders.**

**This appointment has shifted the political balance of the U.S. Court of Appeals, giving Republicans the majority._And, it gets worse. _**

After Joe Biden won the 2020 election, the Trump campaign’s challenge was appealed up to the 3rd Circuit, and the court responded that Trump’s claims had “no merit.” But with a GOP majority on the court, we may see a very different outcome during the next presidential election. With PA being a key battleground state, this could have major implications for the future of our nation.

This appointment could significantly affect our court system's ability to serve as a check and balance on the Trump regime. With this news, it becomes even more important that we stand against MAGA’s anti-retention campaign targeting our three democratically elected PA Supreme Court justices this November. But we need your help.
[****](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7N1bdan8dqslucv3braa57iroH1-2FNyT9glGiUy6uuKR-2F-2BsGqrbQ23aFzSDWcFvVwGKyx9QuJslIPj5jLKud7LKGG5-2BtNXJJLXPqatepk1Lb7h5QhUsC-2BSda2YEYBk9rs8-3D6BD6_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYRBr-2BoukjahnjSNZwAxgk4dD-2B9AnBViuiMMJvIOBvHcmwyj-2BlqX75jCSaRLgQ-2BDdEvEjln7WWp-2BPPbTVexFH6vsEs6-2FzWUXY17x3qLLeIfKVLtZ3SNdBkQpL-2BVH1l1QtIPo1q9G4fNepoJ14GsVrieLTwh1pOnSH5Op5-2BSRklwOfzlxrCr2XKwxZF9wmMdNxc) **Bove is unfit for the bench, and we must work to defend our nation.** [**Will you support our massive upcoming GOTV programs ahead of the highly consequential judicial elections in November by donating $25 or more today?**](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7cnf2nT45L4TDLL79xclFmlYUKVz-2FZIWg-2FtTcyX6kz-2Fk-2BqL1Z9sJuRWsgRfle2lStVNA80kV4qbULJTjUPx6wu-2BEvxwTn0AaZukH8RC-2BtYOmc6MktSYeiMC7IBI1R0WY4-3D-FMK_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYRBr-2BoukjahnjSNZwAxgk4dD-2B9AnBViuiMMJvIOBvHckdgv4Cgq5YAzXD4Gpq-2FYIig-2B6JMWtB-2B8A7WjZupsTzRdgmKTAKVtV95SO-2BOAeXf3GzyzVAvP-2BCRhUBKQ8JRQ1qDS4t0bINeWjOiytB-2BJokjtgus-2B2EB0QSIzdjjd5GF8MGjfJJUiWdm5UJcNkHHoPz)

clean_body: | | | Fellow activist, Did you hear the news? Trump’s latest judicial nominee, Emil Bove, was confirmed and appointed to the U.S. Court of Appeals for the 3rd Circuit, which has jurisdiction in Pennsylvania. As I told WHYY , my first thought when I heard the news was that I hope Bove never gets to hear a voting rights case that’s going to impact Pennsylvania. I think he was put in place specifically to make decisions about our 2026 and 2028 elections here in the commonwealth. In fact, I believe this is all strategic – that he was put in place to carry out what it is he’s supposed to do. Here’s some background: the legacy of this highly controversial appointment of Bove for a lifetime to the U.S. 3rd Circuit Court of Appeals includes; as deputy attorney general in the Department of Justice, Bove firing career federal prosecutors who convicted Jan. 6 rioters, ordering prosecutors to drop the corruption case against NY Mayor Eric Adams, and a whistleblower told Congress that Bove himself told Department of Justice officials that they might have to disobey court orders. This appointment has shifted the political balance of the U.S. Court of Appeals, giving Republicans the majority.And, it gets worse. After Joe Biden won the 2020 election, the Trump campaign’s challenge was appealed up to the 3rd Circuit, and the court responded that Trump’s claims had “no merit.” But with a GOP majority on the court, we may see a very different outcome during the next presidential election. With PA being a key battleground state, this could have major implications for the future of our nation. This appointment could significantly affect our court system's ability to serve as a check and balance on the Trump regime. With this news, it becomes even more important that we stand against MAGA’s anti-retention campaign targeting our three democratically elected PA Supreme Court justices this November. But we need your help. Bove is unfit for the bench, and we must work to defend our nation. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: In solidarity, Kadida Kenner Chief Executive Officer New Pennsylvania Project Source: WHYY, Democrats and court watchers express concern for controversial new member of consequential 3rd Circuit Court. Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. | | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. Friend – We’ve just uncovered **DISTURBING** evidence: The CIA actively covered up the truth about the origins of COVID, all to serve a political agenda and undermine President Trump. _**_[THIS IS WRONG >>](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4667cf66873a47828a43207cc9448334&_e=oEa4Jrs7r-MYlhKGkRK_DMVRJiix63PZkqn4u6I6BDixBwc8WYumjmCvaNyC3tf5LV9jmsvTaIj6Xrfia0OKa4_gRoWEBnuw_gCO0STHOTMPur727LsXbFN2cI4xkwdCAgHngj6Xx5IGTUwcRmBNSoACqG9wXINN4vPdnFFLCWeRV1OPlmadzsvTxYil__4rU25jkxQPJCtfXNU48uGyM6syP9ilIrsaWGS-sOomI-rt088s1x-NRSC7C1l0si80gI9Ki-VTYeSJe2wypAVOa4SOpEfM8_vnM8RVGPyK--flgAD4vakT9L4ggalBRIkxHDApy41ShvFEUeygnekwjY0lbleAtdrODRbmkHEfcCH_mVtqjaNhRkGzJVymz608gAl9k0rccUJ1u3hLM5KiltVqI983zL7SA1aJ4DLluC_HboggSf2TDH160Yi3VwxI1Y_8uVJ6oCr2urdJwU_HhPkKiOr8SPB8bAo-vhyxNRwNJY5K2eq6twFO7Z2m7cim6iXUl2P-8SmUHrklONZqos33Io1XA9k3SZ9PX26Oi4Kz2_lorRgqn4xwvJ5vs8um7JtGfLl0wjWIsiM9MoLhu_F_UNq4tQCviPwoWYdnGixO9iQnx4RtudQ3UKWnJtNiDJj9QwAFk_Sy_NjJmx6kSGAiNRjd1g_d7UHi9NOE0NLO8QDSacHwEXz9m-cMERMg)_**_

Government analysts at the CIA concluded that COVID likely came from a lab in China. Instead of reporting the facts, their superiors overruled them because the findings aligned with Trump’s position that the pandemic resulted from a lab leak.

body:
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WfCEja3W5FcqS_52pgXen669zTlWNPiATumyrgBbLw89pN1mkNWzq5Hw0npBhBZAmuU8j4rZLVBx38bgtyQgmCGHvEAC63BIOB4iDf_EMkncsAtTt4f6UcbSsP0eKuJg47giU4DwB6KAjRfHzCWnOqTGgCKLZgYY5AY1j8Cm4gxjO9b16aIsyQCQASPy6hheKXKeJyb4fuxDkD1ou82y7N2-Es2nQhegKwEHTU2Iqxs=&c=0zZnlXPDpYODVHu4ESJUt9-hPvp8wK3_U_UKw1ZuDzpLRaNYOMFl5w==&ch=F_0FKeVATVGmkVJWntbQ0urt4Rzfp142bogymoqtwSDvxWlWFLcWdQ==)

| Peter,
Today Trump opened up a new front in the redistricting arms race that began when he demanded that Texas draw new congressional maps to eliminate blue Congressional seats as the GOP braces for a catastrophic midterm.
He's ordering a new census. While the census might seem boring and inconsequential, it's anything but.

| Per the Constitution, the allocation of congressional districts is determined by the US census. Despite the fact that the last census was conducted by the Trump administration, the president is now claiming that it was somehow unfair to Republicans and must be redone.
But why? In retaliation to Texas's gerrymander, California Governor Gavin Newsom has pledged to go tit for tat and will remove nearly all of California's Republican districts.
In order for MAGA's plan to salvage the midterms via nationwide gerrymandering to work, they need to blunt the impact of retaliation from states like California and New York by re-allocating their congressional districts to red state like Ohio and Texas. They will use a rigged census to do this.
It's already too late for Texas, Democrats will lose countless blue seats here. But it's not too late for Pennsylvania, yet another newly opened front in the redistricting war, where MAGA is attempting to replace their Supreme Court so that they can do exactly what they're doing in Texas.
We have less than three months until our November 2025 judicial election where the fate of the democratic majority on Pennsylvania's Supreme Court stands to be removed. Unless Dems get our act together this will happen. [Defend our Courts is among the only Dem organizations ringing the alarm bell about this looming disaster. We can't afford to lose Pennsylvania, can we count on you to chip in $25 or whatever you can spare to help us snatch a victory from the clutches of defeat?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WfCEja3W5FcqS_52pgXen669zTlWNPiATumyrgBbLw89pN1mkNWzq5Hw0npBhBZAnigoZvqfAd-R5CwPFsDxShRMpIqJLjxk-NGla_2eAyMNndfp4-WkznDaYILSOx8DjoHcf5Ul-bPurPrmJYyfWAmVZa7bdzQBKHBVWuHcYMzAueDdIoAgJvzv0KN_id-s3L1T8YsFyEXSBJcCfhQ3WXmAA1XubID7eWHOtQvw8MkVMZaE3jv4Ow==&c=0zZnlXPDpYODVHu4ESJUt9-hPvp8wK3_U_UKw1ZuDzpLRaNYOMFl5w==&ch=F_0FKeVATVGmkVJWntbQ0urt4Rzfp142bogymoqtwSDvxWlWFLcWdQ==)

name: MAGA Privilege
subject: Must be nice.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ISAIAH MARTIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/IRM_wrapper-email.jpg]
friend, hey — it’s Isaiah Martin.
While everyday families are dealing with closed parks, rising prices, and underfunded public services...
JD Vance apparently gets to raise the water level of the Ohio River for his family’s kayaking trip.
Yes, seriously.
While Trump slashes the National Park Service, and while Republicans gut public infrastructure in the name of “efficiency,” they’re literally having public lakes manipulated so their vacations can run smoother.
What a great use of taxpayer resources!
This is what MAGA really means: rules for us, perks for them.
Let me be clear:
* If a Democrat pulled this, the right-wing media would explode .
* If an average person asked the Army Corps of Engineers to help their canoe trip? They’d get laughed out of the room.
But JD Vance is a Trump insider.
So instead of calling this what it is — corruption — the GOP just calls it “common sense.”
We need to call this out. Loudly. And then we need to beat them at the ballot box.
Will you chip in $10 today to fuel our campaign and fight back against this kind of MAGA entitlement?
👉 Donate here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Let them kayak in the shallow end. We’ve got a campaign to run.
In the fight,
Isaiah Martin

name: Kevin Roberts
subject: Are the best days behind us?
body:
Many people say America’s best days are behind us.

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5gcm7ia3sldtn6uji8rdh8l7drvahmg9eh19csg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clie4pj2c1h2bs)
---
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

Many people say America's best days are behind us.

In some ways, this is understandable. For decades, Americans were sold a lie from the radical Left that:
* Unlimited immigration was good.
* Liberty could survive without virtue.
* Freedom merely meant self-expression, not self-governance.

But as president of The Heritage Foundation, I know we have a special opportunity to create **a new American golden age.**

With President Trump in office, there is a renewed push to revive America and restore our nation to its former glory.

And my colleagues and I at The Heritage Foundation, backed by our 500,000 members, are working to create and promote policy solutions that will bring about this new American golden age.

However, leftists are doing everything they can to sabotage this golden age. If we don't seize this moment now, we might never save our country from leftist decay.

**Will you join this effort today by activating your Heritage Foundation membership?**

[**Become a member >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zg2n4l5f6oadiphv43k28n00fvcb3qmpvhq5vajo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clie4pj2c1h2bs)

Your generous tax-deductible donation will help promote conservative policies that are pro-worker, pro-family, pro-God, and pro-nation. Policies rooted in the American tradition--not ashamed of our history, but proud of our inheritance.

**Please activate your Heritage Foundation membership using the secure link below.**

[**https://secured.heritage.org/new-golden-age-for-america/**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zeqej25t0u12qv2r529grqbmmmb6urb4oqr71eso_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clie4pj2c1h2bs)

Your courageous action today will rebuild a republic where men are strong, women are cherished, children are protected, and God is honored.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

**P.S. Don 't miss this opportunity to bring about a new American golden age by activating your Heritage Foundation membership: [https://secured.heritage.org/new-golden-age-for-america/](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zauss1hp0as6ido36k7sc6hogc5h92iuu5iord10_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clie4pj2c1h2bs)**

The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002

name: The Democrats
subject: re: Texas
body:
---
Derek, If you’re looking for a way to make an impact _right now_ , we’re here to tell you this is it. Let us explain: Democrats are fighting a major battle in Texas — and the outcome will directly impact all of us for years to come. **Right now, Republicans are blatantly trying to steal _five_ Democratic seats in Texas. And, if they succeed, it will be that much easier for the GOP to hold Congress in 2026 and beyond.** That’s why Republicans are laser-focused on this fight, and we need to be, too. Texas Democrats have left the state to prevent a vote on the rigged map. But now, the state’s Republicans are threatening to _remove and arrest_ Democrats who are blocking their gerrymandered map. The DNC has activated over 30,000 volunteers to contact Texas voters and let them know what’s at stake right now. We’ve sent tens of thousands of messages recruiting Texans to attend hearings on this issue. **We’re fighting fire with fire, because if Republicans succeed, the consequences could be disastrous for people all over the country.** **[But we’ll need your help to do it. If you’re looking for a way to make an impact right now in this important moment, this is your opportunity. name: Team Ilhan
subject: America last
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
The party that constantly says “America First!” as they enact their disastrous agenda is putting the interests of Israel before Americans.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1750%2E791427%2EOPYvQK)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug25.m0VVrI&refcode=em250807-1-90&t=2&akid=1750%2E791427%2EOPYvQK)
All we can say is wow.
The party that constantly says “America First!” as they enact their disastrous agenda is putting the interests of Israel before the safety of Americans.
**Almost $2 billion in FEMA funds** — money meant to help victims of natural disasters — will now be withheld by Trump if your city or state leaders make the moral decision to boycott Israel for its record of war crimes and violations of human rights laws.
According to Reuters, these funds “cover search-and-rescue equipment, emergency manager salaries, and backup power systems among other expenses.”
Simply put, Trump is willing to put American lives on the line to enforce his far-right stance in the Middle East.
And on top of that, Republicans who go along with this are demonstrating that they don’t give a damn about free speech or free markets. They will punish Americans like you for choosing to spend your dollar at a certain business over another.
**Ilhan Omar has been a leader on ending the violence in Gaza and bringing the Israeli occupation of Gaza and the West Bank to an end, and she is committed to fighting ridiculous, anti-American policies like this.**
If you’re with Ilhan in this fight, please:
**[Consider making your first contribution to Ilhan Omar’s campaign for reelection. She is running to continue to stand up for Americans and their interests, not the interests of foreign nations who refuse to follow international law.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug25.m0VVrI&refcode=em250807-1-90&t=3&akid=1750%2E791427%2EOPYvQK)

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |
# PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR

Because when you’re the first girl to sit in the barber chair at The Citadel, you don’t care about not getting invited to the fancy D.C. parties. They HATE me because they HATE you. In Washington, I didn’t sit quietly or play along. I stood up, and made sure the career politicians and D.C. insiders got nothing. ❌ I pushed back against the reckless policies of Joe Biden and Kamala Harris every step of the way. ❌ I passed President Trump’s America First agenda. ❌ I fought for common sense. ❌ And when they tried to let biological men into women’s sports, I stood my ground and won. That’s why the insiders are terrified of what’s coming next: I’ve taken on the establishment in Washington. Now I’m bringing the fight home. South Carolina needs a bold, fearless governor who will back President Trump and deliver the America First agenda without apology. I KNOW how to defend our values and protect our communities. When a sanctuary sheriff in Charleston County released illegal alien criminals, rapists, pdophiles, and even murderers onto our streets, the Attorney General and Lt. Governor said nothing. They did NOTHING. I called her out. I told the truth. And the people sent her packing. South Carolina was under attack, and I didn’t stay silent. Now, I’m ready to take that same fight to the governor’s office for the AMERICA FIRST agenda.
