clean_body: They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | Fellow Conservative, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! -> If the media wants to attack us for having a "warrior mentality" - the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... -> If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump's MAGA movement - the movement that says we can make America great... -> If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste - which has been exposed by Trump's DOGE department... ....Then they don't understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected! As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We're going to shoot straight with you, too: This hit piece was horsesht and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us. If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you. Thank you so much for your time, Tim Sheehy Eli Crane Ryan Zinke Three Navy SEALs Serving in Congress | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Use of Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztl8ndvo02ue0v1uql99jn3ca7qe6q22e5q0q950_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clie1or6c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zopetihccckps2bn37jq9qa8qsotl1fmdnsnqmvg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clie1or6c1h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zs3lejmgbvuf7kj4dk1gsv8ievfv2bbh43pcs7g0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clie1or6c1h2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zpanq2cdg7gjbs09nc2e2guff1utevvbet6c9bc8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clie1or6c1h2bs)**

name: Wes Moore
subject: Crime rates in Maryland ↘️
body:
Thanks to investments in our communities, crime is down in Maryland.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=426%2E1086043%2E61FFmP)
Every Marylander has the right to feel safe in their own neighborhood, Peter. That’s why public safety has been a top priority for our administration since Day One.
When we took office, we established an all-of-the-above approach. We treated the problem as a public health crisis. We used the data to identify ways to deter crime. We worked with all of the stakeholders we could – within our communities, in law enforcement, and more.
And, yes, we increased accountability for violent offenders and made historic investments in law enforcement. But we also invested in our communities and in violence prevention programs.
The results? We’ve seen some of the most significant drops in homicides and non-fatal shootings in America.
I said it before, and I’ll say it again: I _refuse_ to be a governor who attends funerals or offers thoughts and prayers without delivering any real, substantive change.
We’re going to keep working together, with and within our communities. We won’t quit until we make Maryland a safer state for everyone.
**[Now, more than ever, I need your support to keep our important work going. Will you make a donation of $5 or whatever makes sense today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250807-1?refcode=em-20250807-1&refcode2=426_1086043_61FFmP&akid=426%2E1086043%2E61FFmP)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250807-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250807-1&refcode2=426_1086043_61FFmP&akid=426%2E1086043%2E61FFmP)**
Elevate,
Wes
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250807-1&t=2&refcode2=426_1086043_61FFmP&akid=426%2E1086043%2E61FFmP)**

name: Team Kelly
subject: Will you support Abigail Spanberger on her birthday?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Whatever the amount, today is the day to show you stand with Abigail Spanberger.
#

Today is Abigail Spanberger's birthday!
In case you don't know, Abigail kept our country safe as a CIA case officer and served for three terms in Congress. Now, she's running for Governor of Virginia in the _biggest_ election of 2025. _But Trump just attacked Abigail on TV_ — and it's only a matter of time until he uses his billion-dollar war chest against her.
Today, in recognition of Abigail's birthday, we're asking you to make a founding contribution to her historic campaign.
[**Whatever the amount, today is the day to show you stand with Abigail Spanberger. name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztvf7vmd44msu1vpj5m7cjf4mseaaa557og6d06o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clie9pb4chh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z28pu80ntteuui0ium0mihu5k6eml9ope7dvvlb8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clie9pb4chh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztdcpn5psf3epd34fha1prua4cbtgfpo76kam958_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clie9pb4chh2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znos6imbo00u4n00lbvl2qnc2b54vnse5pphjpbo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clie9pb4chh2bs)**

* * *
* **TOP NEWS**

**" Harris County spent $900K on Lina Hidalgo's security detail, more than all commissioners combined," **Houston Chronicle's **John Lomax V** \-- "Harris County Judge **Lina Hidalgo** [spent more on security in 2024](https://substack.com/redirect/f8890326-dfe2-4814-a095-7292327c240e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) than every other member of Commissioners Court combined, according to records obtained by the Houston Chronicle.

Hidalgo spent $903,000 for security personnel -- more than half the amount budgeted for all five members of Commissioners Court. All four members of the court's Democratic super majority were allotted six-figure security budgets, records indicated. Commissioner**Tom Ramsey** , the lone Republican, [was the sole member](https://substack.com/redirect/c9910e44-5928-471f-b138-47507dea55ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) whose office did not spend any funds on personal security in 2024.
[BECOME A PAID SUSBCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/661409fe-0e5c-4946-a6a4-98b5a7dadedb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hidlago's office said the expense is necessary in today's political climate.

"We have a duty of care to elected officials, to staff, to the public and to the broader community that would bear the consequences if something were to happen. While we do not disclose active threats or operational details for safety reasons, the threat of political violence is real in today's climate," a spokesperson for Hidalgo's office said in a statement. "Given Judge Hidalgo's national profile and high public visibility, she uses security detail for the protection of her and her staff. When it comes to safety and security, the cost of inaction far outweighs the cost of prevention."
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/661409fe-0e5c-4946-a6a4-98b5a7dadedb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The Chronicle reached out to the Harris County Sheriff's Office for information regarding threats made against Hidalgo and other officials, but a representative directed the request to the Precinct 1 Constable's Office, which did not respond.

Ramsey said in a statement that he enjoyed the same protection from area law enforcement that a typical Harris County resident received, and that outside of extraordinary circumstances he did not believe it was a necessity.

"Extra security, in my opinion, is something that is on an 'as needed basis' and in the situations I'm aware of is not needed," the statement read. "It costs taxpayers more and keeps us from hiring officers who take care of all of us."

A spokesperson for Commissioner**Adrian Garcia** said he views his security details as a necessary precaution that he employs while in Harris County to ensure the safety of himself and his staff." [Hou Chron](https://substack.com/redirect/00323218-25f5-4c71-8dd3-d9d28e3e3bae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

TOP NEWS " Harris County spent $900K on Lina Hidalgo's security detail, more than all commissioners combined," Houston Chronicle's John Lomax V \-- "Harris County Judge Lina Hidalgo than every other member of Commissioners Court combined, according to records obtained by the Houston Chronicle. Hidalgo spent $903,000 for security personnel -- more than half the amount budgeted for all five members of Commissioners Court. All four members of the court's Democratic super majority were allotted six-figure security budgets, records indicated. CommissionerTom Ramsey , the lone Republican, whose office did not spend any funds on personal security in 2024. Hidlago's office said the expense is necessary in today's political climate. "We have a duty of care to elected officials, to staff, to the public and to the broader community that would bear the consequences if something were to happen. While we do not disclose active threats or operational details for safety reasons, the threat of political violence is real in today's climate," a spokesperson for Hidalgo's office said in a statement. "Given Judge Hidalgo's national profile and high public visibility, she uses security detail for the protection of her and her staff. When it comes to safety and security, the cost of inaction far outweighs the cost of prevention." The Chronicle reached out to the Harris County Sheriff's Office for information regarding threats made against Hidalgo and other officials, but a representative directed the request to the Precinct 1 Constable's Office, which did not respond. Ramsey said in a statement that he enjoyed the same protection from area law enforcement that a typical Harris County resident received, and that outside of extraordinary circumstances he did not believe it was a necessity. "Extra security, in my opinion, is something that is on an 'as needed basis' and in the situations I'm aware of is not needed," the statement read. "It costs taxpayers more and keeps us from hiring officers who take care of all of us." A spokesperson for CommissionerAdrian Garcia said he views his security details as a necessary precaution that he employs while in Harris County to ensure the safety of himself and his staff." Friends, We're watching it happen in real time: **Trump and his MAGA allies are trying to burn democracy to the ground.** In just the last 48 hours:
* In Texas, Republican lawmakers issued arrest warrants for Democrats who walked out to block a rigged redistricting plan. And now? **Trump is using his loyal crony-turned-FBI Director, Kash Patel, to unleash the full force of the FBI to drag them back by force**
* Trump is fueling war overseas, cheering on Netanyahu as Israeli forces move to fully occupy Gaza, threatening countless lives in the name of politics.
* Trump's latest census scheme would erase millions of immigrants from being counted, **stealing representation from our neighbors.**
* And his renewed trade war is slamming working families, **with tariffs as high as 50% on some countries** , putting farmers and small businesses directly in the crossfire.

**This is authoritarianism. It 's economic sabotage. It's white nationalist policy wrapped in chaos.** And if we let it slide, they'll do worse tomorrow. That's why we're all in now -- on Texas, on the Senate race in North Carolina, on the fight for Virginia's governorship, and more. _**From here on out, it 's all gas, no brakes.**_ **[But we can't do it without grassroots power behind us. Can you please chip in $25 today? That helps us reach hundreds of rural voters with the truth -- and support candidates who aren't afraid to stand up to this.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91D0HIwGJa4UNgQFcUvJFsG7swiMss2ye9Ll3LUDpq2MnJ6YjANv16zEvMy5liClZuFXCyjegvAk9R_x5hKR_cDp_O39r2DHuETZmp4stkuLWVGOeR6Hvb-FCXxsEndVs58dyuu94T5viVdwdAFIrvQGryo1xvHzzv_F0F8eT3pNMPeS2T4Gjvk-YPXq38gNwt7VIr5BTaHBkRdoDB3TqGKrpXjuobatwDmlD0tKBaLaA-fd-NPZizCyzAlUwWMj8bReek5iI6Z64MoZF9CT_CXZxbJWCzVuBEbYL50h4sUeNeNyUBo2NRtnlKft9vtfjBiFgyKBnzJG84vvqpwHiPZYVNIOlbQZwkjrPHfVnmgQfE/4iu/NHHI7jdCSNiQsxIFJt4yBQ/h1/h001.TwZPhZzJIammOyoOJHSwGpBug2yK2HUVPkLJClogqU8)**

clean_body: | | Friends, We're watching it happen in real time: Trump and his MAGA allies are trying to burn democracy to the ground. In just the last 48 hours: In Texas, Republican lawmakers issued arrest warrants for Democrats who walked out to block a rigged redistricting plan. And now? Trump is using his loyal crony-turned-FBI Director, Kash Patel, to unleash the full force of the FBI to drag them back by force Trump is fueling war overseas, cheering on Netanyahu as Israeli forces move to fully occupy Gaza, threatening countless lives in the name of politics. Trump's latest census scheme would erase millions of immigrants from being counted, stealing representation from our neighbors. And his renewed trade war is slamming working families, with tariffs as high as 50% on some countries , putting farmers and small businesses directly in the crossfire. This is authoritarianism. It 's economic sabotage. It's white nationalist policy wrapped in chaos. And if we let it slide, they'll do worse tomorrow. That's why we're all in now -- on Texas, on the Senate race in North Carolina, on the fight for Virginia's governorship, and more. From here on out, it 's all gas, no brakes. Trump's people are doing everything they can to rewrite the rules and crush the opposition. We're not letting them get away with it. No Dem Left Behind. No democracy left to chance. Saving our country isn't partisan -- it's patriotic. In the fight, The No Dem Left Behind Team | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. Jeff's leading the charge against Trump's MAGA agenda — opposing dangerous nominees, defending climate action, and standing up for working families while Republicans try to tear it all down. He's showing us what bold progressive leadership looks like in a moment of crisis. With Senate control up for grabs, Jeff's re-election is essential to taking back the Democratic Senate Majority. We can't afford to lose strong, principled voices in the Senate, especially not now. = = Jeff's standing up to Trump. body:
Not going down without a fight |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112914403/562028936/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE812_20250807_TXKicker_PL&sourceid=1056764&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2Q5ZDZmZC1iMDczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XbktVCYYSQa7cJLv87_W6cDRSmz9htMO-FNSlWOGFFM=) Peter,

On Monday, we reached out about the Republican gerrymandering crisis in Texas, and we said we'd fight back. _We meant it._

Today, EMILYs List is putting **Republicans in Texas's U.S. congressional delegation** officially "_On Notice._ "

If Texas Republicans insist on doing Donald Trump's bidding by ramming through their rigged congressional map, we're going to recruit, train, and fund Democratic women to challenge them in districts across Texas.

And we're not stopping there. EMILYs List is also fighting to build and defend majorities in state legislatures across the country — the very places where the next redistricting fights will happen.

Republicans are trying to pick their voters instead of allowing voters to pick their representatives. We're not letting that happen without a fight. [**Texas Democratic women are coming for these seats. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112914420/562029007/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE812_20250807_TXKicker_PL&sourceid=1056764&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2Q5ZDZmZC1iMDczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XbktVCYYSQa7cJLv87_W6cDRSmz9htMO-FNSlWOGFFM=)
Hi Peter,

This weekend, more than 50 Texas legislators — including 13 EMILYs List women — did something extraordinary: they _left the state_ , risking arrest under Attorney General Ken Paxton's penalties, to break quorum and delay the passage of a devastating and blatantly undemocratic GOP gerrymandering bill.
[DEFEND DEMOCRACY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112914423/562029016/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE812_20250807_TXKicker_PL&sourceid=1056764&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2Q5ZDZmZC1iMDczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XbktVCYYSQa7cJLv87_W6cDRSmz9htMO-FNSlWOGFFM=)
---
The GOP's gerrymandering assaults every community in the state. It would make 30 of Texas' 38 congressional districts _safe Republican seats_ , **netting Republicans five more seats in the U.S. House** , despite more than 42% of Texans voting for Kamala Harris last year.

This bill is disenfranchisement, plain and simple. Trump is pushing Republican Gov. Greg Abbott to pass it because he knows how unpopular their party's governance is — and he knows the only way Republicans will hold the U.S. House in 2026 is by rigging maps, suppressing votes, and _stealing_ seats.

Now, these courageous Texas women are putting it all on the line for our democracy. We're _immensely_ proud to have helped elect them, and we're so grateful for their bravery in the face of threats and coercion from their state's Republican leaders. They are proof that we're not powerless: even in red states, Democrats can do their part to stop the Trump takeover.

These women are why we do the work we do.
****[**This fight is far from over, Peter. We are hard at work to help elect more leaders who will show up for their constituents, resist fascism, and defend democracy when it matters most. You can support our work with a donation now:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112914427/562029023/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE812_20250807_TXKicker_PL&sourceid=1056764&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2Q5ZDZmZC1iMDczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XbktVCYYSQa7cJLv87_W6cDRSmz9htMO-FNSlWOGFFM=)****

clean_body: Not going down without a fight | = Peter, On Monday, we reached out about the Republican gerrymandering crisis in Texas, and we said we'd fight back. We meant it. Today, EMILYs List is putting Republicans in Texas's U.S. congressional delegation officially "On Notice. " If Texas Republicans insist on doing Donald Trump's bidding by ramming through their rigged congressional map, we're going to recruit, train, and fund Democratic women to challenge them in districts across Texas. And we're not stopping there. EMILYs List is also fighting to build and defend majorities in state legislatures across the country — the very places where the next redistricting fights will happen. Republicans are trying to pick their voters instead of allowing voters to pick their representatives. We're not letting that happen without a fight. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, EMILYs List —Original Message— Sent: Mon., August 4, 2025 From: EMILYs List = Hi Peter, This weekend, more than 50 Texas legislators — including 13 EMILYs List women — did something extraordinary: they left the state , risking arrest under Attorney General Ken Paxton's penalties, to break quorum and delay the passage of a devastating and blatantly undemocratic GOP gerrymandering bill. = The GOP's gerrymandering assaults every community in the state. It would make 30 of Texas' 38 congressional districts safe Republican seats , netting Republicans five more seats in the U.S. House , despite more than 42% of Texans voting for Kamala Harris last year. This bill is disenfranchisement, plain and simple. Trump is pushing Republican Gov. Greg Abbott to pass it because he knows how unpopular their party's governance is — and he knows the only way Republicans will hold the U.S. House in 2026 is by rigging maps, suppressing votes, and stealing seats. Now, these courageous Texas women are putting it all on the line for our democracy. We're immensely proud to have helped elect them, and we're so grateful for their bravery in the face of threats and coercion from their state's Republican leaders. They are proof that we're not powerless: even in red states, Democrats can do their part to stop the Trump takeover. These women are why we do the work we do. **=** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = In solidarity, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

subject: We Need To Deport Criminal Illegals!

body:
I’m a staunch supporter of enforcing the law - in Washington, it will be no different

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fe6af237fa4b/welcome-to-team-grantham-10140947?e=0b767f7f9d)
---
[|
---](https://mcshanellc.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a964730c3815d48603a3e5f85&id=3b5691e125&e=0b767f7f9d)
| | | | | Friend,While President Trump was on the campaign trail, the Biden Administration was working hard to facilitate the mass influx of illegal immigrants into the interior of the United States. Of the many things President Trump promised to get done, one was mass deportations and I, along with much of this country, voted for that. That work continues today, and while Congressional Democrats fight against him, I will work WITH Trump on that in Congress!The Biden Administration allowed millions of illegal immigrants into our country, including violent, criminal, and unlawful immigrants who have terrorized American citizens. As a nation, we have no obligation to allow violent criminals who violate our laws to remain in our country. I am committed to deporting these criminal illegals from our country!
I am the only candidate in this race with a record of working to end illegal immigration in Arizona and deport violent, criminal illegal immigrants during my time in the state legislature. In Washington, I will work to ensure that Border Patrol and ICE have the resources they need to remove violent criminal illegals from our country!

---
[|
---](https://mcshanellc.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a964730c3815d48603a3e5f85&id=a3d5216820&e=0b767f7f9d)

---
| _**DID YOU SEE THE NEWS ABOUT THE DEMOCRAT STATE SENATOR TRYING TO INTERFERE WITH ICE AGENTS DOING THEIR JOB? I was proud to join those calling for her to face any appropriate charges and discipline.**_
---
| [READ THE STORY](https://mcshanellc.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a964730c3815d48603a3e5f85&id=45de79e55e&e=0b767f7f9d)
---
| _**As your next Congressman, I will work with President Trump and members of Congress to ensure that ICE has the resources that are needed to remove violent, criminal illegal immigrants from our country!**_
---
| [SUPPORT ICE](https://mcshanellc.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a964730c3815d48603a3e5f85&id=52af1a2a41&e=0b767f7f9d)

That work continues today, and while Congressional Democrats fight against him, I will work WITH Trump on that in Congress!The Biden Administration allowed millions of illegal immigrants into our country, including violent, criminal, and unlawful immigrants who have terrorized American citizens. As a nation, we have no obligation to allow violent criminals who violate our laws to remain in our country. I am committed to deporting these criminal illegals from our country! I am the only candidate in this race with a record of working to end illegal immigration in Arizona and deport violent, criminal illegal immigrants during my time in the state legislature. In Washington, I will work to ensure that Border Patrol and ICE have the resources they need to remove violent criminal illegals from our country! | | DID YOU SEE THE NEWS ABOUT THE DEMOCRAT STATE SENATOR TRYING TO INTERFERE WITH ICE AGENTS DOING THEIR JOB? I was proud to join those calling for her to face any appropriate charges and discipline. | | As your next Congressman, I will work with President Trump and members of Congress to ensure that ICE has the resources that are needed to remove violent, criminal illegal immigrants from our country! | | 🚐 This Week on the Campaign Trail ✅ This week, I was thrilled to receive an endorsement from a great conservative, James Candland! James is a former Chief of Staff for the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors and has served as a Gilbert Town Councilmember! | | | | WHAT’S IN THE NEWS | EXCLUSIVE: DHS EXPOSES ‘WORST OF THE WORST’ ILLEGAL CRIMINALS, CALLS FOR AMERICANS TO JOIN ICE “The Department of Homeland Security is renewing its calls for Americans to join ICE...” | | FEDERAL AGENTS FLEE ARSON ATTACK AT ICE OFFICE IN WASHINGTON STATE AFTER ROCK HURLED THROUGH WINDOW “Federal immigration agents escaped an arson attack at their office in Yakima, Washington, over the weekend...” | | Thank you for being part of this movement. Sincerely, Travis GranthamRepublican Candidate for Congress | | | | | | | | | | | | [PAID FOR BY GRANTHAM FOR CONGRESS]() | | | | Copyright (C) 2025 Grantham For Congress. All rights reserved.

| Really quick, before you log off for the day: I’m the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Donald Trump won in 2024. That makes me the GOP’s top target. They are going to come after me with every dirty trick in the book and will spare no expense to defeat me. That means we need to build the largest statewide campaign Georgia has ever seen. That means more rallies. More organizers. More outreach — and early outreach — to voters in every corner of the state. All of that takes resources. And it’s why donations from supporters like you are so important to our campaign. The road ahead won’t be easy. But I know how to win tough fights. I’ve done it before. I can’t do it alone, which is why I’m asking: [Can I count on you to split a donation between Blue Amp Action and my re-election campaign? | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T45781761-28da-4362-9bd3-8095554678c0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: tackling our mental health crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
Mental health struggles impact ALL families, and the U.S. isn’t doing enough to address the problem.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112915167/562031594/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTU3NjcyYi1iMzczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IofbJGSTKC2B0HT-5dOPPRXR1Brv0tpxcg1BSZDHlEc=) I’ve been traveling Oregon’s 6th district, holding town halls, and speaking with constituents about the challenges facing their families. One issue came up a lot, and it’s clear: **Mental health struggles impact ALL families,_and we’re not doing enough to address the problem_** _._ This is going to be a longer email about what I’m doing to address America’s mental health challenges, and I hope you’ll read it to the end. **[But if you don’t have time, please, consider chipping in to my campaign today and help me keep pushing to improve America’s mental wellbeing. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112915169/562031596/-480163815?refcode=email_080725_mentalhealth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTU3NjcyYi1iMzczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IofbJGSTKC2B0HT-5dOPPRXR1Brv0tpxcg1BSZDHlEc=)** | | **[DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112915170/562031598/-480163815?refcode=email_080725_mentalhealth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTU3NjcyYi1iMzczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IofbJGSTKC2B0HT-5dOPPRXR1Brv0tpxcg1BSZDHlEc=)**
---
**Right now America is facing a growing crisis in addiction, mental and behavioral health.** And I have firsthand experience: Growing up, my sister struggled with depression, and I saw the impact mental health care — _or the lack thereof_ — can have on both the patient and their family.
**Unfortunately, too many Americans don’t receive the treatment and support they need.** Even as demand for mental and behavioral health treatments grows, the number of providers hasn’t kept up — _in large part due to the sky-high cost of school and training._
**So I stepped up, and wrote a bill to tackle the problem.**
I reintroduced the _Substance Use Disorder Treatment and Recovery for Behavioral Health Act_ (STAR) to tackle the workforce shortage head-on, and create a new federal scholarship program for students studying mental health, behavioral health, and substance use disorder treatments.
By investing in mental health professionals now, we can save resources — _and lives_ — in the long run by reducing the number of mental health and addiction crises — and cut back on costly emergency room trips.
Mental health isn’t just a red-state or blue-state problem. _It impacts all Americans._ **By helping America’s students afford high-quality training in these fields, we can address the workforce shortage, create good-paying jobs, and make much-needed progress towards ending America’s mental health crisis.**
**[If you’re on board with that mission, I’d appreciate it if you could chip in to my re-election campaign today and help me keep up the fight to end America’s mental health crisis once and for all. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112915172/562031599/-480163815?refcode=email_080725_mentalhealth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTU3NjcyYi1iMzczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IofbJGSTKC2B0HT-5dOPPRXR1Brv0tpxcg1BSZDHlEc=)**
| **[DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112915173/562031601/-480163815?refcode=email_080725_mentalhealth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTU3NjcyYi1iMzczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IofbJGSTKC2B0HT-5dOPPRXR1Brv0tpxcg1BSZDHlEc=)**
---
Thank you,
Andrea

But if you would like to **[unsubscribe, click here](https://action.andreasalinasfororegon.com/a/unsubscribe?unsubscribedata=LXjUv3pmpCxKIrn9f9ueattVPRKBxKY1lrSGo5%2BlSxL9AN7O0CdBn1lL1yVazGBRJgl0ni33Wb67in1BQNMAZA1ev2le29B%2Bsv9sjfY%2FbxrqFmLHnbes2rNY1E%2FyhLVM0jdZw4puYfnYiSse3vSDoMDYOqMrRaNz04u7dAtLcvEeWf%2BZIOjfNa7BpbSSKLM3iLmGd7s3Yx3VSryUUFE0Yf5A4HCij0Yk%2BnxtwACP8SR%2BpIx9CwHu1fqRCApOxtZepOLJ4DshQ8LVoe13ekyb39rSNqdcdAC3tey2EiQ%2BJ1v4Nybu2cO43S79DmAIK%2FAxvXwE44kT0IsUPrEofDNcWbiLuJumMw%2FfaHNNZuulmI%2FhTDImYAU0aMEZktr9SysDzZKK8hjJwXMHx9lhHZN7sZzzg%2BRW9hXOYF1DiDcmo%2FU%3D).** | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112915174/562031603/-1080040549?refcode=email-footer&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTU3NjcyYi1iMzczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IofbJGSTKC2B0HT-5dOPPRXR1Brv0tpxcg1BSZDHlEc=)

name: Chris Ahuja
subject: I Refuse AIPAC Money. Brad Sherman Doesn’t.
body:
Representation for people. Not lobbies or corporations.

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=507a4b1aaa&e=5a6ee82cdb)
| | | | | [Donate](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=59216ba418&e=5a6ee82cdb)
---
| Dear Peter,**I’m running for Congress because CD-32 deserves leadership that isn’t bought** — leadership that isn’t afraid to speak the truth. That’s why I’m proud to be **officially endorsed by Track AIPAC** , a national movement supporting Democratic candidates who reject AIPAC’s influence and stand for human rights, peace, and accountability.**Brad Sherman has taken millions from AIPAC and its billionaire-backed Super PACs.** He’s voted again and again to fund endless weapons — even as bombs fall on innocent civilians. **I won’t.****I refuse all money from AIPAC and any group trying to buy our democracy.** I support an **immediate and permanent ceasefire** in Gaza. And I believe **U.S. military aid must be conditional** — because no ally should get a blank check to violate international law.This isn’t just about Israel and Palestine. It’s about who controls our government.
**Do we answer to the people — or to the lobbyists?****I say: the people. Always.**[**If you believe that too, now’s the time to act. We’re building a movement powered by small donors and big courage — and we need you with us.**](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=7358bf7aaf&e=5a6ee82cdb)**Brad Sherman has AIPAC’s millions. But we have something much more powerful:**_**you.**_**Every grassroots donation, no matter the amount, helps us fight back against special interests and bring truth to power.** Help us send a message: **CD-32 is not for sale**.
[**Please chip in $20, $50, or whatever feels right to help us continue to fight for representation for people—not AIPAC, lobbyists, or corporations.**](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=9c75dfe0b3&e=5a6ee82cdb)**In solidarity,****
**[****](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=1e963ca18e&e=5a6ee82cdb)**Chris Ahuja**
**Democrat for Congress, CD-32**

---
| | | | | | | | [ View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/chrisahuja/ahuja-endorsed-by-aipac-tracker?e=5a6ee82cdb)
Christopher Ahuja for Congress * 21255 Burbank Blvd Ste 120 * Woodland Hills, CA 91367-6669 * USA
[update your preferences](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=45384ee532&e=5a6ee82cdb&c=58c96877c3) or [unsubscribe](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=45384ee532&t=b&e=5a6ee82cdb&c=58c96877c3)

name: Brandon, House GOP
subject: I thought we had something… guess I was wrong

body:
Friend, I can only do so much alone.

Friend,
I can only buy you enough time until midnight...
Then, after that -- it could all be over.
Renew your House GOP membership now -- without you, we wouldn't be where we are today: taking on the Democrats and winning.[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zqhku8mpctorbpd0qbpj11a48nevoj7i6824igho_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdg64oj4cjh2bs)Members like YOU are the bedrock of our majority.. subject: BREAKING: A new Republican opponent has entered our race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
We've seen this playbook before. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112915913/562034358/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTFhZTVkMi1iNDczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xe4AMr2IX44JD2LEQtChRDnDUsyEighHw7hbENNStzY=&emci=068b3a50-e172-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=451ae5d2-b473-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=15820338)

Did you hear the news, Peter?

_Our first Republican challenger just announced their intent to unseat Kim and flip WA-08 red in 2026._

And while next year's election may seem far away, Republicans are wasting no time trying to win back this seat and solidify their majority for two more years. The race for this district is officially on, _and we have a tough fight ahead of us._

Peter: WA-08 is a true purple district, and it’s only a matter of time before more Republican candidates enter our race, which means we need to be ready for anything that comes our way and ensure this campaign is equipped with the resources it needs to respond to their attacks.

We’ve seen this playbook before, and we know how tough these races can be. But here’s the good news: We have an incredible grassroots team by our side, and with your help, we can make sure this campaign is able to get ahead of the noise while we still can.

name: Sharice Davids
subject: I don’t look like your typical member of Congress. And I’m proud of it.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
National Republicans desperately want to replace me with someone who doesn’t stand out

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112915872/562034309/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTFhZTVkMi1iNDczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZwIm1J8EO3MOibyKDat0ZbB3WqZGaAlRZnsRVyCdcOI=) I value directness, and I hope you do too. So I’m going to be direct: **I don’t look like your typical member of Congress. And I’m proud of it.** I’m the only LGBTQ+ Native American woman ever elected to Congress. Unlike most of Washington, I don’t come from generational wealth. And I’m one of just a handful of Democrats who represents a red state. But here’s the cold, hard truth: National Republicans desperately want to replace me with someone who _doesn’t_ stand out. Someone who will mindlessly toe the GOP party line. Someone who is woefully out-of-touch with the real needs of working families. **If we’re going to defeat them, we need to get our message out all across the district — about all I’ve accomplished for Kansas, and about the very real stakes of this election if we lose.** [_**The truth is, that will require resources — resources that we don’t yet have. name: Action Needed: Team KG
subject: No student should have to choose between going to class and going hungry.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
Senator Gillibrand isn’t letting GOP control stop her. But she needs you.
Hi, Right now, too many college students in America are struggling to afford their next meal. Under the current law, most full-time students are blocked from accessing SNAP unless they work 20+ hours a week or meet narrow exemptions. It’s a broken system — and it’s leaving students behind. That’s why Senator Kirsten Gillibrand just reintroduced the EATS Act: a bill that would expand SNAP eligibility to low-income students and ensure no one has to go hungry just to get an education. [**CNY CENTRAL: Sen. Gillibrand reintroduces _EATS Act_ amid Republican-controlled government**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112915942/562034447/-289296636?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.08.07_EATS_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjFhZTVkMi1iNDczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4GC-pNJRoFLIcyawRVHl3EiAikcb9KzpSg1PSNXmEN8=&emci=5e5352bd-ff72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=461ae5d2-b473-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7659029) Even with Republicans in control of Congress and actively trying to gut programs like SNAP, Senator Gillibrand is refusing to back down. She’s fighting to defend basic human dignity and build a country where every student, worker and family can thrive. But we need grassroots support behind her every step of the way. [**_Will you sign your name to support expanding food assistance for students?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112915943/562034448/-289296636?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.08.07_EATS_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjFhZTVkMi1iNDczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4GC-pNJRoFLIcyawRVHl3EiAikcb9KzpSg1PSNXmEN8=&emci=5e5352bd-ff72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=461ae5d2-b473-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7659029) | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112915944/562034449/-289296636?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.08.07_EATS_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjFhZTVkMi1iNDczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4GC-pNJRoFLIcyawRVHl3EiAikcb9KzpSg1PSNXmEN8=&emci=5e5352bd-ff72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=461ae5d2-b473-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7659029)

clean_body: Senator Gillibrand isn’t letting GOP control stop her. But she needs you. Hi, Right now, too many college students in America are struggling to afford their next meal. Under the current law, most full-time students are blocked from accessing SNAP unless they work 20+ hours a week or meet narrow exemptions. It’s a broken system — and it’s leaving students behind. That’s why Senator Kirsten Gillibrand just reintroduced the EATS Act: a bill that would expand SNAP eligibility to low-income students and ensure no one has to go hungry just to get an education. Even with Republicans in control of Congress and actively trying to gut programs like SNAP, Senator Gillibrand is refusing to back down. She’s fighting to defend basic human dignity and build a country where every student, worker and family can thrive. But we need grassroots support behind her every step of the way. | | This isn’t just a policy fight. It’s a values fight. And while Republican leadership may try to stall or block progress, we’re building the grassroots pressure needed to push forward anyway. Thank you for taking action, Team KG for NY * =

body:
Some Idaho Sheriffs are fully on board with ICE. Why not ALL?

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..moAZYx_ZLiykIX09Gnyan2FNv-Yz7SFCKTtjUWWuKbo?) for more

# [Why Canyon County Needs to Follow the Lead of Owhyee County](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=170380267&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwMzgwMjY3LCJpYXQiOjE3NTQ1ODg4MTQsImV4cCI6MTc1NzE4MDgxNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIxMTQ4MjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.nmlWOE_v3tB5fpj8GIEjEY9h-TWToL7pcs1BfFcKQKo)
### Some Idaho Sheriffs are fully on board with ICE. Why not ALL?
Aug 7
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=170380267&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwMzgwMjY3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NDU4ODgxNCwiZXhwIjoxNzU3MTgwODE0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjExNDgyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.9W6375GahKIpDfCmjTnfxHYNm64DpdfqgnVG248mf74&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=170380267&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwMzgwMjY3LCJpYXQiOjE3NTQ1ODg4MTQsImV4cCI6MTc1NzE4MDgxNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIxMTQ4MjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.nmlWOE_v3tB5fpj8GIEjEY9h-TWToL7pcs1BfFcKQKo&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1f37dacf-dce9-4ec9-b27a-11c4f3e7e2d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I recently saw this post [on X](https://substack.com/redirect/ae25d791-1960-440f-90cd-f56645dbaa25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b55a304e-53b0-44b4-851f-2b8171a36032?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Now, as someone who pushed a bill just a few months ago to mandate 287(g) for ALL Idaho counties, I have some thoughts...
287(g) boosts public safety by letting sheriffs like Kieran Donahue in Canyon County partner with ICE to deport criminal aliens who threaten our communities.
The idea that 287(g) advocates don't get how it works is nonsense; it's about targeted enforcement, not mass roundups, and it aligns perfectly with Donahue's mission on the NSA Border Security Committee to keep Canyon County safe.
The claim that 287(g) is just a jail-based program and "no beds equals no enforcement" misses the mark. The Jail Enforcement Model (JEM) processes aliens in custody, but 287(g) also includes the Warrant Service Officer (WSO) model, where officers serve ICE warrants with minimal detention, as ICE takes custody within 48 hours. Then there's the Task Force Model (TFM), which operates in the community, like at DUI checkpoints, without tying up jail beds. Owyhee County, with a tiny sheriff's office of 12 deputies, signed a TFM agreement in February 2025 despite limited resources, showing this IS DOABLE in Idaho!
Canyon County's jail is at 93% capacity but 287(g) can work now through WSO or TFM while Donahue fights for more space. Saying Sheriff Donahue's letting 700 plus walk free daily, including violent offenders, because there's no room, and that you need a new jail before holding for ICE, paints half the picture. A 287(g) agreement would actually help by prioritizing criminal aliens for ICE custody, freeing up beds for local offenders.
The WSO model requires just eight hours of training, lets officers execute warrants without long-term detention, and TFM focuses on field enforcement. Power and Gooding Counties are already on board with 287(g), proving it's not just about beds!
Donahue's pushing for a new jail through bonds and local option taxes. Why not add 287(g) to reduce strain now? The program targets serious criminals like human smugglers or drug dealers, not random immigrants. WSO or TFM model lets Canyon County start now, like Owyhee did, without waiting for a new jail.
The claim that it only works with jail space ignores WSO's minimal detention needs and TFM's community focus. 287(g) can process aliens already in custody (JEM) or execute warrants (WSO), reducing the jail load by transferring them to ICE which prioritizes deportations. Saying you can't hold for ICE when you can't hold for your county overlooks how 287(g) eases the burden. JEM identifies criminal aliens in jail, and ICE takes them, freeing space. WSO is even lighter; serve the warrant, ICE handles the rest. Owyhee's TFM deal shows small counties can manage. 287(g) is a tool to help, not a hurdle.
The idea that the problem is infrastructure, not enforcement, is only partly true. WSO and TFM models don't need a big facility. Enforcement can start now, as seen in Owyhee, Power, and Gooding, while Donahue pushes for a permanent fix. Deporting criminal aliens reduces jail pressure - a win-win. Yes, the program isn't free; ICE covers training, but local agencies pay salaries and detention costs. Still, the cost of inaction is higher. Donahue's flagged cartel-driven crime costing lives; 287(g) targets those players. SCAAP funds can offset detention costs, and WSO's low training requirement (eight hours) isn't a fiscal drain.
Compared to the 5 million dollars some counties spent, Canyon County can start small with WSO or TFM. Donahue's secured ARPA funds for a new sheriff's HQ; so why not leverage similar strategies for 287(g)?
Also, the claim that Idaho's state surplus exists while state inmates clog county jails at half cost, and the public blames sheriffs, has truth, but 287(g) could be part of the fix. State inmates strain Canyon County's jail, but deporting criminal aliens via 287(g) frees up space. WSO or TFM lets him act NOW as other Idaho counties have.
Build the jail, sure, but WSO and TFM work today right now.
**Get 287(g) now to keep Canyon County safe.**

---

clean_body: Wow. This is incredible. A few days ago, we emailed you about Marjorie Taylor Greene’s ridiculous gun giveaway. If you need a reminder, she’s raffling off an $10,058 semi-automatic version of a military machine gun for her donors: We were fed up. We then asked you to chip in just $10 to help us fight back against extremists like her. Well, that turned out to be one of the best emails of the year. Hundreds of you chipped in to show that Americans are united to defeat the gun lobby. And folks, the donations are still coming in — take a look: Marjorie Taylor Greene has been one of the NRA’s top allies. She’s using her position in Congress to help gun industry CEOs profit and make our communities less safe. But now, thanks to your grassroots donations, we can continue fighting back to defeat extremists like her and elect real gun safety champions. name: NOT BUYIN' IT
subject: "Coding error" or a cover-up?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ISAIAH MARTIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/IRM_wrapper-email.jpg]
friend, hey — it’s Isaiah Martin.
Let’s get something straight:
A huge chunk of the U.S. Constitution — the parts about congressional powers, state rights, and due process — suddenly disappeared from the Library of Congress website.
Their explanation?
A “coding error.”
Maybe it was.
Or maybe, just maybe, it was part of a plan to make it easier for the Trump administration to suspend habeas corpus — the very right that protects people from being detained without cause.
Because if no one can find the law, how can anyone defend themselves against it?
It’s not paranoia. It’s a pattern:
→ Trump has already talked about rounding up immigrants en masse.
→ His allies are passing “America First” loyalty tests for teachers.
→ Governors are threatening to arrest legislators who dissent.
→ And now? Poof. The legal protections keeping people free? Gone from the official website.
This is what authoritarianism looks like. Quiet, creeping, and cloaked in bureaucracy.
We’re fighting back. But we need you in this fight — urgently.
→ Rush a donation now and help defend democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]

Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
Let’s be clear: habeas corpus isn’t just some old Latin phrase. It’s the line between freedom and tyranny . If they’re willing to erase that line from the record, they’re willing to cross it in real life.
Let’s stop them.
In the fight,
Isaiah Martin
Texas’s 18th Congressional District

subject: I need to hear directly from top supporters like you -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Friend, it's Chuck Schumer with an urgent request.

Donald Trump wants autocracy, not democracy -- and we need to fight every day to stop that from happening. But _defeating_ Trump's allies to _halt_ his extreme MAGA agenda will take hard work and smart strategy.

[**Throughout my years in leadership, I've seen firsthand how valuable it is for the DSCC to receive up-to-the-minute input from supporters like you. So please, will you take the Democratic Strategy Survey today to help determine our strongest path to victory?**](http://go.dscc.org/go/21954?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250807-ChuckSchumer-SchumerStratSurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250807-ChuckSchumer-SchumerStratSurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=20952%2E9716520%2EwB6Inq)

| | [ENTER SURVEY](http://go.dscc.org/go/21954?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250807-ChuckSchumer-SchumerStratSurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250807-ChuckSchumer-SchumerStratSurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=20952%2E9716520%2EwB6Inq)
---

Trump's first six months were disastrous, but we know he's only getting worse. From the moment he was sworn in, **everything Trump's done with his Republican allies can be boiled down to this: MAGA billionaires win, American families lose.**

The Trump administration is costing us jobs, threatening our Constitution, running Social Security and Medicaid into the ground -- and that's just the tip of the iceberg.

We know the best way to fight Trump's extremism is to elect Democrats to the Senate -- and we need your input to achieve that goal. **Winning elections takes every last one of us doing our part and making our voices heard, and that’s why I need to hear directly from top supporters like you.**

I know you support the fight for our democracy, [**so now's your chance to join in. If you're ready to chart a better course forward, will you spend a few minutes taking the DSCC's Democratic Strategy Survey before it closes at midnight?**](http://go.dscc.org/go/21954?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250807-ChuckSchumer-SchumerStratSurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250807-ChuckSchumer-SchumerStratSurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=20952%2E9716520%2EwB6Inq)

| [ENTER SURVEY](http://go.dscc.org/go/21954?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250807-ChuckSchumer-SchumerStratSurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250807-ChuckSchumer-SchumerStratSurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=20952%2E9716520%2EwB6Inq)
---

Anyone counting Democrats out is dead wrong, because I know with the help of this incredible team, we can flip seats on our pathway back to the majority.

Thank you for making your voice heard,

Chuck

[](http://go.dscc.org/go/21954?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250807-ChuckSchumer-SchumerStratSurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250807-ChuckSchumer-SchumerStratSurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=20952%2E9716520%2EwB6Inq)

[**P.S. Don't wait another second -- let's build on our strategy now! >>**](http://go.dscc.org/go/21954?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250807-ChuckSchumer-SchumerStratSurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250807-ChuckSchumer-SchumerStratSurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=20952%2E9716520%2EwB6Inq)

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
| |

The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: WTF?! Capitol riot inciter now helping run the Department of Justice
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Demand Trump Fire the DOJ official who told Jan 6th thugs to "kill" police](https://default.salsalabs.org/T029e78e7-6105-4897-a8ef-02ad0eb88a8a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8a4315c0-bfb1-4aab-8b09-d813b42af319/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | WTF? Just reported, from [NPR](https://default.salsalabs.org/T57f6ce97-ea18-421a-a1ec-db9ced386c2f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[:](https://default.salsalabs.org/T04ed770d-b425-4a63-bc81-3feca6011e35/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _" Less than five years after urging rioters to "kill" police at the Capitol, a former Jan. 6 defendant is working as a senior adviser for the Department of Justice .... [in the transcript] __he acknowledged that he repeatedly yelled "kill 'em" as officers were being attacked" _

And of course, the Trump DOJ still thinks he's just swell, calling him a "valued member of the Justice Department and we appreciate his contributions to our team." To hell with that. This guy needs to be fired immediately. There is no way someone who did this can be a member of the department responsible for "justice" \-- even in the dystopian nightmare version in DOJ right now. And if Trump doesn't, let him be forced to explain why every time he spews BS that he "supports the police." [**Add your name: Demand Trump Fire the DOJ official who told Jan 6th thugs to kill police**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T958f252f-5eda-40a3-a1e4-749395dd4952/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Pennsylvania Working Families Party
subject: Your PA WFP Newsletter: 08-06-2025
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pennsylvania Working Families Party
body:
The State Budget is dangerously late, we’re building our Election Captains Program, and more. | | | Peter, Welcome back to the PA WFP’s monthly newsletter, your go-to source for major wins, critical updates, and ways to get involved as we build working-class power across the Commonwealth. Let’s dig in.
## 🗳️ Election Captains Blitz
[](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMeuoY4oxd8u65NblXtq05TkCZ9N8fg0kAtBP62Jdy2r4qHWiLwiMiOiY7J1VKjtAbHj3otoO4viBiRlCLP1JoUCa4lRF4K5bpmWworUkNgvwLug_0WqfZl7cwL4wUw_Wbp1BEVZQmJYyexU2JytLgiqNFF45Lzk6Pk-6hu-4YPqqpImIgAyThhoJSr_29QkwKEKwdoM7bwdCsvHn2kq336KSXdeE6D06mGp3Pxmt0CUV276rhbCS18tQyWQzx_t-ug/4iu/4OGRJb_2RAmmVxTiLNvcjw/h0/h001.5c41sHnStr61mpnjnAyJgkr1R3XocEXDjXoC1QGJxYk) This spring, we built progressive power by organizing our communities across Philadelphia, the Lehigh Valley, and Allegheny County. Election Captains are WFP activists who talk to neighbors in the few blocks around their home, listening to their concerns and engaging them in the electoral process. We are building on this success as we look forward to November’s General Election, and we are kicking off our Fall Election Captains Program in Philly on September 6th! **[Sign up here.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMeuoY4oxd8u65NblXtq05TkCZ9N8fg0kAtBP62Jdy2r4qHWiLwiMiOiY7J1VKjtAbHj3otoO4viBiRlCLP1JoUDo13PkCWtTn5ZJMnePGm-u0j1Z3SUotByXPJ6kaZbAsWKggSVVHbIc84b36IG-XZsyqvCbQ4OMLpjTlFUbJ5_C9ZKanxBgNa4sMJWGeiTO77UseG_Iu--I8qr2wAzRX0Vd1qmyvKjDXFPAuowORt3T1O5iC2rt9yAAYk5cC6EFkA/4iu/4OGRJb_2RAmmVxTiLNvcjw/h1/h001.gxrN0Gfi26F5Z2B-B0f4smPWKdhVGcibxE63vt3ubAs)** If you’re in the Lehigh Valley, **[we have our Fall launch on September 7th.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMeuoY4oxd8u65NblXtq05TmOvwxnlVjhAelpdrxQq7Z2d7E_4usouzYo3ofteYea-MJCcJ2WmhMi8GMvZdsb2pf0qlNqIkOXiNfxVKgqkvNDPzWjXH5Z88HmuaRMmCCjN4m0dyViRsjn-KkEBefQOuyS2Kjare_MtzjpamDZP_1Y0_862lCQCJpNCzl51CYSsLZlvQrUCNxTF8NRL7iCdX-nVQVjs9_nvRQMSrvYnyqV19gjJqNRb6IXVOH-S1PX9w/4iu/4OGRJb_2RAmmVxTiLNvcjw/h2/h001.ieeiZo2yRmoomswcJNMxl5pprZm2W_K5ZJNdxyYiZmA)**
## 🏦 State Budget Status Update
**As of today, the budget is over a month late.** Payments are being missed for our schools, health centers, transit and more. Last week we were proud to stand alongside our labor friends and say it loud and clear: **WE NEED HARRISBURG TO DO ITS JOB.** Peter, call Republican Senate Leadership today and demand a budget that funds public education, protects our healthcare, and invests in working people, not political games:
* Senator Joe Pittman, Majority Leader: (724) 357-0151
* Senator Kim Ward, President Pro Tempore: (724) 600-7002
* Senator Scott Martin, Appropriations Chair: (717) 397-1309

## 💰 Raise the Wage
**Background:** PA WFP is proud to be part of the Raise the Wage Coalition, which this year has been focused on raising the statewide minimum wage to $15 and giving municipalities the ability to set their own wages. Together we’ve passed municipal resolutions across the state, written op-eds, and lobbied almost every single house and senate member and the State House has passed a bill raising the wage. **Where we’re at now:** Senate Republicans have introduced a bill to raise the minimum wage to $9 in 2026 and up to $11 in 2028, a laughable amount. **[We are asking you to reach out to your legislator and say that we are worth more than that — and we should have the ability to set out own wages.
](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39flXHMmeMQ4GTaibnjUGBRMdJziQYq9L7TCLxkuprwbG-rRj07vGVN0Ol6xw9a8LXBM574PfRcOOtrOkedznOiU_gLUWUksRrLfALyELNjy2nH_ejEAVYKlOeBXkT3pGNIXCkIkzELMmwAzNe9Q1eZK_gNyafY57Afz-obiIyXJrrhl4nhmDVKY1JCz_FEl-Y69wUQ1iqL6Tp5TyG66cwBRpUzllr_Hqmm3TV7Y0-mMaB4SK-oHN15LujB1bQE_Pr_ZFDm89rES3FT0l-cAx79/4iu/4OGRJb_2RAmmVxTiLNvcjw/h3/h001.ool5z9V8MAxOE44onpkV-YMpBHkj-vGKpWfZ7F0fruI)** **[Contact Your Legislator](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39flXHMmeMQ4GTaibnjUGBRMdJziQYq9L7TCLxkuprwbG-rRj07vGVN0Ol6xw9a8LXBM574PfRcOOtrOkedznOiuXcIfpj6rCY4-86Yw5VfzmvUUNNm1Z-Nm0WvWllOzGghbGe3k6lI5Ev7vUhka6lStRLjUJscedFswvizKOkspgPWH2k8QcZqJhtjqZ3rWAYcbEolMTgJ4CIK9XTvVZ4vREuEn_u54JIBPZrZEcEBLzNm14mE72CBZ_4ToE6R5jJ-NccKh_5s7SPuPjXOgzue/4iu/4OGRJb_2RAmmVxTiLNvcjw/h4/h001.WRnDHVY7CUrWDMp3E5AzBAgOFE3kaMhc91I8VibUpQA)**
## 🚅 Mass transit at risk of a “death spiral”
Without a state budget, mass transit agencies across Pennsylvania will be forced to make dangerous cuts. For SEPTA riders, that means 20% service cuts (that’s more than 30 bus routes canceled!) and a 21.5% fare increase starting August 24th. Service cuts to Pittsburgh Regional Transit will be even more drastic. **We are staring down imminent devastation for communities across our state.** We rely on public transit to reach work, doctor’s appointments, childcare, grocery stores, and more. Mass transit is a pillar of our state’s economy. **When it is cut, everyone will suffer, not just transit riders.** **WFP and allies are continuing to fight for public transit and demand the GOP-led senate pass a fair budget.**

# Thursday, August 7, 2025
---|---
**Good afternoon,_Flyover_ readers, ** What if the next big thing in fast food wasn't a burger... but a robot? Miso Kitchen AI has spent years developing **Flippy** , an [automated fry station now](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskT2PnDAQhn8NdLsabMCmcJFotd2lTWn57AEm8geyhz3l30dcpJPSp36e-Xx_vtk3R5Hy9sMlNLwWGzCQd4zBZvxoEZmx2pKxrLxjdHXDxpTD2bgSNitATDfQN1D2ecb4-Koe-mBWRIGyRzOoaZwWEAL63ehpnoITC3gn3Qze-0mP4NfwvnhYF9-TubqCBjXoAYblHqQIs5KjWsZVKam6ETAQl3r_VSjzjmv8XV5Y776kPpqd-Wid_NaJZyeelF_Y-J6olVreC5Nvl3dB-Tw52VbO6rGTD0yOYidml45Ofr9QwkBn6uTjcBRuh6ucsbadjn8s79LhaMuf3pcyaLjJRdu_z5Fy0DCN0wDQVxOOD4qR2nydsl1jP1fn_5zAy4g_AQAA__8mUKJE) rolling out nationwide. With backing from giants like NVIDIA, Ecolab, and Amazon, and demand surging from major chains, Miso is opening its doors to investors -- but only until **Aug. 14**. This [could be a big one](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskT2PnDAQhn8NdLsabMCmcJFotd2lTWn57AEm8geyhz3l30dcpJPSp36e-Xx_vtk3R5Hy9sMlNLwWGzCQd4zBZvxoEZmx2pKxrLxjdHXDxpTD2bgSNitATDfQN1D2ecb4-Koe-mBWRIGyRzOoaZwWEAL63ehpnoITC3gn3Qze-0mP4NfwvnhYF9-TubqCBjXoAYblHqQIs5KjWsZVKam6ETAQl3r_VSjzjmv8XV5Y776kPpqd-Wid_NaJZyeelF_Y-J6olVreC5Nvl3dB-Tw52VbO6rGTD0yOYidml45Ofr9QwkBn6uTjcBRuh6ucsbadjn8s79LhaMuf3pcyaLjJRdu_z5Fy0DCN0wDQVxOOD4qR2nydsl1jP1fn_5zAy4g_AQAA__8mUKJE). -- Cole, CEO
* * *
[](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskMuOnDAQRb8Gdo38AAwLLyK12E22WVoGl6EiP5Bd9Ch_HzGJ-gtmW-dW1dX59WE-LAZM-08bQZPPxoHDzRI4k-CzBiCCYnKC7OmAYMsOlTC5q1JBqEYwMTzY9GDKLFcIz_c2b532AAJkC5qroR9mJgRrDy24V1ZaPlhvxepXOa8jbHIcvPDAVd-ivq-yiSk-ccbnzknhRiV7NfdeKamanoFDyqX7nTHRAT78yS8o3ZZjG_RBdNZG_mjE0ogF0wsqdRFrLnnNhFu9czeUy0XR1HyVDRr5hGgxNGK8hxEcXrGRz9Oie5y2UIJSDzz_883G0-KevhJvyCf2kPNk_gmRkk9s6AfOWFu0Oz8xBKzjXX-_X33VpW-2_tLibwAAAP__9CSejw) That's what NVIDIA's CEO said about robotics. And the numbers back it up. In Q4 2024, the sector raised nearly more capital than in all of 2023. name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: Voter registration work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Our voter registration work doesn't end, folks.
Despite vote-suppressing state legislatures making it harder to register to vote -- passing bills to stop organizations like ours and our partners on the ground from helping potential voters navigate the increasingly murky rules around voter registration -- we're still pulling out all the stops to bring voters into the system.
Voter registration is a critical part of grassroots efforts to protect voting rights. The more people who vote, the more our government looks like we, the people. But to get to the point where every voice is heard, we need your help.
Just $3 can help us register a new voter. Will you chip in $24 or more today to help register 8 new voters? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=080725_1&amount=24]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=080725_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=080725_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=080725_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=080725_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=080725_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=080725_1&amount=36]
Voter participation has been increasing, and young people -- a major target of opponents of voting rights -- see the importance of voting now more than ever. Voting quickly becomes a habit -- a habit our democracy sorely needs to fulfill the promise of the American dream. Overwhelming key states with new voter registrations can help turn the tide against the voter suppression laws we've seen passed the last few years.
The next election will determine whether our democracy stays mired in the darkness and conspiracy theories we hear every day or if we can reclaim our rights -- from voting to choice and more -- and march forward to a better future.
New voter registration -- at just about $3 per new voter -- can make a huge difference. Please, can you pitch in with $24 or whatever you can to help us register a wave of new voters ahead of this year's registration deadlines? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=080725_1&amount=24]
Thank you,
Voter Action Project's Registration Team
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=080725_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=080725_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

name: Voter Suppression Alert via Care in Action
subject: Stop Trump’s Texas Takeover!
body:
The fundamental fight over America’s free and fair elections is playing out right now in Texas.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112918359/562043294/664783965?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=texas-redistricting-2025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzFhZjJiYS1iOTczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1DMYfMWUx2m3f9Ez_TMrFOyC5ZPd3PKxeotKrBxdKFA=&emci=d8f9e63c-ae73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=4c1af2ba-b973-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
Trump and Republicans in Texas are undertaking a brazen plan to eliminate as many as five Democratic-held House seats by **suppressing the voices of Black and Latino voters — including many domestic and care workers – to tilt the scales of the 2026 midterm elections.**
To stop this extreme power grab, Texas Democrats in the state legislature have courageously left the state. Now Governor Abbott has promised their arrest, sued to remove one member from his seat, and Texas Senator Cornyn has called for the FBI to get involved.
**Texas Democrats are risking their jobs and their safety to protect our democracy and stop Trump’s Texas Takeover. Let’s urgently give them our support to stand strong.**
