name: Mary Trump
subject: this fight is personal for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| Friends, I never needed political pundits or psychologists to tell me that my uncle Donald shouldn’t be anywhere near the Oval Office. I spent much of my childhood in the very house where Donald grew up. The cruel, weak, and deeply insecure man who brought our democracy to the brink of disaster is the same man I have always known. _Seeing him sworn in for a second time was an absolute gut punch._ This fight is personal for me, and as more people lose their jobs or have their rights and freedoms trampled, it’s becoming personal for them, too. **I’m committed to fighting back, but I’m under no illusion about the uphill battle we face. We need everyone to speak up.[Will you split a $25 donation between my org Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton to push back against my uncle and his dangerous, hateful agenda?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112918351/562043282/-204460493?refcode=250807_MaryTrump_DDF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWQyODg5NS1iOTczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I5n2qE998nccK8wv4hdi-OMHF0xR_wsiww1zzK9PW94=)** I launched the Democracy Defense Fund to build a grassroots movement to secure our electoral system from Donald and the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it. In order to finally defeat Donald once and for all, we must:
1. _**Flip the House.** The GOP’s majority is historically small and ripe for the taking, and if we retake the House, we can put a critical check on Donald’s power._

2. _**Take Back the Senate.** We need a Democratic majority in the Senate to fight back against judicial appointments and prevent Donald from securing a generation of MAGA rule._

3. _**Take the fight to the States.** We must continue to win critical gubernatorial elections and invest in flippable down-ballot races that have the potential to push back on Donald’s dangerous agenda through state legislatures._

4. _**Win in 2025.** Virginia, New Jersey, Louisiana, and Mississippi all have important legislative elections in 2025, and both New Jersey and Virginia will also hold gubernatorial elections._

**Winning big in these races would shift the narrative of GOP dominance and give Democrats serious momentum heading into a pivotal 2026 election cycle.** [**Can I count on you to help me build and grow the grassroots network we need to fight back against Donald, Elon Musk, and the GOP? If so, please split $25 between my org Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton today!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112918354/562043285/-204460493?refcode=250807_MaryTrump_DDF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWQyODg5NS1iOTczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I5n2qE998nccK8wv4hdi-OMHF0xR_wsiww1zzK9PW94=) In solidarity, Dr. Mary L. Trump

name: Nancy Mace for Governor
subject: Nancy Mace Invites You to Mother of ALL Town Halls in Rock Hill
body:
Nancy Mace hosts Town Hall event in Rock Hill. Monday, August 11th, 2025. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/nancymace/nancy-mace-invites-you-to-mother-of-all-town-halls-in-rock-hill?e=ddc57b5ede)
---
| |
---
| |
---
| **YOU’RE INVITED TO MOTHER OF ALL TOWN HALLS WITH CONGRESSWOMAN NANCY MACE**
_Nancy Mace Hosts Town Hall Event in Rock Hill_
**ROCK HILL, SC** — South Carolina’s next governor, Nancy Mace is bringing her “Mother of All Town Halls” tour to Rock Hill.
---
| [GET TICKETS](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=5e0084044d&e=ddc57b5ede "GET TICKETS")
---
|
---
| [GET TICKETS](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=06e0462c6b&e=ddc57b5ede "GET TICKETS")
---
| South Carolina is tired of politicians who smile for the cameras, lie to your face, then vanish when it’s time to lead. Nancy Mace is not one of them.

Nancy Mace is running for Governor because South Carolina doesn’t need an empty suit - it needs a Governor who will fight for you and your values.

South Carolina needs a Governor who will drag the truth into the light and flip the tables if that’s what it takes.

South Carolina doesn’t need another politician who folds when things get tough. It needs a Governor who stands tall.
---
|
---
| [DONATE](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=5a7f9060f3&e=ddc57b5ede "DONATE")
---
| | This is a chance to hear directly from Congresswoman Nancy Mace about what matters most to South Carolinians:
* Eliminating the state income tax
* Rogue sanctuary Sheriffs and how to better assist ICE deportations
* Protecting women and children
* Education, school choice and vocational training not indoctrination
* Being on the brink of a massive energy crisis
* Putting **South Carolina FIRST**

President Trump needs an America First leader who will stand with him, fight for his agenda, and never bow to the establishment. You're invited!
---
| [GET TICKETS](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=b42a8e11e2&e=ddc57b5ede "GET TICKETS")
---
| **WHO: **Nancy Mace for Governor
**WHAT:** “Mother of All Town Halls” – Rock Hill Stop
**WHEN:** 6 PM Monday, August 11
**WHERE:** Hoppin' Rock Hill in the Railway Lounge
110 Southern St, Rock Hill, SC 29730, USA
---
| [DONATE](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=3c87c1261c&e=ddc57b5ede "DONATE")
---
| **–Team Mace**
Campaign@nancymace.org

---
|
---

Nancy Mace for Governor295 Seven Farms Dr Ste C-186Daniel Island, SC 29492-8001

body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/hUwAjv06k-UelUQJvSQ0colU5sp7bSrsPc9Rxs0lz2KGS_vus0r-mYiBKS1cPTve19c0FxpcGjlS5AEVMdgYhOHgpzQq_g61xYBwgiC_qByPhfHgJcDIKBr7Y6dLDEPNFpRtFe68HdoN5ftnax4NMyAEv3rnNSrVN1vqOvsp6ZGjEh9f4RqXfv_35ONZZCuJMBAiELYJDGcdGXBu2N4hL2QWDU6SqkzbPEzXSHCsIcT9kDaIH_SAxkzOVeivNRw__hKgCvxbJZegyOPwzljaXhYFGndGzybzPrj5bx2qoxXavODzy0vrcf7c80FXBkXEZV9CQ48GOVgyFDzmReJdfhmF9ona_WfNy7pPjHxk6fof2plJVnurb-_WvXsJcbKn4w-IA_3TQAJhE-w69vuA8dzyIo_HrD06tWsF7D-NM3jWktOqL0JQIo7tyrEiQPViYE_RYO06l6yIAhRk7EpymxXmvdToXd9-r48miATHGZewKYwmpJeKHdZqdnL7VTC_-jGWxjc2f4HQUJL-F32VWSfyWoeXfbQhkU1sOQ1kS-5v82R6sWv251YNIR2HITiaKu8KHH9hg2NQ8cpZdKX91y65qrP_GnXYa7IQsw0L7EQWtrQz4Td9JlxLLz0lRWZ7J3VxMnCrlTr5h9OJZj-afQhGPX_QKqLfGk9H5HN3OsZHMWN90UQS1I3m6l76hebADUq01uZb-F0i7pTEMJff6u0OEzzRhKYKnGL31zo2LtmBKIYruiEzrtPdx8FmbWHyRIZI-xrRK8M2v6rJZv06yH7izaHcdbhA4HMNag0UuTq57n-yLX1IV7pM5FEfTavuxVC1dHXaBnLq_ZlEYTNLRquhg51kf5VoXPOKhUzK8r9R7dQc4DMg6vZ72FoYx4g_aC7gOziSPIuWUcxGwJMdX-G92thpltjv4D6gQsISXIT3UxkF93l7U1GeJea9q7L7Ldy_h0P3J1n4SSXyYJZSlgKnfKutJK_Wkynf2-Rmbu49LKrk5et8vkmGwFPttR6wDoDDsVvXd7IgFmp-mGBMHshzNyE51PGmgLIkSPu1FDTv8oACgoCEY5hTWSrz4BYhWKLBJVqI7px9/WlOJJTphkl9FS7V70vkmToA3731RZ9gL/11)

body:
| Peter, did you see Christina's email?

If Mariannette Miller-Meeks won’t ask for your input, we will. Christina is here to listen, and this survey is your chance to be heard. **[Take a few minutes to let her know your priorities before the survey closes at midnight>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112918791/562045002/-1827007991?ms=em25_250807_Suv2_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&refcode=em25_250807_Suv2_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&source=em25_250807_Suv2_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250807_Suv2_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=txq7PS+UloB0l/2/E5qjEApbZr1WZsGGi+fQHQlFj4NOZolT0B1q8dDwVESjQTuMETTXLr5KN0aojzFZUWsNVk+MBFbqMuspkknumQg/GAX7AspD96vPkGX4t5N1AyVCapbxitejsnjHedr+BEAz8gbALPOLByhFw5An/lum6gk=&refcode2=22af7c69-bb73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmFmN2M2OS1iYjczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WhMbgi9-nrlihorHCUZT_8JDPRSnFlL1z_uw2wuryTw=&emci=83f1c1fa-9a73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=22af7c69-bb73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13891890)**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
Sender: Christina Bohannan
Date: Wed, Aug 6, 2025
Subject Line: Communication is the foundation of a good relationship [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112918792/562045003/-1827007991?ms=em25_250807_Suv2_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&refcode=em25_250807_Suv2_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&source=em25_250807_Suv2_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250807_Suv2_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=txq7PS+UloB0l/2/E5qjEApbZr1WZsGGi+fQHQlFj4NOZolT0B1q8dDwVESjQTuMETTXLr5KN0aojzFZUWsNVk+MBFbqMuspkknumQg/GAX7AspD96vPkGX4t5N1AyVCapbxitejsnjHedr+BEAz8gbALPOLByhFw5An/lum6gk=&refcode2=22af7c69-bb73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmFmN2M2OS1iYjczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WhMbgi9-nrlihorHCUZT_8JDPRSnFlL1z_uw2wuryTw=&emci=83f1c1fa-9a73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=22af7c69-bb73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13891890) Team,

They say the foundation of any strong relationship is good communication. And I’ve been thinking about that a lot lately, because here in Iowa’s 1st District, that communication has completely broken down.

It’s August recess, a time when members of Congress are supposed to come home, listen to the people they represent, and answer questions about what they’ve been doing in Washington. But Mariannette Miller-Meeks is nowhere to be found. I have seen zero effort to check in with the folks she was elected to serve.

_Her silence says a lot._ How are you supposed to be held accountable if you never show up? How can anyone feel heard if there’s no one listening?

**That’s not the kind of representation I believe in and not the kind of representative I want to be. I’m running for Congress because I believe leadership should be a two-way street, and I want to be a voice for you in Washington.**

This summer, I’ve been doing just that by making stops at county fairs, visiting rural hospitals, meeting with farmers, and having honest conversations with people across this district.

And now, I’d love to hear from _you_ directly. **[I want to know what you’re talking about around your kitchen table, what you wish Washington would finally pay attention to, and what kind of leadership you think Iowa deserves. Will you take a few minutes to fill out my Priorities Survey and let me know what’s on your mind?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112918793/562045004/-1827007991?ms=em25_250807_Suv2_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&refcode=em25_250807_Suv2_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&source=em25_250807_Suv2_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250807_Suv2_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=txq7PS+UloB0l/2/E5qjEApbZr1WZsGGi+fQHQlFj4NOZolT0B1q8dDwVESjQTuMETTXLr5KN0aojzFZUWsNVk+MBFbqMuspkknumQg/GAX7AspD96vPkGX4t5N1AyVCapbxitejsnjHedr+BEAz8gbALPOLByhFw5An/lum6gk=&refcode2=22af7c69-bb73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmFmN2M2OS1iYjczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WhMbgi9-nrlihorHCUZT_8JDPRSnFlL1z_uw2wuryTw=&emci=83f1c1fa-9a73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=22af7c69-bb73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13891890)** | **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112918794/562045005/-1827007991?ms=em25_250807_Suv2_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&refcode=em25_250807_Suv2_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&source=em25_250807_Suv2_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250807_Suv2_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=txq7PS+UloB0l/2/E5qjEApbZr1WZsGGi+fQHQlFj4NOZolT0B1q8dDwVESjQTuMETTXLr5KN0aojzFZUWsNVk+MBFbqMuspkknumQg/GAX7AspD96vPkGX4t5N1AyVCapbxitejsnjHedr+BEAz8gbALPOLByhFw5An/lum6gk=&refcode2=22af7c69-bb73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmFmN2M2OS1iYjczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WhMbgi9-nrlihorHCUZT_8JDPRSnFlL1z_uw2wuryTw=&emci=83f1c1fa-9a73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=22af7c69-bb73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13891890)**

Christina is here to listen, and this survey is your chance to be heard. \---------- Forwarded message --------- Sender: Christina Bohannan Date: Wed, Aug 6, 2025 Subject Line: Communication is the foundation of a good relationship Team, They say the foundation of any strong relationship is good communication. And I’ve been thinking about that a lot lately, because here in Iowa’s 1st District, that communication has completely broken down. It’s August recess, a time when members of Congress are supposed to come home, listen to the people they represent, and answer questions about what they’ve been doing in Washington. But Mariannette Miller-Meeks is nowhere to be found. I have seen zero effort to check in with the folks she was elected to serve. Her silence says a lot. How are you supposed to be held accountable if you never show up? How can anyone feel heard if there’s no one listening? That’s not the kind of representation I believe in and not the kind of representative I want to be. I’m running for Congress because I believe leadership should be a two-way street, and I want to be a voice for you in Washington. This summer, I’ve been doing just that by making stops at county fairs, visiting rural hospitals, meeting with farmers, and having honest conversations with people across this district. And now, I’d love to hear from you directly. | With appreciation, Christina Bohannan Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, engineer, and former state representative. She's running for Congress to defeat Mariannette Miller-Meeks and flip IA-01 blue. body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33547?t=1011&refcode=email-20250807_r_v&akid=9144%2E5885482%2E1pqgCT ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Trump’s shocking efforts to steal the midterms and ensure Republicans
maintain control of Congress are going national.

Today, JD Vance is heading to Indiana to press lawmakers there to take up
Texas’s redistricting playbook. But Trump’s not stopping there, exerting
massive pressure on Florida and Missouri to do the same.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33547?source=email-20250807_r&t=1061&akid=9144%2E5885482%2E1pqgCT ]Headline: Republicans' next redistricting target: Missouri

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33547?source=email-20250807_r&t=1062&akid=9144%2E5885482%2E1pqgCT ]Headline: Florida GOP, DeSantis may follow Texas' lead

This isn’t a drill. If Trump has his way, the fix will be in before the
voters even cast a single ballot in the midterms.

Our Revolution is meeting this threat head-on. We’re mobilizing local
rapid-response teams, raising the alarm to build mass public outrage, and
standing with state reps to ensure they’re ready to fight back and stop
this existential threat.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33547?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250807_rnd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9144%2E5885482%2E1pqgCT ]**Donate now to fuel our rapid-response organizing in key states like
Florida and Missouri to stop Trump’s authoritarian takeover. Every dollar
strengthens our defenses and allows us to grow our grassroots reach to
block this gerrymandering coup across the country.**

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33547?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250807_rnd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9144%2E5885482%2E1pqgCT ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33547?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250807_rnd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9144%2E5885482%2E1pqgCT ]CHIP IN $22

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33547?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250807_rnd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9144%2E5885482%2E1pqgCT ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33547?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250807_rnd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9144%2E5885482%2E1pqgCT ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Right now, Trump and his loyalists are putting non-stop pressure on GOP
lawmakers across the country to take their Texas redistricting scheme
national. We know their strategy: silence voters, silence lawmakers, and
silence any last pocket of dissent.

Bernie is calling it like it is, reminding Trump that in this country, you
have to EARN votes – not steal them.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33547?source=email-20250807_r&t=1060&akid=9144%2E5885482%2E1pqgCT ]Bernie tweet shaming Trump for thinking he's entitled to five more
congressional seats in Texas

But it’s up to ALL of us to hold the line. And do it fast.

Republican leaders are betting that Democrats will be caught flatfooted.
Which is why we’re building the infrastructure for non-stop resistance
RIGHT NOW: recruiting new members, training local activists, and working
with progressive leaders across the country to fight back.

To win this fight, we need **the overwhelming public outrage only an
energized movement can fuel**. We need to be out in the streets, calling
lawmakers, packing town halls, and flooding newsrooms with our unified
stand for democracy.

Texas Democrats are showing the rest of the country what to do by risking
everything - including arrest - to flee the state and break quorum. And
Our Revolution organizers are hitting the ground running in Indiana,
Missouri, and Florida to get ready to do the same.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33547?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250807_rnd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9144%2E5885482%2E1pqgCT ]Can you urgently pitch in now to help? Every dollar we raise is a shield
against Trump’s redistricting power grab and a lifeline to save our
democracy.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

name: Team Hick
subject: end the trade war now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
Trump says his tariff-taxes are about putting America first. In reality, he’s driving our economy toward recession:

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112919217/562046747/1435897075?refcode=email_080725_trade&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjA0ODBhNi1iYzczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xOUer2yR6SklhsJXif3djH3pQ6m5ULv3DmA-i7EH_nM=&emci=322d58dc-e972-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0b0480a6-bc73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7280715) Folks, Trump and the Republicans say that tariff-taxes are about putting America first. _**In reality, they’re driving our economy toward recession:**_ **FIRST:** Donald Trump unveiled reckless tariffs on almost every nation on the planet, inciting a global trade war and instantly sending markets into a panic. **THEN:** Trump negotiated so-called “deals” with other nations, often settling on higher tariff rates than before he returned to office. _That’s not a deal, it’s just another tax on U.S. consumers._ **NOW:** **Trump has tanked the U.S. dollar’s buying power, stunted the job market, and is continuing to double down with threats of higher tariffs if countries don’t conform to his personal policy agenda.** These reckless tariff-taxes are raising prices on Coloradans, crushing our small businesses with uncertainty, and making it harder for working families to get by. Simply put: **this trade war is unsustainable, and it needs to end now.** But with Republicans in Congress abdicating their Constitutional responsibility and letting Trump push our economy straight into a recession, it’s critical that we re-elect John and take back the Senate in 2026 to end this pointless trade war and provide a _real_ check on the president’s authority. **[So please, if you’re with us in that fight, can you chip in a couple bucks to John’s campaign today and make sure Democrats can take back the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112919218/562046754/1506335976?refcode=email_080725_trade&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjA0ODBhNi1iYzczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xOUer2yR6SklhsJXif3djH3pQ6m5ULv3DmA-i7EH_nM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112919220/562046755/1506335976?express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&refcode=email_080725_trade&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjA0ODBhNi1iYzczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xOUer2yR6SklhsJXif3djH3pQ6m5ULv3DmA-i7EH_nM=)

clean_body: Trump says his tariff-taxes are about putting America first. In reality, he’s driving our economy toward recession: Folks, Trump and the Republicans say that tariff-taxes are about putting America first. In reality, they’re driving our economy toward recession: FIRST: Donald Trump unveiled reckless tariffs on almost every nation on the planet, inciting a global trade war and instantly sending markets into a panic. THEN: Trump negotiated so-called “deals” with other nations, often settling on higher tariff rates than before he returned to office. That’s not a deal, it’s just another tax on U.S. consumers. NOW: Trump has tanked the U.S. dollar’s buying power, stunted the job market, and is continuing to double down with threats of higher tariffs if countries don’t conform to his personal policy agenda. These reckless tariff-taxes are raising prices on Coloradans, crushing our small businesses with uncertainty, and making it harder for working families to get by. Simply put: this trade war is unsustainable, and it needs to end now. But with Republicans in Congress abdicating their Constitutional responsibility and letting Trump push our economy straight into a recession, it’s critical that we re-elect John and take back the Senate in 2026 to end this pointless trade war and provide a real check on the president’s authority. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thanks, Team Hick | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. name: Team NDRC
subject: How Texas went from blue to red
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Donate to stop gerrymandering in Texas and beyond
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112919774/562048294/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRiMTE3NDI5LWJkNzMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0lJli2Rc3QGjeGxoECJAPhu6S-0X3V9P3D2H5K8NSms=&emci=9bcbd06f-ad73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=db117429-bd73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)
---

Buckle up, Peter — we’re climbing into a time machine. The year is 2004, and believe it or not, a majority of Texas’s seats in the U.S. House of Representatives are held by Democrats. **That’s right: just over 20 years ago, Texas’s House delegation was blue!** Then, everything began to change — and not by accident. Republicans in the Texas legislature and the U.S. House delegation began working together on a mid-decade redraw of the state’s congressional districts. They pushed through a new, manipulated map ahead of the 2004 elections — and the results were brutal. **The gerrymandered map helped the GOP swing Texas’s U.S. House delegation from a 17-15 disadvantage to a 21-11 advantage.** And just like that, Republicans had a blueprint for redistricting to consolidate power nationwide that they are still following to this day. In fact, the fight during the current special legislative session takes that approach to a new extreme. It’s a flagrant attempt by Donald Trump and Texas Republicans to further tilt the scales and help them hold control of the U.S. House during the 2026 midterm elections. [**We have to stop these authoritarian power grabs — and that means funding the work we’re doing in Texas, Ohio, and other state-level battles to stop gerrymandering and support fair maps. clean_body: Donate to stop gerrymandering in Texas and beyond | Buckle up, Peter — we’re climbing into a time machine. The year is 2004, and believe it or not, a majority of Texas’s seats in the U.S. House of Representatives are held by Democrats. That’s right: just over 20 years ago, Texas’s House delegation was blue! Then, everything began to change — and not by accident. Republicans in the Texas legislature and the U.S. House delegation began working together on a mid-decade redraw of the state’s congressional districts. They pushed through a new, manipulated map ahead of the 2004 elections — and the results were brutal. The gerrymandered map helped the GOP swing Texas’s U.S. House delegation from a 17-15 disadvantage to a 21-11 advantage. And just like that, Republicans had a blueprint for redistricting to consolidate power nationwide that they are still following to this day. In fact, the fight during the current special legislative session takes that approach to a new extreme. It’s a flagrant attempt by Donald Trump and Texas Republicans to further tilt the scales and help them hold control of the U.S. House during the 2026 midterm elections. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = President Trump sees the writing on the wall: The American people are very unhappy with what’s going on in our country. And he’s planning to do whatever it takes to hold onto power and make sure voters who disagree with his agenda can’t make their voices heard. The 2026 midterms are our best opportunity to stop Trump’s anti-democracy agenda in its tracks. But to make sure the will of the people prevails on Election Day, we must put in the work right now in places like Texas, where decisions are now being made that could shape election outcomes across the states as well as the balance of power in Congress. = Stay tuned for more updates, Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. name: Tobias Read
subject: Audit Report: Critical investments wasted in improper payments and wasteful spending. It’s time to fix this >>
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250807em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250807em]
Hi, it's Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
When I ran for office, I ran on a platform of government accountability and efficiency. I am working hard to keep that promise.
My office conducted an investigation that uncovered troubling waste in Oregon’s Preschool Promise program: Money meant to support our youngest learners and their families was mismanaged, misused, and in some cases, never even reached the children who needed it most.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250807em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250807em]
We found:
* $1.4 million in wasteful spending — including payments to unopened classrooms and programs serving just 1 or 2 children.

* $1.5 million in improper payments made without required documentation.

* 53 providers flagged for elevated risk of fraud.
This isn’t just a spreadsheet problem — this is about trust. And more importantly, it's about Oregon kids and families. That’s why my office is working to establish stronger oversight, clearer reporting rules, and real accountability from the state agencies and providers involved. But I need your voice behind me.
Will you add your name to the petition urging increased oversight and transparency over Oregon’s early childhood programs? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/B_U0FqFZyE6P2rXeXS2gdA2]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/B_U0FqFZyE6P2rXeXS2gdA2]
Together, we can protect public dollars — and ensure they’re reaching the children and families they were meant for.
Thank you,
Tobias Read
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250807EM]

PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States

name: Indiana Democrats
subject: Stop the GOP Steal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, Today, Republicans took their quest to rig the 2026 election a step further by sending Vice President JD Vance to Indianapolis to start another mid-cycle redistricting. Less than a week after Texas Democrats fled their state to break quorum and stop Republicans from stealing the 2026 midterm elections, Trump and the GOP turned their attention to the Hoosier State, where Democrats hold two of the nine congressional seats. _**JD Vance slipped into Governor Braun’s office through a back door, where they literally hid behind a black cloak for their meeting. Then he snuck out just as quickly as he came in.**_ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112920672/562050981/-1275564556?refcode=250807steal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmE0MGQyMC1jMDczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uyYEtwl6TDnFt4YKUf_c4RXvOUdc5HjyUnThjYYAVBg=)** Republicans are hiding because they know what they’re doing is unpopular. **[[Rush a Donation to Support Indiana Democrats and stop the rigging of the midterms!]](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112920673/562050982/-1275564556?refcode=250807steal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmE0MGQyMC1jMDczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uyYEtwl6TDnFt4YKUf_c4RXvOUdc5HjyUnThjYYAVBg=)** They could spend their time fixing Indiana’s crumbling healthcare or fighting out of control utility bills and grocery prices, but instead they’re choosing to rig the next election. _**They know the only way they’ll win is if they cheat.**_ Indiana Democrats, including Reps. Frank Mrvan (D-Highland) and André Carson (D-Indianapolis) are fighting to make sure this doesn’t happen. Hundreds of Hoosiers gathered at the Indiana Statehouse to protest Vance’s arrival, and they need our help. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112920674/562050983/-1275564556?refcode=250807steal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmE0MGQyMC1jMDczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uyYEtwl6TDnFt4YKUf_c4RXvOUdc5HjyUnThjYYAVBg=)****[Hundreds of Hoosiers showed up at the statehouse today to join the fight against this unprecedented GOP power grab. We need your help too. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112920675/562050984/-1275564556?refcode=250807steal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmE0MGQyMC1jMDczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uyYEtwl6TDnFt4YKUf_c4RXvOUdc5HjyUnThjYYAVBg=)** Make a contribution to the Indiana Democratic Party today to help us stop the Republicans from stealing the next election. **[[Rush a Donation to Support Indiana Democrats!]](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112920676/562050985/-1275564556?refcode=250807steal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmE0MGQyMC1jMDczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uyYEtwl6TDnFt4YKUf_c4RXvOUdc5HjyUnThjYYAVBg=)** In solidarity,

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: Will you hurt or heal? Build or break down?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
It’s been a difficult few months. Someone recently asked me, **"Are we screwed?"**
What is important in moments like these is not to think in binaries. Good/bad, screwed/not screwed.
There is no doubt that things are bad. Some things, really bad. And they may likely get worse.
But that does not preclude the fact that slowly but surely, some good can be growing as other things fall apart. This is not some syrupy sweet silver lining case for optimism. Rather, it is really about a choice all of us will have to make in life, either consciously or unconsciously: **will I be a person who is safe and creates good for others?**
Will I be a person who stands up? Will I be a person who primarily minds my business and serves myself or try to be part of something bigger? Or will I just be a passive, “neutral” observer of it all?
What I sometimes tell my staff is that **the world we are fighting for is already here**. It exists in small spaces, places, and communities. We don’t have to deal with the insurmountable burden of coming up with novel solutions to the world’s problems.
Much of our work is about scaling existing solutions, many created by small, committed groups of people, that others haven’t seen or don’t even know are around the corner. So while we can’t change the world in a day, we _can_ and _do_ have the power to make our own world within our own four walls, or on our own blocks.
We can grow from there with the faith that somewhere out there, everywhere, others are doing the same. **And we will come together.**
That’s why if you’re a parent, how you parent matters. If you’re a neighbor, how you are a neighbor matters. Many of our biggest problems are results of massively scaled up isolation from others. That means many of our solutions can be found in creating community.
Ultimately, we live in this world and in this time. We have no choice but to engage in it while we’re here. Even running away is a form of engagement. So will your engagement hurt or heal? Build or bring down?
There is no neutral choice, so we can at least do our best to make good ones and learn and do better the next day.
You are allowed to be scared. To grieve. To be angry. But you are also allowed to create good, to be soft, and enjoy the small reprieves. Struggle lasts as long as we do.
In solidarity,
Alexandria
[Help us continue the fight by making a grassroots donation.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250807.7m_OSs&refcode=em20250807-9494-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9494%2E2526796%2ETK9nDI)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250807.7m_OSs&refcode=em20250807-9494-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=9494%2E2526796%2ETK9nDI)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250807?refcode=em20250807-9494-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=9494_2526796_TK9nDI&akid=9494%2E2526796%2ETK9nDI)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250807-9494-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=9494%2E2526796%2ETK9nDI)**

To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

Dear Peter,
---
Last month, we entered Canada unaware of what was in store—government persecution and media attacks. And now, in just a few weeks, **WE’RE HEADING BACK!** But the backlash wasn’t from everyday Canadians. We’ve had countless individuals reach out in support of _Let Us Worship_ —not just believers, but even non-believers who were ashamed of their government’s actions. Canadian lawyers have taken up our cause, sending legal warnings to cities that have already pulled our upcoming permits. This is BIG! We are witnessing God MOVE in Canada, and we are expectant to see Him move again! _**Watch the legal update on our upcoming Canadian tour stops ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎**_

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Peter, Last month, we entered Canada unaware of what was in store—government persecution and media attacks. And now, in just a few weeks, WE’RE HEADING BACK! But the backlash wasn’t from everyday Canadians. We’ve had countless individuals reach out in support of Let Us Worship —not just believers, but even non-believers who were ashamed of their government’s actions. Canadian lawyers have taken up our cause, sending legal warnings to cities that have already pulled our upcoming permits. This is BIG! We are witnessing God MOVE in Canada, and we are expectant to see Him move again! Watch the legal update on our upcoming Canadian tour stops ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎ | | Be in prayer for us as we prepare for the second leg of the tour. 🇨🇦 WEST COAST TOURAugust 20 – WinnipegAugust 21 – SaskatoonAugust 22 – EdmontonAugust 23 – Kelowna August 24 – Abbotsford The greater the resistance, the greater the breakthrough!! Till all hear, Sean | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- INTERNATIONAL DONORS— DONATE Donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries 310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Let Us Worship | |

name: Forward Blue
subject: Condemn Abbott. Defend fair elections.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Blue, ForwardBlue
body:
Texas Governor Greg Abbott is escalating his war on democracy.
# [ ](https://action.forwardblue.net/go/5877?t=1&akid=1284%2E1041858%2EHSAWVE)
Texas Governor Greg Abbott is escalating his war on democracy.
Abbott ordered state police to arrest any Democratic lawmakers who leave the state to oppose his latest extreme redistricting plan—one designed to cement Republican power and silence voters across the state.
**Let’s be clear:** trying to jail your political opponents for standing up to gerrymandering isn’t just authoritarian—it’s un-American.
[Sign the petition ›››](https://action.forwardblue.net/signup/202508-stand-with-tx-dems/?source=em20250807-1284&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&akid=1284%2E1041858%2EHSAWVE)
---
Democratic lawmakers are doing their job by fighting to protect fair representation and prevent Republican politicians from drawing maps that rig elections. Greg Abbott’s response? Threats, intimidation, and the politics of fear.
This is a test of how far Republicans will go to cling to power—and we need to show them we won’t back down.
[**_Add your name to condemn Abbott’s threats and defend fair elections →_**](https://action.forwardblue.net/signup/202508-stand-with-tx-dems/?amount=5&source=em20250807-1284&akid=1284%2E1041858%2EHSAWVE)
[Sign the petition ›››](https://action.forwardblue.net/signup/202508-stand-with-tx-dems/?source=em20250807-1284&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&akid=1284%2E1041858%2EHSAWVE)

clean_body: Texas Governor Greg Abbott is escalating his war on democracy. Texas Governor Greg Abbott is escalating his war on democracy. Abbott ordered state police to arrest any Democratic lawmakers who leave the state to oppose his latest extreme redistricting plan—one designed to cement Republican power and silence voters across the state. Let’s be clear: trying to jail your political opponents for standing up to gerrymandering isn’t just authoritarian—it’s un-American. Democratic lawmakers are doing their job by fighting to protect fair representation and prevent Republican politicians from drawing maps that rig elections. Greg Abbott’s response? Threats, intimidation, and the politics of fear. This is a test of how far Republicans will go to cling to power—and we need to show them we won’t back down. Thanks for standing with us, Forward Blue

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: 📚✏️ Help local kids start school strong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Team Pramila is helping stuff backpacks, and we need your help by August 12!
#
Peter,
This moment demands that all of us pitch in to help one another.
**That’s why my campaign is launching a big push to provide kids with backpacks this back-to-school season — and we need your help.**
My campaign is partnering with FamilyWorks to buy new backpacks for kids in need across my district. Our team of volunteers will be there on August 12, sorting supplies and packing these new bags with crucial school supplies.
Here’s our goal:
🎒 100+ backpacks fully prepared
✏️ Stocked with pencil cases, calculators, binders, and more
📆 All donated by Wednesday, August 12
This is exactly what our campaign is about. We’ve always had a year-round organizing program because I know that being a member of Congress means you can’t just fight in DC, you need to organize within the community.
Right now, in our district — which is home to some of the wealthiest people in the country — about 10% of children are living in poverty. And Trump’s Big Ugly Betrayal Bill will only deepen this crisis, plunging more families across the country into poverty.
**That’s exactly why we need a resistance at every level. Why we need to build community that stands up for one another.**
A backpack might not sound like a big cost, but there are far too many kids who are going into the next school year without one because their parents need to decide between buying a new backpack or paying the utility bill, skyrocketing grocery costs, or rising rents.
**But I know we can help. My campaign won’t sit back while families struggle to make ends meet this back-to-school season.**
This is a community-powered effort to make sure every student in Seattle starts the school year with the necessary tools to thrive on their academic journey.
Members of our campaign team will be on-site helping to sort and assemble backpacks, but we need your help to buy the supplies.
**[Can you pitch in by making a donation to our Back to School program today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250807-1?refcode=em20250807-5314&refcode2=5314_420207_AEiWyy&akid=5314%2E420207%2EAEiWyy) Every dollar raised will go to purchasing supplies for families in our community.**
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250807-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250807-5314&refcode2=5314_420207_AEiWyy&akid=5314%2E420207%2EAEiWyy)**
Your donation will help purchase high-priority items like scientific calculators, 3-ring binders, staplers, and college-ruled paper. These are basic tools that make a big difference.
**Together, we can help hundreds of kids show up feeling confident and ready for the new school year.**
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal

---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=1&akid=5314%2E420207%2EAEiWyy)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=5314%2E420207%2EAEiWyy)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

body:
This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyUkbtu3DAQRb-G6iRQfOhRsHAibxU7BlykFChyViLAh0COtL8fKPGmTzkzB_cAc3-9zW_aeRfXdx1AmWXOZcYN1gwaoaDOAaxJ8e6dQTczymRNh5r2F9dWVpkRmFhEBartpZBjJ1tZbUpI2fLuPnaik1bbO-M9XUbRjb0GDstQOXVl0YH27ShkSxsJHOgw8L7twQxcE0HBOky5MSkWyKdGd8KSk7ZGF2wiYOXVhrgXwl8IuxF2K2CODLbZnPfFag8N2IOw27_5Yo59Txlr3KAuYFK09SNlb-uHzoXwWzGET5SKbnynTLAfrZx-Tq-vn4R1B4a5pCMbIHzacyo7GHRx_ToFsO4IhE8QtPNfS6PDrt0aCZ_-2v7ILtdsT_uEUkSISPj08Tl_vNTfv9XP71RZ2f3hvHel64mg65XdmBQq_O-2TsV-BwAA__8D8qPG) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **" The Second World Wars."**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. clean_body: This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called " The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson , this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of " The Second World Wars" on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. The " The Second World Wars" DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. Pop Acta Media | Conservative Broadcast PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

Glenn Youngkin will spend a MASSIVE seven figures on boosting Republican turnout - especially targeting key House of Delegates races. Friend, we’re ready. Thousands of grassroots donors like you have helped mom, social worker, and Democratic champion Elizabeth Guzman outraise MAGA Republican incumbent Del. Ian Lovejoy in a TOSS-UP race that could decide control of the Virginia House of Delegates. Now, big Republican money is coming to bail Lovejoy out - and we’re expecting a huge onslaught of ads, mail, and TV attacking us. While Trump wants you to think that the people he’s holding at his “Alligator Alcatraz” detention camp are criminals, many who are being detained have legal residency and NO criminal record.
Living conditions at the “detention camp” are unbearable. No legal representation, shackled for hours in the sweltering heat and swarms of mosquitoes, 32 people to a CAGE, no showers, no medications, maggot infested food, and no human rights... for people who have committed no crime. _How unAmerican!_
**We’ve identified a high-visibility billboard there on US41, the Tamiami Trail in Florida, the _only_ road leading to Alligator Alcatraz. We need to raise $3335 to post our billboard there for 4 weeks.**

body:
They know this is wrong. **_NBC KSDK 5:_ Missouri Senate leader says special session is ‘likely’ to redraw congressional map**

_"Democrats could lose one of the two seats they currently hold in the eight-member U.S. House delegation. They vow to do what they can to derail a redistricting plan."_ Peter,

Missouri Republicans are trying to rig the game, again.

They’re pushing for a special session to redo the congressional map we already fought hard to pass, not because it’s broken, but because they want to silence voters and redraw the lines to help themselves win more seats.

This is straight out of the Texas playbook, but let's be clear: **This isn’t about fairness, representation, or democracy. It’s about power and the GOP's willingness to throw out the rules to hold onto it at all costs.**

Missouri deserves leaders who put people first, not political party maps, not the president, and not their personal or political ambitions. But the truth is, if we're going to fight back, it's going to take resources. We can't afford to let the GOP's power grab go unchecked.

clean_body: They know this is wrong. NBC KSDK 5: Missouri Senate leader says special session is ‘likely’ to redraw congressional map "Democrats could lose one of the two seats they currently hold in the eight-member U.S. House delegation. They vow to do what they can to derail a redistricting plan." Peter, Missouri Republicans are trying to rig the game, again. They’re pushing for a special session to redo the congressional map we already fought hard to pass, not because it’s broken, but because they want to silence voters and redraw the lines to help themselves win more seats. This is straight out of the Texas playbook, but let's be clear: This isn’t about fairness, representation, or democracy. It’s about power and the GOP's willingness to throw out the rules to hold onto it at all costs. Missouri deserves leaders who put people first, not political party maps, not the president, and not their personal or political ambitions. But the truth is, if we're going to fight back, it's going to take resources. We can't afford to let the GOP's power grab go unchecked. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Bell = = PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI PO BOX 190669, ST LOUIS, MO 63119

# **Part 2: The Unjust Burden - How the Current System Fails Working Americans, Middle Class, Self-Employed and Small Businesses**
While the debates and protests rage against Medicaid cuts, those same protestors are not standing up against the fundamental inequities of the U.S. healthcare system for the working class, middle class, self-employed, and small businesses - They are being ignored as is incentivizing pro-active early detection programs and screenings.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..g-tiA0zNOpy1a9UZyyUIoRs7CLiWVdomPuG9jtDF5R8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=170176723)
_**High costs, lack of access to preventative care, and hidden taxes create a system that is inherently unfair and ultimately detrimental to public health.**_
This argument that employers will perpetually foot the bill comes at a cost as healthcare premiums provided by employers are very expensive and they are a wage substitute. _**This is especially the case for small business owners, the economic engine of this nation.**_
Employers with high insurance costs are less able to give raises to their employees. **High deductibles and copays are deterrents for people seeking medical care and early diagnoses of what later become serious conditions.**
We heard stories on the Congressional campaign trail of how families avoided Emergency Departments and expensive diagnostic tests including MRI's because of high copays and deductibles. They were disgusted by the unlimited services to illegals while they put their own health at risk due to financial constraints. _**We also heard stories about those who chose not to take a full time job because they would lose Husky as there was no transition to private care that upward mobility is less important.**_
Families that are already struggling to get by are foregoing medical care while their tax dollars are going to provide Medicaid to Illegal Aliens and those not working (and that have no desire to work). **This is inherently unfair.** It is also bad public policy to deny a large percentage of the working population affordable access to the preventative benefits of early intervention and treatment of disease. It is even more unfair that up to 6% of their healthcare premium costs are going to a provider tax that subsidizes the Medicaid system.
_**So as we explore this system - preventative care needs to be the investment in healthcare that rewards pro-active and early detection which will result in reduced long-term healthcare costs.**_
**Stay Tuned for - Part 3: The Monopoly Problem - How Consolidation Drives Up Healthcare Costs**

name: Jeff Person, Able Dems
subject: Stand with Me to Build a Truly Inclusive Tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | **** ******** **** **** **** **** **** Today, I want to have a heartfelt conversation with you about the urgent need for our collective action in these challenging times. I recently had the privilege of sitting down with Nieta Greene from Disability Community for Democracy, Inc. [to discuss the groundbreaking work we’re doing](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtdPeEYA6y1OGvXPRgYYwGlv27LG3FzcHes3l2vds7DdeOxqDmAXyN6OmUeHgUaygt73Sy6xpK7tAXgMHQx83XhVY8s1qhmtfuBjGgJsM-Db3Skv5J9jIREWZeh1Wvx2K2Eu9efCdz8xkVm9jvxEXw1Q-R18YzhZSB65rnPt_3cjBsleCRrMnDSaN6F3CMUd80moVRYlFHwtU1HiOhwVINjIYhUNK0ak1VSthUwng-lh3Lgs5ArX5Z0yGUdtsKOZEJDlynou0rm-TQa3oeokwjIUkmAwjs746GP5tjKrnCO1wkyvVu4fn0tB30TJ4ENw4sp92LUe5kJ8cPJTh4DUx3-VUoKNTlWfdoR4otD7cqHFf/4iu/LqkYE7czSz2M0Qr7A_Nqcg/h0/h001.YW75C3bFHcQwm0ETpEFREy_XjPfg1vrmdnsciNAt5kw) at Able Dems to elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies. This conversation served as a powerful reminder of why our efforts are so critical, especially given the current political climate. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQshfxOMHBXLnsHYw0j60qSdRgDiMik5t7pSMY0qu0aw9THQ9bGsQR8G2U9-_AZkLFcb3KpLvfs47iY28u1EiGN6F3yNAWgQnYEm6fGeFoNdVIUyHJky7Dd7WEEu4klZgsZlCCeL0_qAoTxThJUY9IrXehBNaHxmFZi4157QjDxltDecg6uPWA-FtuvGaNNWBEXipkm9PbJ7H4NBe8YG-t2LqgQR_rXf55xngPQxfUCXYkQny97osJDII52q0mnK8eDRJW_rt_dsdmdiRXdvoIVtHQOiU_rjYjGEwVTjjrMkxKZjraomjLTf-GNLZ36ZQ1ZfqnDNoIc8MxqOCfx2vS5nOMrkT6zDin8OkokbN8Ct3G/4iu/LqkYE7czSz2M0Qr7A_Nqcg/h1/h001.1P9_wGy0LPvxfgaTQhN84IG_uaO6h9tTLUZPznjrI0U) As someone who navigates life with Arthrogryposis, I have experienced both challenges and triumphs that have shaped my journey. From my days volunteering on the Obama campaign to founding Able Dems, I've seen firsthand the pressing need for representation that truly understands the experiences of individuals with disabilities. **Last year, we made significant strides by endorsing seven amazing candidates and raising $100,000 to propel our cause forward.** But the urgency of our mission cannot be overstated. The Democratic Party must go beyond simply checking boxes; it must actively engage with the largest voting bloc in America—people with disabilities. The stakes have never been higher, particularly in a political climate that often sidelines our voices. **It’s time for us to break down barriers and amplify our collective power to ensure our concerns are not just heard but addressed.** _Through Able Dems, we are more than a movement; we are a vibrant community united in the fight against the ableism that persists in our society._ [**Please consider a donation to support candidates who will champion the rights of people with disabilities and uphold the values of equality and justice for everyone.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQsv6G13xDJkcAT3eWN2WUkZ5RZdU1bDt9STNIU2detLRXk_xEiRU5N_PG5ec77Ha8QrY86oN5OTYUTA0uxixcnp-uQWqtuYSxbdOuiB6XPMo4ec7y9-NqqwzOv4gjFFKw_78KPH-vFGkQGfWIQLkg9xOwX_yG3cwuUbfoOMqvmxzqZpF3ixvaik1n1OT1CMKY_TBQVY8fesdAFQIO4pbvcVC71ohTBJFilkFcsCMCTIfIiWmwUs34byCm6Iw43kJZoTBpfkG5ziWgPSR3V6ODlB_jk_N8OzMEPU-Z6H3Ny2rEvwRIEQpSa95SUxbszxpguc-je1xFq8MF4iEnsY_zb9Ut74WetIQKciD0aFjOPIt8/4iu/LqkYE7czSz2M0Qr7A_Nqcg/h2/h001.7oDAKVW-HMkx9u4LeN2KrQEWDjjL50icjCW_AbKtRC0) ****_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

clean_body: | | | ** **** Today, I want to have a heartfelt conversation with you about the urgent need for our collective action in these challenging times. I recently had the privilege of sitting down with Nieta Greene from Disability Community for Democracy, Inc. at Able Dems to elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies. This conversation served as a powerful reminder of why our efforts are so critical, especially given the current political climate. As someone who navigates life with Arthrogryposis, I have experienced both challenges and triumphs that have shaped my journey. From my days volunteering on the Obama campaign to founding Able Dems, I've seen firsthand the pressing need for representation that truly understands the experiences of individuals with disabilities. Last year, we made significant strides by endorsing seven amazing candidates and raising $100,000 to propel our cause forward. But the urgency of our mission cannot be overstated. The Democratic Party must go beyond simply checking boxes; it must actively engage with the largest voting bloc in America—people with disabilities. The stakes have never been higher, particularly in a political climate that often sidelines our voices. It’s time for us to break down barriers and amplify our collective power to ensure our concerns are not just heard but addressed. Through Able Dems, we are more than a movement; we are a vibrant community united in the fight against the ableism that persists in our society. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** Let’s work together to turn the tide and secure a brighter tomorrow for all. With deep gratitude and unwavering determination, Jeff Person, Founder, Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to Able Dems PAC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Able Dems, please .

body:
Flipping the House starts with tough races like Gabe’s. Let’s not waste a moment.

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. We’re at a critical moment for our country's story, and we urgently need strong, proven leaders who can deliver **real results** in **tough places.** That’s why I want to take a moment to talk about someone making a big difference in _one of the most competitive districts in the country:_ **Gabe Vasquez of New Mexico’s 2nd congressional district.** Gabe has done something not many can. He's won _twice_ in a district where no other Democrat has done so in decades, and he’s done it by staying grounded in the communities he represents. Gabe shows up, he listens, and he fights for what matters — rural communities, working families, and the diverse voices that define southern New Mexico. And now, once again, Gabe is on the frontlines of one of the most important races in the country, and **his district will be crucial in our push to flip the House blue in 2026.** **Gabe is the kind of leader we need _more_ of.** [We’ve seen what’s possible when we come together behind candidates who deliver real results. Now let’s do it again. We’re at a critical moment for our country's story, and we urgently need strong, proven leaders who can deliver real results in tough places. That’s why I want to take a moment to talk about someone making a big difference in one of the most competitive districts in the country: Gabe Vasquez of New Mexico’s 2nd congressional district. Gabe has done something not many can. He's won twice in a district where no other Democrat has done so in decades, and he’s done it by staying grounded in the communities he represents. Gabe shows up, he listens, and he fights for what matters — rural communities, working families, and the diverse voices that define southern New Mexico. And now, once again, Gabe is on the frontlines of one of the most important races in the country, and his district will be crucial in our push to flip the House blue in 2026. name: Brianna Titone For Colorado
subject: Colorado’s budget just took a $1.2 billion hit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brianna for Treasurer, Registered Agent Brianna Titone
body:
Here's what you need to know about the crisis ahead

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/436f83262dbc/cobudgetupdate?e=8249791cac)
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=d7bc1abbbd&e=8249791cac)
| | | | | Dear Friend,Last week, we got an alarming update on Colorado’s budget outlook.Because of changes in the new federal law known as **HR1** , our state is now projected to lose **$1.2 billion in revenue in FY 2025-26 alone**. The longer-term impacts could total more than **$3 billion** , as federal support continues to shrink and new state costs pile up.[**Here’s what’s happening**](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=9bb3e49665&e=8249791cac)**:**
* **HR1 gave massive tax breaks to corporations and billionaires** , which sharply reduces Colorado’s tax revenue because our state tax code is directly tied to federal policy.
* The law also **shifts major program costs** to states - including **Medicaid, food assistance (SNAP), and clean energy investments** \- while offering **very little federal support** to implement these changes.
* Colorado had already closed a **$1.2 billion structural deficit** earlier this year. Now we’re facing **another $1.2 billion shortfall in FY25-26** and an additional **$679 million in FY26-27**.

Some of the most immediate impacts include:
* ❌ **Up to 377,000 Coloradans at risk of losing Medicaid coverage** , with an estimated 193,000 projected to be cut in the near term
* ❌ **$170 million in SNAP food assistance cuts** , impacting **more than 600,000 Coloradans** , including children, seniors, and veterans
* 💸 **Health insurance premiums are projected to rise by 28–38%** , especially in Western Colorado, due to the loss of enhanced premium tax credits
* 💔 Loss of **$620 million in premium tax credits** and **112,000 people expected to lose coverage** through Colorado’s health insurance marketplace
* 🔌 **Clean energy and EV tax credits are being rolled back up to 5 years early** , driving up energy costs and threatening nearly 2,000 Colorado jobs
* 📉 **Annual household energy costs could rise by $500 by 2035** , due to higher electricity and gas prices
* 🧾 **Key tax credits for working families – like the Earned Income Tax Credit (EITC) and the Family Affordability Tax Credit (FATC) – will be turned off in 2026 and 2027** , resulting in a tax increase for thousands of low- and middle-income families

Due to declining revenues, the **state will fall $914 million below the TABOR cap in FY25-26**. That means **no TABOR refunds** and **no available surplus** to fund the **Senior Homestead Exemption** in the following year.The **General Fund reserve** is projected to fall at least **$680 million below the required 15% reserve level** , threatening the state’s ability to maintain basic services and fund property tax relief.
I recorded a short video walking through what this all means and what to expect ahead:
---
| [WATCH THE 2.5 MINUTE VIDEO ON COLORADO’S BUDGET ISSUES HERE](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=264f1027a0&e=8249791cac)
---
| The Governor has officially called a special legislative session this month to begin addressing these impacts. As your next State Treasurer, I’ll be ready to lead – making sure we protect the most vulnerable, restore balance, and build a more resilient budget that puts people first.**These attacks on Colorado’s budget make it clearer than ever: we need leaders who will fight for working people, not corporate tax breaks.** I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money - but I need your help to compete with the big money pouring into this race.
**👉 If able, will you chip in today to help us fight back and protect Colorado’s future?
**[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/briannafortreasurer**](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=d143e78d7d&e=8249791cac) Thanks for staying engaged – and for continuing to fight for a Colorado where every dollar works for the people.In solidarity,
**Brianna Titone****Candidate for Colorado State Treasurer** _🔗**Learn more & join the campaign:**_[__](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=385030226f&e=8249791cac)[_www.briannaforco.com_](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=d5df4b3838&e=8249791cac)
---
|
---

clean_body: Here's what you need to know about the crisis ahead | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Dear Friend,Last week, we got an alarming update on Colorado’s budget outlook.Because of changes in the new federal law known as HR1 , our state is now projected to lose $1.2 billion in revenue in FY 2025-26 alone. The longer-term impacts could total more than $3 billion , as federal support continues to shrink and new state costs pile up.: HR1 gave massive tax breaks to corporations and billionaires , which sharply reduces Colorado’s tax revenue because our state tax code is directly tied to federal policy. The law also shifts major program costs to states - including Medicaid, food assistance (SNAP), and clean energy investments \- while offering very little federal support to implement these changes. Colorado had already closed a $1.2 billion structural deficit earlier this year. Now we’re facing another $1.2 billion shortfall in FY25-26 and an additional $679 million in FY26-27. Some of the most immediate impacts include: ❌ Up to 377,000 Coloradans at risk of losing Medicaid coverage , with an estimated 193,000 projected to be cut in the near term ❌ $170 million in SNAP food assistance cuts , impacting more than 600,000 Coloradans , including children, seniors, and veterans 💸 Health insurance premiums are projected to rise by 28–38% , especially in Western Colorado, due to the loss of enhanced premium tax credits 💔 Loss of $620 million in premium tax credits and 112,000 people expected to lose coverage through Colorado’s health insurance marketplace 🔌 Clean energy and EV tax credits are being rolled back up to 5 years early , driving up energy costs and threatening nearly 2,000 Colorado jobs 📉 Annual household energy costs could rise by $500 by 2035 , due to higher electricity and gas prices 🧾 Key tax credits for working families – like the Earned Income Tax Credit (EITC) and the Family Affordability Tax Credit (FATC) – will be turned off in 2026 and 2027 , resulting in a tax increase for thousands of low- and middle-income families Due to declining revenues, the state will fall $914 million below the TABOR cap in FY25-26. That means no TABOR refunds and no available surplus to fund the Senior Homestead Exemption in the following year.The General Fund reserve is projected to fall at least $680 million below the required 15% reserve level , threatening the state’s ability to maintain basic services and fund property tax relief. I recorded a short video walking through what this all means and what to expect ahead: | | The Governor has officially called a special legislative session this month to begin addressing these impacts. As your next State Treasurer, I’ll be ready to lead – making sure we protect the most vulnerable, restore balance, and build a more resilient budget that puts people first.These attacks on Colorado’s budget make it clearer than ever: we need leaders who will fight for working people, not corporate tax breaks. I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money - but I need your help to compete with the big money pouring into this race. 👉 If able, will you chip in today to help us fight back and protect Colorado’s future? Thanks for staying engaged – and for continuing to fight for a Colorado where every dollar works for the people.In solidarity, Brianna TitoneCandidate for Colorado State Treasurer 🔗Learn more & join the campaign: | | P.S. Want to help our campaign for State Treasurer? Here are a few ways to make an impact: : every dollar helps us spread our message of hope and economic prosperity for ALL Coloradans Host a meet- &-greet or fundraiser: email briannaforcolorado@gmail.com Sign up for our newsletter to stay up to date with the campaign: Endorse Brianna Follow Brianna on social media -** be sure like/comment/repost to spread our message of hope. Click on the icons below to follow Brianna!! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2025. Paid for by Brianna for Treasurer, Registered Agent Brianna Titone. All rights reserved. name: Team Marie Updates
subject: Mid-year update
body:
| | Peter,

Now that we’re just past the mid-point of this Congressional session, we’re looking back at everything Marie has accomplished for our district – and looking to the work still ahead.

From putting our tax dollars to work here at home, to speaking up when our values aren’t being represented, working across the aisle to deliver bipartisan solutions and more, **Marie is staying true to her promises.**
> Since taking office, Marie has held **dozens of town halls, community roundtables, and mobile office hour sessions**.
>
> And this year alone, she has **introduced 30 bipartisan bills** , **cast 213 votes on the House floor** (nearly 70% of which were bipartisan), was named to the prestigious **House Appropriations Committee** , and just last month **voted against a bloated partisan budget** that explodes the deficit and funds tax cuts for the rich at the expense of everyday families.
[Marie is the champion we need fighting for us in Congress – let’s make sure she can keep doing it. name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Trump’s latest authoritarian power grab
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39988%2E3422442%2EbWk6GA)
Peter,
Last week Trump fired the Bureau of Labor Statistics Commissioner for reporting job numbers he didn’t like.
**He claimed the numbers were “rigged” to make him look bad, but we know that’s a bunch of BS.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250807_1_ak?refcode=em20250807-39988&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39988_3422442_bWk6GA&akid=39988%2E3422442%2EbWk6GA)
**This decision will have real, negative effects on our entire economy.** If companies can’t count on these numbers to be legitimate, it may slow down hiring and investment decisions. That’s bad for our whole economy and bad for workers.
California needs a governor who will stand up to Trump and lower costs for families. **That’s exactly the kind of governor Katie Porter will be.**
In Congress, Katie Porter grilled Trump officials who tried to spin the truth and reminded them they work for the American people. As governor, she’ll keep calling out lies and power grabs–and she’ll _actually_ build an economy that works for everyone.
But with this race heating up, we need your help. Our opponents are already starting to spend big against us, so we need the financial resources to carry us to victory next year.
**[Peter, can you chip in $5 to help elect Katie Porter and fight back against Trump’s authoritarianism?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250807_1_ak?refcode=em20250807-39988&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39988_3422442_bWk6GA&akid=39988%2E3422442%2EbWk6GA)**

Thank you,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250807-39988&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39988_3422442_bWk6GA&akid=39988%2E3422442%2EbWk6GA)**

name: Athena Hollins
subject: I know Minnesota is a great place to raise a family…
disclaimer_text: paid for by the
body:
Did you see this incredible news, Team?!
https://mn.gov/deed/paidleave/employees/leave-time/ [https://mn.gov/deed/paidleave/employees/leave-time/]
That’s right — Minnesota is committed to making it easier, safer, and more affordable to have kids here! And , I have great news: It’s about to get even more affordable.
The state is getting ready to launch Minnesota’s brand-new Paid Leave program in January 2026. Now, you can now find out how much your paychecks could be if you need to take leave: [https://mn.gov/deed/paidleave/employees/leave-time/]
CALCULATE YOUR PAYCHECK HERE [https://mn.gov/deed/paidleave/employees/leave-time/]
Some important things to keep in mind:
* If you have a baby in 2025 or 2026, you’ll qualify for some leave.
* If you need to care for a sick family member or recover from an illness or surgery yourself, you’ll be eligible!
* You can take leave all at once in a single block.
* You can take leave on a regular schedule — for example, the same day each week for medical treatments for yourself or a family member.
* You can take leave only when you need it. For example, to manage flare-ups of a chronic health condition.
* You can take leave at different times in a year, for the same condition or more than one condition.
Learn more about the new program and calculate what you qualify for here:
CALCULATE YOUR PAYCHECK HERE [https://mn.gov/deed/paidleave/employees/leave-time/]
Athena Hollins
Mom of 2 Great Kids, House DFL Whip
District 66B Representative
P.S. In 2023, House DFLers led the charge to bring this paid leave program to Minnesota. Paid Leave will protect jobs and lower costs for millions of Minnesota families.
In 2025, the Minnesota GOP tried multiple times to cancel and delay Paid Leave, threatening to leave Minnesota families high and dry.
House DFLers stood up for Minnesota families and blocked every GOP effort to repeal or delay Paid Leave in our state. We’ll never stop fighting for you and your family.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-aug25?refcode=080625_ENG_PaidLeave_AH [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-aug25?refcode=080625_ENG_PaidLeave_AH]
We are prohibited from accepting contributions from PACs and lobbyists during the legislative session.
Give $75 and Get $75 back from Minnesota! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-aug25?refcode=080625_ENG_PaidLeave_AH]
The Political Contribution Refund is a Minnesota program that lets you donate $75 (or $150 per couple) once per year and have it refunded by the state. It’s a fantastic way to support the work of the House DFL. Can we count on you to make your refundable donation today?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $75 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-aug25?refcode=080625_ENG_PaidLeave_AH_75&amount=75&express_lane=true]
DONATE $150 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-aug25?refcode=080625_ENG_PaidLeave_AH_150&amount=150&express_lane=true]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-aug25?refcode=080625_ENG_PaidLeave_AH&recurring=true]

name: Stand with Bernie! (via VPP)
subject: Trump’s newest target: Bernie Sanders!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We need you to stand up and support Bernie Sanders.
| Folks, Bernie Sanders is fighting back – _AGAIN!_ ⬇️ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92742?t=6&akid=20821%2E878179%2E9WI5D4) **We’re THRILLED to see Bernie stand up against MAGA extremism — but Republicans are FURIOUS.** _They HATE to see our grassroots power growing!_

While Trump attacks Senator Sanders relentlessly, we’re getting to work to protect him — _start with sending Sen. Bernie Sanders an URGENT letter thanking him for all his amazing work!_

[**You’ve been PERSONALLY selected to sign, friend, so please don’t let us down: Add your name to thank Senator Sanders now, before we hit send tomorrow at 9am! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92742?t=7&akid=20821%2E878179%2E9WI5D4) | [**15,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92742?t=8&akid=20821%2E878179%2E9WI5D4)
---
TO: Sen. Bernie Sanders
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear Senator Bernie Sanders,**

__Thank you for all your hard work leading the Anti-Trump resistance!__

It’s easy to feel helpless with MAGA Republicans in charge of the House, Senate, and White House, _**but you keep us hopeful that we can fight back.**_

I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats _across the country_ stand with you.

**Your leadership is absolutely critical right now, and we hope more Democrats follow your lead.**

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of your work to stop Donald Trump and save our Democracy! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremists like Donald Trump. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92742?t=9&akid=20821%2E878179%2E9WI5D4) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92742?t=10&akid=20821%2E878179%2E9WI5D4)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
