name: John Fetterman
subject: rent's too damn high. here's what I'm doing.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
| | |
---
Hey, it’s John.
Everywhere I go, folks say the same thing: **Housing costs are killing us**.
Rent’s too high. Buying a home feels impossible. Fixing a leaky roof? Don’t even ask. 😓
So I’m doing something about it.
My WHOLE-HOME REPAIRS bill is headed to the Senate floor. It’s simple:
We lose good homes to blight and busted plumbing.
That shrinks supply. Prices shoot up. 📈👀
You don’t need a PhD to get it.
My bill gives grants and forgivable loans to fix up homes. Keeps them livable. More homes. Lower prices.
And we know it works – a version of this program is already helping folks in Pennsylvania. 💪
This sh*t matters. When housing costs eat your paycheck, there's less left for food, medicine, or saving a buck. That’s especially tough on our young people and folks with fixed incomes.
[**I want to know what you think. Will you take a minute to answer my housing survey?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51515?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk198-su-fl&t=1&akid=10242%2E434096%2ETsbHQt)
| | [Take the Survey](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51515?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk198-su-fl&t=2&akid=10242%2E434096%2ETsbHQt)

John ❤️

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: The Guardian: JD Vance’s team had water level of Ohio river raised for a boating trip on his vacation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We can’t let ourselves become numb to this ridiculous level of corruption.
#
While Congress slashed healthcare to give billionaires a tax break, JD Vance took a trip out to Ohio for his birthday. He made the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers raise the water levels of a river so he could have a nice kayaking trip.
Yeah.
This is what JD Vance is up to while Park Rangers and Forest Service arborists are getting fired, while Trump’s attacking protected national monuments and forests, while they’re looking at every avenue to gut the Antiquities Act and sell off millions of acres of public lands.
The American people are losing access to health care and national treasures that generations have enjoyed at no cost. But guys at the top like JD?
**Elites like JD get to order the Army Corps of Engineers to literally change the outflows of a lake and raise the water levels of a river so he can kayak at taxpayer expense.**
That’s “Hillbilly Elegy” JD Vance for you. Mr. Small Town America, using his power and privilege to serve himself in a way no member of the public ever could. Par for the course for this guy. He made piles of cash as a venture capitalist, left the people he grew up with behind, and sold his soul to kiss Trump’s ring.
In any other White House this would be an absolutely massive scandal, and wouldn’t leave the headlines for weeks. But with the litany of self dealing, bribery, and worse coming out of Trump and his administration, this barely cracks the Richter scale.
**_Bottom line:** We can’t let ourselves become numb to this ridiculous level of corruption._ Least of all right after JD Vance brought all of Trump’s lackeys to his house so they could get their story straight on the Epstein files.
JD doesn’t get a pass just because he’s a former Marine. He’s accountable to the public — to you, to us, and to everybody else in this country. And it’s time we reminded him of that.
[**VoteVets is taking the fight to Trump, JD, and the MAGA Right every single day, and we need your help to stay in the fight. Please, make a grassroots donation if you can afford it.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-august25.hEpWPc&refcode=em250807-1-60f&t=1&akid=34509%2E3013755%2Eze-TB8)

subject: Should Democrats fight fire with fire?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Republicans are working overtime to rig the system before the 2026 midterms.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112927911/562075382/1328794144?refcode=ea.dedfcb99-d273-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.dedfcb99-d273-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlZGZjYjk5LWQyNzMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ElYFjMZXrIlWUhF-DF6eUNqVA53YnN4_w2kT4i576-U=&emci=dbdfcb99-d273-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=dedfcb99-d273-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)
---
The redistricting fight in Texas is getting uglier by the day, folks. **Donald Trump now says that Republicans are “entitled” to five more congressional seats in Texas, and Governor Greg Abbott is doing everything in his power to deliver.** He even ordered the arrest of Texas Democrats who refused to bow down to King Trump and his rigged maps before the 2026 midterms. And it's not just happening in Texas. As you read this, Missouri's GOP governor is openly considering rigging the map to steal another Democratic seat and J.D. Vance is being sent to Indiana to pressure Republican leaders there to gerrymander their maps, too. Make no mistake: This is a coordinated, nationwide assault on our democracy. Right now, one party is rigging the system while we're told to be patient and hope for the best. That's NOT how we save what we believe in. The question now is _how do we fight back?_ **A growing number of governors, including Kathy Hochul of New York and Gavin Newsom of California have pledged to redraw their own congressional maps to counter Republican gerrymandering. And they’re not alone. Governors around the country are lining up behind them, ready to give Republicans a taste of their own medicine.** **[So Jane wants to hear from you: Should Democratic governors fight fire with fire and redraw their maps?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112927912/562075383/-117562956?refcode=ea.dedfcb99-d273-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.dedfcb99-d273-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlZGZjYjk5LWQyNzMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ElYFjMZXrIlWUhF-DF6eUNqVA53YnN4_w2kT4i576-U=&emci=dbdfcb99-d273-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=dedfcb99-d273-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)** | [**SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112927913/562075384/-117562956?refcode=ea.dedfcb99-d273-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.dedfcb99-d273-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlZGZjYjk5LWQyNzMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ElYFjMZXrIlWUhF-DF6eUNqVA53YnN4_w2kT4i576-U=&emci=dbdfcb99-d273-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=dedfcb99-d273-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)

clean_body: Republicans are working overtime to rig the system before the 2026 midterms. | The redistricting fight in Texas is getting uglier by the day, folks. Donald Trump now says that Republicans are “entitled” to five more congressional seats in Texas, and Governor Greg Abbott is doing everything in his power to deliver. He even ordered the arrest of Texas Democrats who refused to bow down to King Trump and his rigged maps before the 2026 midterms. And it's not just happening in Texas. As you read this, Missouri's GOP governor is openly considering rigging the map to steal another Democratic seat and J.D. Vance is being sent to Indiana to pressure Republican leaders there to gerrymander their maps, too. Make no mistake: This is a coordinated, nationwide assault on our democracy. Right now, one party is rigging the system while we're told to be patient and hope for the best. That's NOT how we save what we believe in. The question now is how do we fight back? A growing number of governors, including Kathy Hochul of New York and Gavin Newsom of California have pledged to redraw their own congressional maps to counter Republican gerrymandering. And they’re not alone. Governors around the country are lining up behind them, ready to give Republicans a taste of their own medicine. | In solidarity, Jane Fonda Climate PAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Epstein Subpoenas Have Been Issued.
body:
| | | | [](https://link.email.greene4congress.)
---
# _**_FOR YOUR EYES ONLY_**_
After years of cover-ups, redacted “client lists,” and cowardice from BOTH parties... We’re finally dragging the truth about **Jeffrey Epstein** into the light.
**Subpoenas have now been issued to Bill and Hillary Clinton.**
Also subpoenaed: **James Comey. Robert Mueller. Loretta Lynch. Eric Holder. Jeff Sessions.**
And yes — **_Ghislaine Maxwell herself._**
**_[I am going to expose the truth about Jeffrey Epstein and the people inside our government who protected him](https://link.email.greene4congress.)_****.**
**Because the truth can’t be buried any longer.**
[JOIN MTG](https://link.email.greene4congress.)
Jeffrey Epstein was a **convicted pedophile** who operated in **plain sight** for decades.
He built an empire of abuse... a pipeline of young girls fed into the hands of the rich, powerful, and well-connected.
**And not one of the people now under subpoena lifted a finger to stop him.**
What were they hiding?
Who were they protecting?
**[And why did nobody lift a finger to save those young girls](https://link.email.greene4congress.)?**
Our government has protected the predators and silenced the victims.
While Epstein hosted billionaires and politicians on his private island, Washington looked the other way.
**_[No more](https://link.email.greene4congress.)_****.**
I’m fighting to expose every name, release every document, and hold every official accountable who turned a blind eye... _or who did worse._
**The political establishment wants this buried for good, and they will fight tooth and nail to block these investigations, redact the files, and intimidate anyone who speaks out.**
That’s why I need your help...
They’ll call in **every favor.** They’ll unleash their **media attack dogs.** They’ll try to **bury the files, intimidate whistleblowers,** and **block this investigation before it gets too close to the truth.**
**They’ve gotten away with it for decades...** **And this is the closest we’ve ever come to uncovering it.**
This might be our only chance, and **_[we can not let it slip through our fingers](https://link.email.greene4congress.)_.**
If we lose this opportunity, we’ll never know what really happened on that island, we’ll never know just who was complicit, and we’ll never know just how deep this conspiracy goes.
So if you care about the truth as much as I do—I’m asking you to chip in whatever you can right now to help me fight back against what’s coming.
[EXPOSE JEFFREY EPSTEIN](https://link.email.greene4congress.)
I won’t back down – not _now,_ not _ever_...
**_[But for this fight to make it to the end, I need your help](https://link.email.greene4congress.)_.**
_For Justice,_
| | [](https://link.email.greene4congress.)
---
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://link.email.greene4congress.)

name: Steve Simon
subject: Our office sued and won. That right just vanished.
disclaimer_text: paid for by Simon for Secretary of State Committee
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112928374/562076804/-1787004069?refcode=header&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGM0Y2VkZTUtZDQ3My1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TtdrknUR2giGtX09nTwJUsl7a_JhMUksHk7FX5JGABs=) | A few years ago, our office reached a settlement under the Voting Rights Act to protect Minnesotans with disabilities who were being denied assistance at the ballot box. We won guarantees for all Minnesota voters. And in doing so, we made our elections more accessible and more fair. But under a new ruling from the Eighth Circuit Court of Appeals,**that lawsuit wouldn’t even be allowed today.** They’ve declared that private citizens, and even state officials like me, no longer have standing to sue under a key part of the Voting Rights Act. **This ruling is dangerous. It opens the door to more discrimination.** And if it’s not overturned, it will make our elections less accessible and less fair. I believe in pushing back. I believe in making sure **every eligible Minnesotan,** regardless of ability or language, has a real voice in our democracy. **[But I can’t do it alone. Can you make a donation today to help us push back against these attacks and protect the freedom to vote?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112928375/562076805/-1037734492?amount=25&refcode=ss_em_fr_90DO_250807&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGM0Y2VkZTUtZDQ3My1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TtdrknUR2giGtX09nTwJUsl7a_JhMUksHk7FX5JGABs=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed now.

clean_body: = | A few years ago, our office reached a settlement under the Voting Rights Act to protect Minnesotans with disabilities who were being denied assistance at the ballot box. We won guarantees for all Minnesota voters. And in doing so, we made our elections more accessible and more fair. But under a new ruling from the Eighth Circuit Court of Appeals,that lawsuit wouldn’t even be allowed today. They’ve declared that private citizens, and even state officials like me, no longer have standing to sue under a key part of the Voting Rights Act. This ruling is dangerous. It opens the door to more discrimination. And if it’s not overturned, it will make our elections less accessible and less fair. I believe in pushing back. I believe in making sure every eligible Minnesotan, regardless of ability or language, has a real voice in our democracy. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed now. | ****************=************** | **************=************** | **************=************** | **************=************** | **************=************** | **************=************** Thank you for standing with me, Steve | = | = | = With Steve’s leadership, Minnesota has led the nation in voter turnout for the past three out of four elections. His top priorities are defending our democracy, strengthening the freedom to vote for all eligible Minnesotans, pushing back against dangerous disinformation about our elections, providing support for small businesses, and enhancing security protections for our most vulnerable. = ** Prepared and paid for by Simon for Secretary of State Committee Simon for Secretary of State Committee P.O. Right now, Republicans hold veto-proof majorities in both chambers of the Iowa legislature, giving them unchecked power to pass extreme legislation no matter who wins the governorship.
To make matters worse, the GOP’s candidate in this special election is a right-wing maniac. He’s vehemently anti-abortion, an election denier, and claims that climate change is “a lie.” We cannot let far-right extremists like this gain more power.
**Flipping a single seat in places like Iowa** can strengthen Democrats’ ability to halt extreme bills and nominees and block more MAGA Republicans from serving in our state legislatures.
**The DLCC has helped break GOP supermajorities in places like North Carolina despite some of the most gerrymandered maps in the country. With your support, we can do it again all over the country.**
[Can you join our team with a $7 donation as we fight to gain ground in red states like Iowa and build Democratic power everywhere? clean_body: Iowa Democrats are facing a toss-up special election that would break the GOP’s supermajority – and even slow the very worst of Trump’s Project 2025 agenda. | | | | | ---|--- Iowa Democrats are facing a toss-up special election that would break the GOP’s supermajority – and even slow the very worst of Republicans’ extreme Project 2025 agenda. Last year, the DLCC helped break Republicans’ veto-proof majority in North Carolina and secure power for the incoming Democratic governor. Online donations of $7 supported our work to make it happen. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Right now, Republicans hold veto-proof majorities in both chambers of the Iowa legislature, giving them unchecked power to pass extreme legislation no matter who wins the governorship. To make matters worse, the GOP’s candidate in this special election is a right-wing maniac. He’s vehemently anti-abortion, an election denier, and claims that climate change is “a lie.” We cannot let far-right extremists like this gain more power. Flipping a single seat in places like Iowa can strengthen Democrats’ ability to halt extreme bills and nominees and block more MAGA Republicans from serving in our state legislatures. The DLCC has helped break GOP supermajorities in places like North Carolina despite some of the most gerrymandered maps in the country. With your support, we can do it again all over the country. Hi there, Peter. At 4:00p (CST) on Sunday Afternoon, Texas Democrats hopped on a plane and fled their state to break quorum in order to stop Republicans from stealing the 2026 midterm elections. After Donald Trump demanded that Texas Republicans redraw their state maps to ensure Republicans would pick up 5 more congressional seats, Texas Democrats sprung into action to ensure that Trump doesn’t get his way. These Texas Democrats are doing this at great personal sacrifice. In addition to being away from their family (and jobs) for as long as this may take, they are also being fined $500/day and will be lambasted with negative ads in their district funded by Governor Greg Abbott. **If they are going to be able to hold out long enough for this to count, they’re going to need our help.** Georgia Democrats want to show these fighters that we have their back! If you make a contribution to this email, it will be split between the Democratic Party of Georgia and Texas Democratic Parties in order to help the Texas Democrats fund this very expensive fight for all of our sake. | | **[Rush a Donation to Support Texas Democrats!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112928478/562077111/-402476599?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_080725_TEXASDEMSSPLIT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTI3ZDVmOC1kNDczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=22l4U7No4lbdfj-bmrnn27a0JAG3Q_uKtxIHT1WQJFY=)**

In solidarity,
Georgia Democrats

name: Mohan Seshadri, API PA
subject: Shut Down Moshannon Valley Processing Center
body:
https://www.apipennsylvania.org [https://www.apipennsylvania.org]
Hi Peter,
No one should be put in a life-or-death situation because of their citizenship status. But that’s exactly what’s happening in ICE custody.
Chaofeng Ge had been in custody for [https://www.inquirer.com/news/ice-detention-suicide-immigration-moshannon-20250807.html] [https://www.inquirer.com/news/ice-detention-suicide-immigration-moshannon-20250807.html] just five days [https://www.inquirer.com/news/ice-detention-suicide-immigration-moshannon-20250807.html] at the Moshannon Valley Processing Center. He was awaiting an immigration hearing when he was found dead from an apparent suicide. He was someone’s family member, friend, neighbor - and we grieve for his life.
This tragedy is not an isolated incident. It is the ultimate result of a cruel and broken immigration system that locks up thousands of people every day at Moshannon Valley. Many more people across the country face the same horrible conditions, and the same impossible choices that created this tragedy.
Moshannon Valley is run by a private company, GEO Group, that is profiting off of the suffering of our communities. Their CEO, George Zoley, has donated hundreds of thousands to Trump’s reelection campaign, and is set to gain more than $1 billion in profit [https://theappeal.org/geo-group-earnings-mass-deportations/] from Trump’s mass deportation agenda. They rip families apart and fail to provide basic care to the people detained there, all in order to enrich their shareholders.
It doesn’t have to be this way. Our immigration system should be rooted in dignity, fairness, and care — not profit. We have to be committed to a system that keeps families and communities together and whole.
[https://secure.everyaction.com/npIH-E4iR0aHxi8U2uZ5kQ2?contactdata=u9un8b1wLLHafx5tbVJVaQDkioueZxrS6pdko+dYpL3Yt8xwrnk5vAYHN0Yk5hMd2G3iYVwM9VW8zhRqK9szlpCEpPstH6PBomyG/NFvc7LIMtqvHdmomzHyLo4NMtIi91YkyBxVbLuYiJH2NTaOGC0A+xORsJEsAPityHsCzDY=]
[https://secure.everyaction.com/npIH-E4iR0aHxi8U2uZ5kQ2?contactdata=u9un8b1wLLHafx5tbVJVaQDkioueZxrS6pdko+dYpL3Yt8xwrnk5vAYHN0Yk5hMd2G3iYVwM9VW8zhRqK9szlpCEpPstH6PBomyG/NFvc7LIMtqvHdmomzHyLo4NMtIi91YkyBxVbLuYiJH2NTaOGC0A+xORsJEsAPityHsCzDY=]
Call Congress [https://secure.everyaction.com/grO1rib08UettTigj3jIqw2?contactdata=u9un8b1wLLHafx5tbVJVaQDkioueZxrS6pdko+dYpL3Yt8xwrnk5vAYHN0Yk5hMd2G3iYVwM9VW8zhRqK9szlpCEpPstH6PBomyG/NFvc7LIMtqvHdmomzHyLo4NMtIi91YkyBxVbLuYiJH2NTaOGC0A+xORsJEsAPityHsCzDY=]
Use this form [https://secure.everyaction.com/grO1rib08UettTigj3jIqw2?contactdata=u9un8b1wLLHafx5tbVJVaQDkioueZxrS6pdko+dYpL3Yt8xwrnk5vAYHN0Yk5hMd2G3iYVwM9VW8zhRqK9szlpCEpPstH6PBomyG/NFvc7LIMtqvHdmomzHyLo4NMtIi91YkyBxVbLuYiJH2NTaOGC0A+xORsJEsAPityHsCzDY=] to call your member of Congress now. Demand that they take action to shut down the Moshannon Valley Processing Center. We owe it to each other, and to Chaofeng’s legacy to end the use of private immigration detention across the Commonwealth.
In solidarity,
Mohan Seshadri
Executive Director
Asian Pacific Islander Political Alliance (API PA)
https://www.facebook.com/apipennsylvania [https://www.facebook.com/apipennsylvania] https://twitter.com/apipennsylvania [https://twitter.com/apipennsylvania] https://instagram.com/apipennsylvania [https://instagram.com/apipennsylvania] https://www.tiktok.com/@apipennsylvania [https://www.tiktok.com/@apipennsylvania] https://bsky.app/profile/apipennsylvania.bsky.social [https://bsky.app/profile/apipennsylvania.bsky.social]

API PA
PO Box 22611
Philadelphia, PA 19110
United States

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: education is the key to a better, safer world
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
As the daughter of teachers, the importance of education was instilled in me from a young age.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112928580/562077389/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzZhMDc2NjItZDU3My1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dYC-vgHcNYlntrJ1aihJQilF9h_ChTl7Qzn_u7A6NkM=) As the daughter of teachers, the importance of education was instilled in me from a young age. **My parents taught me that education is the key to a better, safer world** — and this belief has guided me throughout my time in public service. So when National Republicans threaten to withhold billions of dollars in public school funding and slash funding for the Department of Education, you best believe I’m doing everything I can to stop them. **[I’m fighting back against these attacks on our public schools and working to put our children’s future first. If that’s a mission you believe in, please chip in now and join my fight →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112928581/562077390/-629675555?refcode=email_080725_education&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzZhMDc2NjItZDU3My1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dYC-vgHcNYlntrJ1aihJQilF9h_ChTl7Qzn_u7A6NkM=)** In Congress, I’ve fought hard for affordable, quality education for everyone. I’ve co-led the bipartisan IDEA Full Funding Act to ensure all kids with disabilities can access a free, high-quality public education. And I’ve stood up for Oregonians to stop cuts to the Department of Education — because our children can’t afford them. There’s still a lot of work left to do to fight for our kids and build a better future for their generation. clean_body: As the daughter of teachers, the importance of education was instilled in me from a young age. = As the daughter of teachers, the importance of education was instilled in me from a young age. My parents taught me that education is the key to a better, safer world — and this belief has guided me throughout my time in public service. So when National Republicans threaten to withhold billions of dollars in public school funding and slash funding for the Department of Education, you best believe I’m doing everything I can to stop them. = In Congress, I’ve fought hard for affordable, quality education for everyone. I’ve co-led the bipartisan IDEA Full Funding Act to ensure all kids with disabilities can access a free, high-quality public education. And I’ve stood up for Oregonians to stop cuts to the Department of Education — because our children can’t afford them. There’s still a lot of work left to do to fight for our kids and build a better future for their generation. But I’m proud to be putting my parents’ teachings into practice and doing everything I can to put our kids first. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thank you, Janelle Bynum | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. subject: BREAKING: FBI joins Abbott’s hunt for Texas Democrats

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06302025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06302025&amount=25]
Help us fund our rapid response efforts in Texas to ensure voters know the truth about the Republican redistricting scheme!
Texas is about to become one of the most important states in 2026 with new Congressional maps and a major Senate race!
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08072025&amount=25]
Peter ,
It's official now: The FBI is now working with Texas state law enforcement to track down the Texas Democrats who fled the state to stop Trump's gerrymandering scheme.
Texas Senator John Cornyn says FBI Director Kash Patel has agreed to "help locate" the 50 Democrats who broke quorum, while the governor is trying to remove the House Democratic Chair from office.
This is not about maps anymore. This is about whether one party can use law enforcement to punish the other, and whether the rest of the country lets it happen.
Rush $20 now to fight back [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08072025&amount=20]
Donate More [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08072025&amount=35]
GOTV PAC is organizing a rapid-response effort to expose what's happening in Texas. Texts, phone banks, digital ads -- we're making sure voters in targeted districts know the truth.
These lawmakers are risking arrest to stop an illegal power grab -- and now they're being hunted by federal agents.
We need to meet this moment.
-GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08072025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08072025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

name: Dan Carr
subject: Faith & Morality in Crisis
body:
Why America Needs a Spiritual Awakening

| |
---|---|---
|
# Faith & Morality in Crisis
### Why America Needs a Spiritual Awakening
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
| Aug 7
---
| [](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
As America faces cultural chaos, collapsing values, and confusion in leadership, _Faith and Morality_ must return to the center of our national conscience. In this episode of _God and Country_ , we examine the spiritual decay of our nation and how the Founding Fathers understood morality and faith as essential to liberty. We challenge every believer to rise with boldness and truth.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/cbb5bd9b-20e8-4127-8013-a77a0a69263e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

clean_body: We wanted to make sure you saw this. In case you missed it, Abigail is celebrating her birthday today, and now's your last chance to sign her card. Each year, we try to collect more birthday card signers than the last. We have a real shot at crossing a thousand this year with so many folks joining our team, but it will only happen if each of us does our part. Thanks so much, Spanberger for Governor HQ \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Team Spanberger <info@abigailspanberger.com> Date: Wed, Aug 6, 2025 at 5:44pm ET Subject: Will you sign Abigail's birthday card? To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> Peter, Abigail's birthday is tomorrow, and we're asking a few supporters to sign her official birthday card. It's important that Abigail sees how many of us are out there rooting for her in Virginia and beyond. Thanks for doing this, Team Spanberger By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Message & data rates may apply. name: Arizona Democratic Party
subject: We Stand with Texas Democrats!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/105516/images/Asset%203azdems_logo_white_Orange.png]
Don’t let Republicans rig the 2026 election!
Hi there, team
At 4:00pm (CST) on Sunday Afternoon, Texas Democrats hopped on a plane and fled their state to break quorum in order to stop Republicans from stealing the 2026 midterm elections.
After Donald Trump demanded that Texas Republicans redraw their state maps to ensure Republicans would pick up 5 more congressional seats, Texas Democrats sprung into action to ensure that Trump doesn’t get his way.
These Texas Democrats are doing this at great personal sacrifice. In addition to being away from their family (and jobs) for as long as this may take, they are also being fined $500/day and will be lambasted with negative ads in their district funded by Governor Greg Abbott. If they are going to be able to hold out long enough for this to count, they’re going to need our help.
Arizona Democrats want to show these fighters that we have their back! If you make a contribution to this email, it will be split between the Arizona and Texas Democratic Parties in order to help the Texas Democrats fund this very expensive fight for all of our sake.
Rush a Donation to Support Texas Democrats! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-tdpadpsplit0825]
This is the fight to save democracy that Democrats have been warning about for ten years. It’s going to take all of us to ensure that this bold attempt to steal this republic does not go unchallenged.
In solidarity,
Arizona Democratic Party

name: Becca Balint
subject: They’re not even pretending anymore
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112929370/562080290/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250807_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTExNTA5NS1kOTczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=maKdFQW0CtYQ4W6DYeWPskjjPYmlbp-zA5k75g8cfWY=)
---
Peter — What we’re seeing play out in Texas this week is nothing short of an all-out assault on voting rights. At Trump’s behest, Texas Republicans released a new congressional map, and let’s be honest: it’s not a map at all. It’s a power grab. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112929371/562080291/-289842851?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250807_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTExNTA5NS1kOTczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=maKdFQW0CtYQ4W6DYeWPskjjPYmlbp-zA5k75g8cfWY=) It’s a map designed to _protect_ the GOP’s narrow House majority, not to reflect the will of the people. They’re slicing up communities across South and Central Texas, targeting Democratic districts, and silencing Black and Latino voters in the process. And when Democratic legislators in Texas fled the state to prevent these maps from being put into place, Governor Greg Abbott issued a warrant for their arrest. **I want you to know that I won’t be quiet about this.** This isn’t just about Texas. It’s about whether we’re going to have a democracy where the people choose their leaders or one where politicians choose their voters. I’m going to do everything I can to protect our democracy, stop voter suppression, and win back the House. But I can’t do it alone. **[Will you pitch in today to help Democrats fight back — in Texas, in Vermont, and across the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112929372/562080292/-289842851?amount=&refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250807_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTExNTA5NS1kOTczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=maKdFQW0CtYQ4W6DYeWPskjjPYmlbp-zA5k75g8cfWY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112929376/562080294/-1075723345?express_lane=true&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250807_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTExNTA5NS1kOTczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=maKdFQW0CtYQ4W6DYeWPskjjPYmlbp-zA5k75g8cfWY=)

name: Team Crow
subject: What Jason Crow told Bill Maher
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Friend,

Jason appeared on Real Time with Bill Maher last weekend, and he didn’t pull any punches:

“I’m a proud Democrat, but we can’t lose 90% of U.S. counties and say things are going well.”

Jason spoke plainly about what’s at stake in 2026 and beyond and why we need to grow the Democratic Party, restore our connection with working people, and elect a new generation of servant leaders who are willing to do the hard work of governing.

That’s what Jason is fighting for.

In Congress, he’s pushing to lower costs for working families, hold Donald Trump accountable, and make sure Democrats stay focused on the issues that matter most: jobs, safety, fairness, and opportunity.

But he can’t do it alone. He’s building a grassroots movement that isn’t afraid to challenge the status quo, and your support is what makes that possible.

Can you chip in today to support Jason Crow’s work and help elect more truth-tellers to Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-aug2025?amount=]

name: Ben Ray, EMILYs List
subject: An EMILYs List woman used to represent this district
body:

name: Mallory McMorrow
subject: When I raised my hand, Emerge called on me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
My Emerge training cohort of 22 women changed my life. We weren’t there because we dreamed of being in office. We were there because we quite reluctantly saw running as the only solution to problems nobody else seemed to be fixing.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112929681/562081388/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-08-07_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI5NmUyZTNiLWRhNzMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MuDc-Xr6fD7VKIHQiMcLxJ2uIK81C1enEvD073BE2JA=)
---
| Peter,

When I applied to train with Emerge, I was sure that I was going to be rejected.

I had no political experience. I had never worked on a campaign.

_But it’s a funny thing — when you raise your hand, you tend to be called on._

My Emerge training cohort of 22 women changed my life. We weren’t there because we dreamed of being in office. We were there because we quite reluctantly saw running as the only solution to problems nobody else seemed to be fixing.

**We learned the hard way how to make our own seats at the table, because we know damn well nobody is going to make them for us.**

Now I’m running for the U.S. Senate with that same “why.” Because if you haven’t noticed, our country is going through it. We need more women with the courage to raise their hands, step up, and lead. That’s what Emerge does best, and that's why I’m personally asking you to invest in this work right now.

clean_body: My Emerge training cohort of 22 women changed my life. We weren’t there because we dreamed of being in office. We were there because we quite reluctantly saw running as the only solution to problems nobody else seemed to be fixing. | = | Peter, When I applied to train with Emerge, I was sure that I was going to be rejected. I had no political experience. I had never worked on a campaign. But it’s a funny thing — when you raise your hand, you tend to be called on. My Emerge training cohort of 22 women changed my life. We weren’t there because we dreamed of being in office. We were there because we quite reluctantly saw running as the only solution to problems nobody else seemed to be fixing. We learned the hard way how to make our own seats at the table, because we know damn well nobody is going to make them for us. Now I’m running for the U.S. Senate with that same “why.” Because if you haven’t noticed, our country is going through it. We need more women with the courage to raise their hands, step up, and lead. That’s what Emerge does best, and that's why I’m personally asking you to invest in this work right now. = | = | = Every dollar helps build the bench of women who will fight back. We are the ones who will write our new American Dream. Let’s make sure more women have the tools and training to lead us there. In solidarity, Mallory McMorrow Emerge Alum Candidate for U.S. Senate, Michigan = = | = * | | = Paid for by Emerge America Emerge America 818 Connecticut Avenue NW, Suite 450 Washington, DC 20006 United States | = =

name: Team DNC
subject: The FBI is helping Republicans gerrymander Texas…
body:
---
Derek, We wanted to get you this update as soon as we could: This morning, Texas Republican Senator John Cornyn announced that Kash Patel had agreed to his request to deploy the FBI to help locate the Texas Democrats who left the state to prevent Republican gerrymandering efforts. **That’s right, Derek: Republicans are so desperate to rig the map in Texas that they’re enlisting the FBI as a tool in their corrupt scheme.** The fact that Texas Republicans are _blatantly_ trying to steal five Democratic seats in 2026 means they know that their agenda is a losing one. But if they succeed, they could continue clinging to power in Congress in 2026 and beyond. That’s why Republicans are desperate to win this fight. **And that’s why we need to be laser-focused on this, too.** The Texas Democrats who left the state to prevent a vote on the rigged map are brave, and they need to know that Democrats across the country have their backs.**That’s why we’re asking for your help.** [By donating $3 today, you’ll be contributing to the DNC’s efforts to win back control of Congress and fight back against Republican scheming like this. name: Team Abdul
subject: From bagging groceries to building a movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250807-663&t=1001&akid=682%2E251025%2E4n6MHH ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250807-663&t=1002&akid=682%2E251025%2E4n6MHH ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

As a first-generation American, Abdul grew up with a view of two worlds.

His father and stepmother gave him a childhood like many suburban kids in
Michigan. But every summer, he’d travel to Alexandria, Egypt, where he saw
a different version of what his life could have looked like.

[ Abdul ]Abdul as a kid in Egypt

Seeing this contrast made him realize early on that the zip code you’re
born in shouldn’t decide the opportunities you get in life.

Abdul bagged groceries at 14. He was on the football, wrestling, and
lacrosse teams in high school, and played lacrosse at the University of
Michigan, all while dreaming of how to serve something bigger than
himself.

[ A ]A picture of Abdul as a teen in football gear

In school, Abdul saw the truth behind our broken healthcare system and
made a bold choice. Instead of becoming a doctor who could treat one
patient at a time, he became a public servant who could fight for
everyone.

[ A ]A screenshot of Abdul talking with a Fox 2 news host. The chyron reads
'One-on-one with Wayne County's new public health director'

As Detroit’s and then Wayne County’s Health Director, Abdul rebuilt a
health department from scratch after bankruptcy. He gave thousands of kids
free glasses, helped erase $700 million in medical debt, and forced
corporate polluters to clean up their act.

Now, Abdul’s running for U.S. Senate. Not because he ever planned to — but
because he believes it shouldn’t be this hard to get healthcare, afford
groceries, or know your kids will grow up safe and secure.

[ Abdul ]Abdul with a crowd of volunteers at the campaign office

To win a statewide election in a battleground state, you have to pool
together a lot of resources. And since Abdul isn’t taking a dime of
corporate PAC money, he’s counting on your help to continue traveling
across Michigan.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250807-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250807-663&refcode2=682_251025_4n6MHH&akid=682%2E251025%2E4n6MHH ]Will you make a donation of $10 or more to help us keep
building?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250807-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250807-663&refcode2=682_251025_4n6MHH&akid=682%2E251025%2E4n6MHH ]Donate $10 ››

Thank you for being on our team,

Team Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1003&akid=682%2E251025%2E4n6MHH
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1004&akid=682%2E251025%2E4n6MHH

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23273%2E4449941%2EwZmv0i) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23273%2E4449941%2EwZmv0i) Did you see the news, friend?! [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/65662?t=3&akid=23273%2E4449941%2EwZmv0i) **This is a STUNNING update!!!**

In response to the recent gerrymandering efforts in Texas, Gavin Newsom is standing up to Trump and MAGA Republicans with a plan of his own. **He’s not going down without a fight, and _neither are we!_** [**Friend — if you support Gavin Newsom’s efforts to counteract Trump’s illegal redistricting plan in Texas, sign our petition now to STAND with him! >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/65662?t=4&akid=23273%2E4449941%2EwZmv0i) | [STAND WITH GAVIN NEWSOM →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/65662?t=5&akid=23273%2E4449941%2EwZmv0i)
---
[**We need everyone on board. We are launching a goal to collect [10,000] local Democrats’ signatures before MIDNIGHT.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/65662?t=6&akid=23273%2E4449941%2EwZmv0i)
Friend, this is serious. Donald Trump and his MAGA GOP are trying to **suppress as many Democratic votes in Texas as possible** with this new redistricting plan.

And they won’t stop there!

_They’re going to keep going in every state until they steal the Midterms from Democrats!_
**_This is full-on voter suppression, friend!_**
Luckily, Democrats around the country aren’t backing down. Just look at what Gov. Gavin Newsom said in response to Trump’s efforts:
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/65662?t=7&akid=23273%2E4449941%2EwZmv0i)
[**Our fragile Democracy is on the line, friend! If you stand with Gavin Newsom against Trump’s illegal redistricting plans, sign our petition now! We need [4,762] more signatures by midnight! >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/65662?t=8&akid=23273%2E4449941%2EwZmv0i)
[STAND WITH GAVIN NEWSOM →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/65662?t=9&akid=23273%2E4449941%2EwZmv0i)

Counting on you,

_Fight for Reform_

name: Roy Cooper
subject: This is how you win a swing state:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Join me in the fight. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112930221/562083374/823540626?refcode=ea.b7b152be-db73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.b7b152be-db73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2IxNTJiZS1kYjczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bOrL65Crf_V55oqoDiku_5gNGj40POY5DkXyClJ7ahM=&emci=b3b152be-db73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=b7b152be-db73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=17205535)
Peter — North Carolina is a swing state, and we can be sure that Republicans will go all out to defeat us. But I know how to win North Carolina. _Whether it was Attorney General or Governor, I’ve done it over and over in the most competitive years._ It takes the dedication to connect with folks in every community, the commitment to fight for the rights that people hold dear, and the courage to stand up in the face of threats to the progress we’ve made. **I served as Governor for eight years. I know that North Carolinians don’t want to go backward. And based on the enthusiasm we’re seeing for our campaign from people across our country, that sentiment is true for Americans everywhere.** As a U.S. Senator, I will fight for our rights to the ballot box, reproductive health care, clean air and drinking water, and more. I will work to make health care _more_ affordable and accessible — not yank it away from those most in need. I’ll advocate for better public schools, more clean energy options, and opportunities for good-paying jobs. I will defend our democracy. And I’ll never stop listening to what _the people_ need from me and meeting them where they are. I believe that this is how you win a swing state, Peter. And I _know_ that — with you on our team — we can succeed here in North Carolina. **[I’m asking you to make a contribution to our campaign because _right now_ is when we can build the momentum to win. Chip in $10 today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112930223/562083376/-1743631236?amount=10&refcode=ea.b7b152be-db73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.b7b152be-db73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2IxNTJiZS1kYjczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bOrL65Crf_V55oqoDiku_5gNGj40POY5DkXyClJ7ahM=)** | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112930224/562083377/-1743631236?refcode=ea.b7b152be-db73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.b7b152be-db73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2IxNTJiZS1kYjczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bOrL65Crf_V55oqoDiku_5gNGj40POY5DkXyClJ7ahM=)**
---
Grateful to have you with me,
Roy Cooper
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112930225/562083378/-1743631236?refcode=ea.b7b152be-db73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.b7b152be-db73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2IxNTJiZS1kYjczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bOrL65Crf_V55oqoDiku_5gNGj40POY5DkXyClJ7ahM=)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112930226/562083379/-1743631236?refcode=ea.b7b152be-db73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.b7b152be-db73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2IxNTJiZS1kYjczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bOrL65Crf_V55oqoDiku_5gNGj40POY5DkXyClJ7ahM=)**

clean_body: Join me in the fight. | Peter — North Carolina is a swing state, and we can be sure that Republicans will go all out to defeat us. But I know how to win North Carolina. Whether it was Attorney General or Governor, I’ve done it over and over in the most competitive years. It takes the dedication to connect with folks in every community, the commitment to fight for the rights that people hold dear, and the courage to stand up in the face of threats to the progress we’ve made. I served as Governor for eight years. I know that North Carolinians don’t want to go backward. And based on the enthusiasm we’re seeing for our campaign from people across our country, that sentiment is true for Americans everywhere. As a U.S. Senator, I will fight for our rights to the ballot box, reproductive health care, clean air and drinking water, and more. I will work to make health care more affordable and accessible — not yank it away from those most in need. I’ll advocate for better public schools, more clean energy options, and opportunities for good-paying jobs. I will defend our democracy. And I’ll never stop listening to what the people need from me and meeting them where they are. I believe that this is how you win a swing state, Peter. And I know that — with you on our team — we can succeed here in North Carolina. = | = Grateful to have you with me, Roy Cooper = Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. = = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. name: Nellie Pou
subject: How I won this seat…
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pout-header-3.png]

Friend,

National Republicans saw unprecedented gains in New Jersey in 2024.

Donald Trump carried this district, and at the same time, I won my seat.

Because voters knew me.

They knew I wasn’t running to protect the status quo; I was running to fight for them. That’s why I won. Because this district knows I’m here to serve, not to score political points.

My campaign is meeting every voter – no matter who they voted for – where they are, listening to their frustrations, and showing them a better path forward.

That’s where your donation makes a real difference. We need resources to talk to every voter. We’re offering real solutions and real hope. I’m talking about good-paying jobs, lowering prices, quality healthcare, and keeping our district safe.

That’s what this campaign is all about. Talking to people, not over them. Listening — and delivering.

If you believe in that kind of politics, I hope you’ll chip in today to help us reach more voters and defend this seat. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?amount=10&:refcode=250807_np_campaign_l1]

DONATE TO DEFEND NJ-09 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=250807_np_campaign_b1]Thank you for believing in me.

— Nellie
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pou_headshot_crop.jpg]

About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=fbfefed0-db73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b] Give Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=fbfefed0-db73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b]
Follow Nellie
https://x.com/NelliePou [https://x.com/NelliePou] https://www.facebook.com/senatorpou/ [https://www.facebook.com/senatorpou/] https://www.instagram.com/congresswomannelliepou/ [https://www.instagram.com/congresswomannelliepou/]

name: Jon Ossoff for U.S. Senate
subject: Slump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Here is the truth, Peter, directly and transparently:
We have received fewer individual donations so far in August than we had planned for to keep pace with our budget goals.
This isn’t too unexpected as the summer months are notoriously tough for fundraising — folks are spending more time outside enjoying the weather with family and friends _(as they should!)_ and less time online. We call it the “summer slump.”
But we need to get back on track to hit our goals in August, and have the best chance to re-elect Jon Ossoff and take back the Senate. What we are able to raise now will be _absolutely critical_ for our effort.
If everyone reading this donated $10, we’d get there by the end of the day. But unfortunately, not everyone gives. That’s why Jon is hoping people like you who understand the stakes of this election can step up today to help us close the gap.
What do you say, Peter?
**[Please, make a contribution to Jon Ossoff’s re-election campaign today. Our average donation this month is about $28. Many give more. Some give less. All that matters is that lots of people are getting involved because it will add up fast.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250807-1-full-a&t=1&akid=619%2E5691347%2EnHv1vd)

And the support this campaign has seen so far, has been inspiring. And we have full faith in this team to get Jon to a victory.
So, thank you in advance for chipping in today. It means a lot to Jon.
\- Team Ossoff

Elizabeth Warren](https://substack.com/redirect/0dd07a02-461b-4ae9-8eea-859e81d8b197?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** over her loud support for radical socialist NYC mayoral candidate Zohran Mamdani, leading to a heated clash live on air.
"Business owners are going to leave the city!" Faber snapped at Warren. "You think someone who has absolutely no experience, a 33-year-old socialist, is going to succeed as the mayor of New York?!"

# **[The $18,000 House You Missed](https://substack.com/redirect/6d3f8b38-7db0-498c-9df7-28e847b5e7e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

---|---|---
**Pop quiz:**
It's 1970. You have $18,000 in gold coins.
Option A: Sell the coins, buy the house ($18,000 price tag)
Option B: Keep the 500 gold coins
Most people pick the house.
Smart move, right?
**Dead wrong.**
Fast-forward to 1980. That house now costs $47,000. But those 500 gold coins?
**You only need 77 of them to buy that house.**
You pocket the other 423 coins. Today, those leftover coins are worth nearly $1.4 million.
While your neighbors are still paying mortgages, you're sitting on a goldmine. But now there's something _new_ that could boom the price like 50 years ago...
**[Get the full story[here ](https://substack.com/redirect/6d3f8b38-7db0-498c-9df7-28e847b5e7e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)->]**
[Read FullStory](https://substack.com/redirect/6d3f8b38-7db0-498c-9df7-28e847b5e7e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# FBI fires former acting director and officer involved in Jan 6 prosecutions
The FBI is **[forcing out at least three high-ranking officials](https://substack.com/redirect/ecff6a43-f878-42a1-a144-82bb3b46fcb4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on Thursday, including former acting director Brian Driscoll, special agent Walter Giardina (who investigated Trump advisor Peter Navarro), and Steven Jensen (acting director of Washington Field Office who was involved in January 6 investigations).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ecff6a43-f878-42a1-a144-82bb3b46fcb4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Officials were told to leave by Friday with no specific reasons given** , with one source describing the removals as "retribution" and more ousters expected by week's end under new FBI Director Kash Patel.
* **The removals follow months of scrutiny over January 6 investigations** , including a February questionnaire forcing thousands of FBI personnel to detail their roles in Capitol riot investigations and a subsequent order to compile lists of all employees involved in the cases.
* **Nine current FBI agents filed a lawsuit over concerns** that the employee lists could threaten their careers and disrupt the bureau's work, fearing retaliation for their involvement in January 6-related investigations.
* **The actions align with Trump's previous criticism of the FBI as "corrupt"** and his promise that Director Kash Patel would "straighten it out," though former Justice Department officials warn of potential chilling effects on the bureau's essential work across its 52+ field offices.

Here’s your Off the Sidelines 60-second update on two major moments for democracy: |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112930278/562083642/-530215862?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.07_OTS-60-Seconds_B2_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNThhNzlmMC1kYjczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z8bpIOQ0Ur1Sd9uYb6v9r4xblgr-fLO-8Dl1NvkhDnY=)
Here’s your 60-second update on two major moments for OUR democracy — and how Off the Sidelines and Democrats across the country are stepping up to meet them: **First: Texas Democrats walked out to stop a GOP power grab.** Earlier this week, Texas Republicans tried to ram through a redistricting plan that would add five new Republican congressional seats — undermining representation for communities of color and consolidating GOP power. Rather than stay silent, Texas Democrats left the state and broke quorum, refusing to legitimize the vote. It was a bold, high-stakes move — and it’s working. The GOP-controlled TX House is at a standstill. Even with Governor Greg Abbott threatening to remove them from office and arrest them, Texas House Democrats refuse to back down. **Next: Kathy Hochul welcomed Texas Democrats — and spoke out for fair maps.** When Texas Democrats landed in New York, Governor Hochul met them with a powerful message: **We’re not going to let self-serving politicians rewrite the rules of our democracy.** _She’s right_. This moment isn’t just about Texas — it’s about what kind of country we want to build in 2026 and beyond. That’s why Off the Sidelines is supporting candidates who are fighting back against rigged maps, voter suppression, and GOP overreach. **[_But our work can’t stop here — can we count on you to chip in and support our movement?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112930279/562083645/-204835043?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.07_OTS-60-Seconds_B2_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNThhNzlmMC1kYjczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z8bpIOQ0Ur1Sd9uYb6v9r4xblgr-fLO-8Dl1NvkhDnY=)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $10 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112930280/562083651/-204835043?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.07_OTS-60-Seconds_B2_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNThhNzlmMC1kYjczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z8bpIOQ0Ur1Sd9uYb6v9r4xblgr-fLO-8Dl1NvkhDnY=)

| Aug 7
---
| [](https://substack.com/@cliffsedge)| | [](https://substack.com/@davidshuster)| | [](https://substack.com/@willrobinson)
---|---|---|---|---

`Folks, The Number of New Paid Subscribers has Dramatically Slowed Down. Without Them, We Can't Expand The Soundcheck Fund--as Trump Kills the Corporation for Public Broadcasting. Please Consider a Paid Subscription to Support Independent Media`
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.eBwrL3L6U_oX20f2b1VdoEo5fltayuBftEWLmxzkYgA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=170375509)
Today's _Amped Up_ kicked off with Cliff giving a proper smackdown to washed-up Superman impersonator, and right-wing doofus-recruit, Dean Cain. Cain, who once played the Man of Steel--quite horrifically to be honest, he was easily the sh*ttiest Superman by a distance of here to Krypton--announced [a new gig with ICE](https://substack.com/redirect/08b59991-b707-4083-b780-8045b54d63e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Yes, ](https://substack.com/redirect/54e843b9-28a7-4207-b395-5f59e0b86585?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[that](https://substack.com/redirect/54e843b9-28a7-4207-b395-5f59e0b86585?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ ICE](https://substack.com/redirect/54e843b9-28a7-4207-b395-5f59e0b86585?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). On Instagram with Superman theme music blaring in the background. He should be charged with aggravated assault on our senses for that last part.
Cliff let him have it, tearing apart Cain's hypocrisy from every angle: his role as an immigrant alien superhero, his alleged Christian values that would include--[if he chose to read the book he claims to follow](https://substack.com/redirect/87b644eb-fdee-42df-b367-09a4b0d526d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--"The Parable of the Stranger," and his own family's history of internment during World War II (he is part Japanese).
Not to mention his throwing in, in general, with [the predator class](https://substack.com/redirect/224c5677-44ce-49a5-8a95-c31297f29b1c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Cliff finished him off with a few points that aren't debatable; 1) Dean Cain's acting is so Kryptonite-laden he makes Kevin Sorbo seem like Humphrey Bogart 2) George Reeves, who once played the role, would do a better Superman right now and he's been dead 65 years 3) Dean Cain likely accepted the gig with ICE because it's the only acting gig that's been offered to him in the better part of a decade.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/669c76fc-3ad8-49c0-8beb-e20fda918f36?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_But that was just the opening act!_
This episode dove into an essential and long-overdue conversation about Democratic campaigns. It was with a giant in the industry of Democratic media consulting-turned-reformer, Will Robinson, about [how ](https://substack.com/redirect/224c5677-44ce-49a5-8a95-c31297f29b1c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[Democrats have failed to communicate with voters](https://substack.com/redirect/224c5677-44ce-49a5-8a95-c31297f29b1c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the digital age_.
Will, a self-described recovering TV ad guy, laid it out: the right has built a 24/7 propaganda machine through bots, radio, Facebook groups, and a constant cultural presence in people's lives. Meanwhile, too many Dem consultants are still burning cash on cable TV ads for reverse mortgage viewers.
**We 're showing up in October; the right never stops showing up.**
Cliff, David Schuster, and Will broke down:
* Why culture beats credentials and porch talk beats podium talk ([even when the porch talk is filled with lies](https://substack.com/redirect/81c5206f-85ee-4097-9f7a-88802e9133dd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg))
* How Democrats are ignoring real-life, everyday messengers in favor of polished infomercial-style ads that don't resonate
* Why nurses, teachers, bus drivers, _and even head lice tips_ are more politically powerful than a white paper from Harvard
* How Substack, Facebook, and cell phone videos can save democracy if we quit waiting for permission to use 'em. Embrace the authenticity of regular folks, influencers in a two-way conversation with audiences and creators not controlled by corporations. [In other words: independent media!](https://substack.com/redirect/d1d06841-4251-4947-b2b1-ec51bcc3685d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

It's not just about **what we say** --it's **how we say it** , **who says it** , and **whether we 're even bothering to show up**.
By the end of the show, the message was clear: We don't need a Superman. We need a damn communications revolution where [we respond to disinformation ](https://substack.com/redirect/8256cf69-6c7d-4753-8197-1967c266db34?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)and build trust with our people. And we can do this by working with those whom voters already trust, because they know them--local residents, community pillars, and influencers.
It was an important and fascinating conversation with a whistleblower of sorts. Check it out!
## `Do we Want Independent Media or Corporate Control? Folks,THIS IS OUR CHANCE To Prevent a Rigged Future. Consider a Paid Subscription to our Soundcheck Fund to FUND Independent Media!`
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.eBwrL3L6U_oX20f2b1VdoEo5fltayuBftEWLmxzkYgA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=170375509)

body:

Team,

We fought some important battles for Northwest Ohio last month, friend! I'll never stop fighting for our home and the community that raised me, because Ohioans deserve nothing less.

[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/Kaptur%20July%20Recap%20FNL.jpeg]

We wouldn’t be able to do this important work without your support, friend. I'm so grateful to have you on my team.

CHIP IN→ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=250807_mk_july_recap_b1] Onward,— Marcy
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-headshot.jpg]

About Marcy Kaptur
Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House.

Hey folks,
Just got off the road and back on the mic with today's guest Steve Schmidt--and this one's a barn burner. We covered a lot of ground, but if you're tracking the Epstein cover-up, worried about the rise of Trump's secret police, or just trying to make sense of where the hell our democracy is headed, you need to watch this.
Steve and I don't hold back. We talk about the cowardice in our politics, the corruption running wild through our institutions, and what it's really going to take to build a Democratic Party that can win again--not just electorally, but morally and for the long term. This is one of those episodes I'll be thinking about for a long time.
Here's a glimpse of what we covered:
**[04:55]** JD Vance's hush-hush meetings and the real reason Ghislaine Maxwell might get a pardon
**[13:40]** Steve unpacks the creation of a fascist ICE militia--and what he's doing to expose it
**[24:10]** Why Democrats keep falling into the same traps--and how we start fighting smart
**[38:45]** A raw look at the 2025 midterms, the establishment's blind spots, and what's coming next
**[50:15]** The plane, the pardon, and the symbolic power we must reclaim in Project 2029
This one's a must-watch if you care about power, accountability, and the future of the Democratic Party.
**If you believe in building a party that fights for people --and fights to win--I need you with me. Endless Urgency is 100% reader-supported. Becoming a paid subscriber means you're not just watching the fight, you're helping lead it:**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..xRg5Nu3Gtyn8laYPkPoGzxD3fLFEtA9yLKAMlyLuJB8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=170383459)
With urgency,
--Mike

# **Trump’s 2025 Economic Revolution Is Here
Are Your Retirement Savings Ready?
**
---
**President Trump’s “One Big Beautiful Bill” strives to deliver the largest tax cuts for working and middle class Americans in our country’s history.** His bold plan not only extends the historic 2017 tax cuts but introduces even deeper reforms aimed at empowering American workers and retirees. If you are retired or near retirement, this could mean more money in your savings and a once-in-a-generation opportunity to help protect lasting wealth—**if you’re prepared**. **But here’s the catch:**
This new economic agenda may come with both massive opportunity and serious risk for anyone with a traditional retirement account—like a 401(k), IRA, or TSP. The fatal flaw? These accounts are built on a Wall Street system that assumes stability, free from manipulation and political shocks. And in today’s world, all it could take is one major event—another bank failure, a geopolitical crisis, a market crash—to wipe out decades of your savings like it did in the 2008 Financial Crisis. **If you have a retirement account and want to help safeguard—not just survive—during Trump’s economic revolution, this is your wake-up call.** We’ve outlined a wealth protection strategy inside the **[2025 Retirement Protection Guide](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** — and it’s completely FREE. **Inside this guide, you'll discover an IRS-approved loophole that allows you to move your retirement savings tax-free and penalty-free into a safe haven asset and hedge your wealth against inflation, market volatility and geopolitical crises.** **Time is short.** Trump’s reforms may be coming fast—and the financial system roller coaster may be a ride that you don’t want to take with your retirement savings.
---

So far, nearly a dozen states – including most battleground states – have received sweeping requests for sensitive election materials.
States like Colorado, Arizona, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, Nevada, Maine, and New Hampshire have received these requests.
**Let’s call this what it is, friend: a federal takeover of elections, grounded in conspiracy theories and designed to intimidate election officials.**
This isn’t about “election integrity.” It’s about Donald Trump laying the groundwork to discredit the 2026 and 2028 elections – just like he did in 2020.
Even Republican election officials are pushing back, refusing to cooperate and warning that these demands are dangerous and unprecedented.
At DASS, we’re preparing to fight back – but we need your help today.

Team,
I’m a lifelong Virginian. I was born and raised in Hampton Roads — the same community where I’m raising my own children.
I’m fighting to preserve our natural resources so my children and all children across the Commonwealth can grow up with a safe, clean environment.
That’s why I’ve made protecting Virginia’s environment a priority throughout my career. As a delegate, I championed policies that would expand clean energy production across Virginia and move us toward a more sustainable future.
I’ll keep the fight for our environment going as Attorney General, and will use every avenue to stop state and federal rollbacks on key environmental protections, like these:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025?]
Meanwhile, my opponent — Trump loyalist Jason Miyares — has been backing MAGA Republicans’ efforts to strip climate protections.
He’s defending Gov. Youngkin’s executive overreach to pull the Commonwealth from sustainability programs — and he’ll stand by as Trump’s radical agenda worsens climate change across the Commonwealth.
Team, Virginians can’t afford four more years with Jason Miyares as Attorney General. Will you please chip in any amount today to support my campaign to defeat him in November and give Virginia a leader who will stand up for our environment against the extreme MAGA movement’s threats? name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: CAUGHT: Heinrich’s Mexico “Leadership Conference”?
body:
New episode of No Doubt About It out now for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=5d92c0e81e&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | You're not going to believe [**this one**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=ccd9969072&e=567664f14c)... Senator Martin Heinrich is hosting a "leadership conference" for his top supporters — not in Albuquerque, not in Santa Fe, not even in Taos — but in Playa del Carmen, Mexico.

Yes, you read that right.

[**🇲🇽 A luxury beach resort in Mexico is where Heinrich has chosen to hold his political powwow.**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=36a407a8f7&e=567664f14c)

Krysty asks the obvious question: Why not New Mexico?

Mark follows the money and digs deep into the political action committee behind the event, uncovering how this “Mexican vacation” is being pulled off — all while New Mexicans are struggling with high interest rates and skyrocketing debt.
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=56015a782e&e=567664f14c)
| **🔥 Also in This Episode:**

**🩺 Governor Lujan Grisham Blames Trump for Healthcare Woes**

She went on Face the Nation to slam the Trump administration, but we expose why New Mexico's healthcare failures fall directly on her shoulders.

**🗺️ Texas Democrats Flee the State... Again**

We break down the political stunt — and why it’s likely to backfire in a big way.

**💳 Rising Debt Crisis in America**

We've been warning you about this for months. Now, new data proves it: credit card debt and delinquencies are exploding. We’ll show you the numbers you can’t ignore.

**🎓 Ava’s Off to Liberty University**

Before she leaves, we play a hilarious game of “Name That '80s Object” with Ava and Ella to see how much they really know about their parents' totally radical childhood.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=db32e87094&e=567664f14c)
