clean_body: New episode of No Doubt About It out now for dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | | | | | | | | | You're not going to believe ... Senator Martin Heinrich is hosting a "leadership conference" for his top supporters — not in Albuquerque, not in Santa Fe, not even in Taos — but in Playa del Carmen, Mexico. Yes, you read that right. Krysty asks the obvious question: Why not New Mexico? Mark follows the money and digs deep into the political action committee behind the event, uncovering how this “Mexican vacation” is being pulled off — all while New Mexicans are struggling with high interest rates and skyrocketing debt. | 🔥 Also in This Episode: 🩺 Governor Lujan Grisham Blames Trump for Healthcare Woes She went on Face the Nation to slam the Trump administration, but we expose why New Mexico's healthcare failures fall directly on her shoulders. 🗺️ Texas Democrats Flee the State... Again We break down the political stunt — and why it’s likely to backfire in a big way. 💳 Rising Debt Crisis in America We've been warning you about this for months. Now, new data proves it: credit card debt and delinquencies are exploding. We’ll show you the numbers you can’t ignore. 🎓 Ava’s Off to Liberty University Before she leaves, we play a hilarious game of “Name That '80s Object” with Ava and Ella to see how much they really know about their parents' totally radical childhood. | | | ❤️ Help Us Keep Growing! ✅ LIKE the episode on ✅ SUBSCRIBE to and hit the 🔔 for updates ✅ RATE & REVIEW us on ✅ DONATE to support independent, fearless commentary at: 🌐 Thank you for standing with us. Derek,
We recently asked folks what matters most to them in a recent survey — and we heard from thousands of people who wrote in to share their priorities and their hopes for the future.
One issue came up again and again: **protecting our democracy.**
One person wrote: “ _Making the Attorney General and the justice system accountable_.”
Another said: “ _Congress needs to do its part in maintaining the checks and balances built into the Constitution — in particular, limiting the damage to our democracy and government being done by the current president._ ”
These concerns are at the heart of Adam’s work and career.
He’s spent years defending our democratic institutions, and in the Senate, he’s continuing the fight to ensure accountability, protect the rule of law, and strengthen the foundations of our democracy.
**[If you believe in this mission, will you add your name to stand with Adam and protect our democracy?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-202508-democracy.VIfhX9&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250807_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=4&akid=8873%2E5257348%2EL5r6ya)**

name: Mantra Dave
subject: Our strategy to win back Latino voters
body:
This is how we win. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112931515/562087680/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTRjMzE3MTEtZTI3My1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=heh0q_aeDn7ffkWI056dtvN_bbZ2Mbr6B6wp7nPtgAw=) | Hi Peter, Yesterday Josh shared a tough but important message about the GOP’s growing gains among Latino voters — not just nationally, but right here in CA-09. [_**Today, I want to walk you through exactly what we’re doing to respond and why your support is so critical right now. If you’re able, I hope you’ll chip in to help us get this off the ground:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112931517/562087686/-548925425?&refcode=E14514-20250807-LatinoStrategy-SL-CampaignNews&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTRjMzE3MTEtZTI3My1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=heh0q_aeDn7ffkWI056dtvN_bbZ2Mbr6B6wp7nPtgAw=) [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112931520/562087693/-548925425?&refcode=E14514-20250807-LatinoStrategy-SB-CampaignNews&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTRjMzE3MTEtZTI3My1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=heh0q_aeDn7ffkWI056dtvN_bbZ2Mbr6B6wp7nPtgAw=) Now here’s what we need to do ASAP: ✅ **Run Spanish-language ads** to fight back against GOP misinformation
✅**Send targeted mailers** to Latino voters across the district
✅ **Hire a full-time Latino Constituency Director** to lead this outreach and build lasting relationships in the community We know this isn’t just smart strategy, it’s how we win. Latino voters make up nearly 40% of our district, and building meaningful, consistent engagement is the only way we can hold this seat and protect the House majority in 2026. **But here’s the challenge: We need to move quickly. subject: I am going to exert my powers.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc
body:
This is a message from the President about the attack on an incredible young man in the Capital.
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
**_I AM GOING TO EXERT MY POWERS_**
MEMBER ID - [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.) RESPONSE DEADLINE - Now!

[Friend SECURE LINK](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Patriot,
**Crime in Washington, D.C., is totally out of control.** ****
Local “youths” and gang members, some only 14, 15, and 16-years-old, are randomly attacking, mugging, maiming, and shooting innocent Citizens, at the same time knowing that they will be almost immediately released.
They are not afraid of Law Enforcement because they know nothing ever happens to them, but it’s going to happen now!
The Law in D.C. must be changed to prosecute these “minors” as adults, and lock them up for a long time, starting at age 14. The most recent victim was beaten mercilessly by local thugs. Washington, D.C., must be safe, clean, and beautiful for all Americans and, importantly, for the World to see.
If D.C. doesn’t get its act together, and quickly, we will have no choice but to take Federal control of the City, and run this City how it should be run, and put criminals on notice that they’re not going to get away with it anymore. Perhaps it should have been done a long time ago, then this incredible young man, and so many others, would not have had to go through the horrors of Violent Crime.
**If this continues, I am going to exert my powers, and FEDERALIZE this City. MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN!** ****
SHOULD WE FEDERALIZE DC RIGHT NOW?
[RESPOND TO TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Thank you,
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Donald J. Trump President of the United States

name: Maxwell Frost
subject: sorry I don’t own any stocks?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/o58io8ZuYxgQgidUHvNDWQ~~/AAPPABA~/Z9wpY0O67HKmvr8T_eEG7o4pxvNzTjDqGpQxry9PR1smypM3hsISUlF6SX4gm-sMRrgJsC5LfxUPTA0t8-DDNyGDX8XOZHNjLko3wXiByEeEz91JmbUkMHrqOgdR8smJfWKUSdi80TXcoPeVd6IQ0YZxI3txJEy_nO2XV-TK7MGtKp2_XqBZplnwfxbdDZMecMJM02pMu2VqlLOFstzLywAAOX3htoIOXyu-u6GT8v5KVIrBpIQ8l3lVyoZDDGFhZJL_UHnSLk0Sdu51cdc79ptLVuHWf2OuQTreXaSukpcNxfeVyHC6w-lbgQYTddNrWUJacp_kCFDt0NotEdiVnH8BynFXxhZKlFAytVAysjOK3NF3U7k_Bx8BkqmbDt2E)
---
| Peter, I released my annual financial disclosure form, and it only took me 5 minutes – because I don’t own any stocks.

And that’s exactly what Republicans love attacking me for: not being rich.

They can attack me all they want, but I have _no_ shame. Unlike them, I haven’t abused my office to get rich off stock trading.

When I ran for Congress, I drove for Uber and took on credit card debt just to get by. And after my swearing in, I got denied from apartments in D.C. because of my credit.

So it’s funny when I get called out for experiencing the struggles that working class Americans experience everyday – because shouldn’t we have more leaders who know what it’s like? I think if we did, Congress would work a lot better than it does now.

I’m proud to represent us, and I’m committed to fighting for all of us. But it wasn’t easy for someone like me to get to Congress, so I need your support to stay here. [**_If you believe in having representatives who can actually represent the lives real people live, will you chip in $27 to my campaign before midnight? clean_body: | | Peter, I released my annual financial disclosure form, and it only took me 5 minutes – because I don’t own any stocks. And that’s exactly what Republicans love attacking me for: not being rich. They can attack me all they want, but I have no shame. Unlike them, I haven’t abused my office to get rich off stock trading. When I ran for Congress, I drove for Uber and took on credit card debt just to get by. And after my swearing in, I got denied from apartments in D.C. because of my credit. So it’s funny when I get called out for experiencing the struggles that working class Americans experience everyday – because shouldn’t we have more leaders who know what it’s like? I think if we did, Congress would work a lot better than it does now. I’m proud to represent us, and I’m committed to fighting for all of us. But it wasn’t easy for someone like me to get to Congress, so I need your support to stay here. name: Pennsylvania Democrats
subject: we’re fighting and scoring victories for our students
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
**Peter, Democrats have not given up. If anything, we’re fighting harder for Pennsylvania.**

When Trump froze $230 million of federal funding from the Pennsylvania Department of Education, our Democratic leaders went right to work.
* Governor Shapiro joined a multi-state lawsuit challenging Donald Trump
* Our Democratic representatives in Congress called for Trump to restore this funding

After weeks of pressure, demanding the Trump Administration restore funding for our schools, our after school programs, adult education, enrichment, and more — **_we scored a victory!_** **Billions of education funding will be released!**

**But here’s the underlying issue: this is a victory we shouldn’t have needed to fight for.** This was _Congressionally-appropriated funding owed to us_ — and Trump’s attempt to freeze it was unlawful. Our school districts across Pennsylvania were unnecessarily sent into a scramble, making hasty plans to cut programs and staff. This is the kind of instability that disrupts how our education administrators and teachers are able to plan for our kids.

That’s why we have to elect Democrats up and down the ballot this November and next year in the midterms. **We need to build up a blue wave so that we aren’t just playing defense against attacks like this. Securing blue seats in our local, state, and federal governments means we’ll be able to go on the offense with policy that serves hardworking Pennsylvanian families.**

**_[Peter, will you help us turn the tides and elect leaders that actually put hardworking Pennsylvanians first by donating $10?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112931872/562088990/-1357903355?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250807_FR_EducaFunds_0_1MO_PADems_NA_NA_Released&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDI1ODY2OS1lMzczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_qVRQ3YPfjJPKoiV2b80ZxiHMHCUytBW4kLft5KJJkM=)_** | | [TURN THE TIDE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112931873/562088991/-1357903355?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250807_FR_EducaFunds_0_1MO_PADems_NA_NA_Released&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDI1ODY2OS1lMzczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_qVRQ3YPfjJPKoiV2b80ZxiHMHCUytBW4kLft5KJJkM=)

clean_body: Whatever the amount, today is the day to show you stand with Abigail Spanberger. | Derek, today is Abigail Spanberger's birthday! In case you don't know, Abigail kept our country safe as a CIA case officer and served for three terms in Congress. Now, she's running for Governor of Virginia in the biggest election of 2025. But Trump just attacked Abigail on TV — and it's only a matter of time until he uses his billion-dollar war chest against her. Today, in recognition of Abigail's birthday, we're asking you to make a founding contribution to her historic campaign. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for helping make Abigail's birthday so very special, Team DPVA [content goes here] Forwarded this email? name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I’m honored to endorse my good friend Deb Haaland
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
I hope you’ll join me in supporting Deb’s historic campaign.
Hi there — it's Elizabeth Warren.
I’m honored to endorse my good friend Deb Haaland’s run to become New Mexico’s next governor, and [**I’m hoping you’ll join me in supporting her by making a donation to power her historic campaign today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250807_1_ew?refcode=em20250807-3663&refcode2=3663_400544_qBZolv&akid=3663%2E400544%2EqBZolv)
**Deb is the real deal.** I watched her fight like hell for working families and stand up to Big Oil in Congress — and I’ve seen the impact of her leadership as Secretary of the Interior, where she defended our public lands, took real action on the climate crisis, and protected people from the big polluters harming our communities.
Now, Deb is running for Governor of New Mexico. If she wins, she’ll make history as the first Native American woman to ever serve as governor in the United States.
This race isn’t going to be easy. New Mexico’s governorship has changed parties every two terms for decades.
National Republicans are looking to flip this seat red, and we can’t let that happen.
**Governors are the first line of defense against the dangerous policies coming out of the Trump administration. In this moment, we need righteous fighters like Deb leading the way.**
Deb is building a movement to make life better for all New Mexicans — to lower costs, protect public lands, and ensure every person has the resources and support they need to thrive. **But in order to win this thing, she needs our help.**
**[If you can, please make a contribution to help Deb win this race and keep New Mexico blue.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250807_1_ew?refcode=em20250807-3663&refcode2=3663_400544_qBZolv&akid=3663%2E400544%2EqBZolv)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250807_1_ew?amount=5&refcode=em20250807-3663&refcode2=3663_400544_qBZolv&akid=3663%2E400544%2EqBZolv)**
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth Warren

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: A January 6th rioter works at the Department of Justice now
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
A guy who called the police “Gestapo” “Nazis” and yelled “KILL ‘EM” over and over again as those cops were getting pushed, punched, kicked, and spit on is taking a taxpayer funded salary as a senior adviser at the Department of Justice.
#

I remember January 6th like it was yesterday.
After I left the House floor, after I knew my colleagues and my staff were safe, I had a lot on my mind.
First, I was thinking about how important it was that we get back to work and certify the election.
Second, I wanted to make sure the people who stormed the Capitol that day would face consequences.
We made a lot of progress on that — until Trump retook office. One of the first things he did was pardon all of the January 6ers, and then he put an end to all January 6 prosecutions.
All of those guys are free thanks to Trump. Many of them have reoffended and are back in prison — proof that Trump endangered the public by putting these people back on the street.
It gets even worse though. If you can believe it, a J6er is working at the Department of Justice now. A guy who called the police “Gestapo” “Nazis” and yelled “KILL ‘EM” over and over again as those cops were getting pushed, punched, kicked, and spit on is taking a taxpayer funded salary as a senior adviser at the Department of Justice.
I’ll admit it: this really pisses me off. It’s hard to take. I remember what it was like standing on the House floor with nothing but a pen to defend myself with. Rioters banging on the doors. Not to mention having to stomach “Back the Blue” from MAGA after they abandoned the Capitol Police who defended us.
But I was ready to fight that day, same as I was out on patrol as a Marine in Iraq. I’m still fighting, even if it looks a bit different now.
I’m doing whatever I can to hold Trump and his administration accountable in the Senate. I’m going up on TV, radio, podcasts, magazines, newspapers and anyone else that’ll listen to raise the alarm about everything Trump’s doing. And I’m travelling the country to speak directly to people who really need to hear it.
If we’re going to win elections in 2026 we need to make the case against Trump now. That’s what I’m doing.
[**And if you can afford it, I’d really appreciate it if you could chip in $5 or $10 bucks to help power that fight. It’d truly mean a lot to me.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug25.JsYhtJ&refcode=em250807-1-160&t=1&akid=3934%2E734936%2EX_YLUO)

Subject: Please weigh in on Trump’s first six months back in the White House

Friend, we just marked six months since Donald Trump began his second term. I know ... it’s felt like even longer to me, too.
These six months haven’t just been filled with chaos. They’ve been filled with a cruel, disastrous, and extreme agenda that is directly harming the American people.
Donald Trump has signed the biggest health care cut in U.S. history into law as part of his budget bill, which will rob millions of health care and send health insurance premiums skyrocketing for virtually every American – all while giving billionaires a tax break.
He is doubling down on his reckless tariffs, making your life more expensive for no reason whatsoever.
His administration is working to slash funding for everything from disaster response to _PBS_. That’s right, they’re trying to defund Sesame Street.
The list goes on and on.
**Republicans in Congress have been rubber-stamping this reckless and historically unpopular agenda every step of the way. That’s why it’s so important for concerned Americans like us to raise our voices and send a clear message that we won’t sit idly by while Trump puts lives and livelihoods at risk. So please, make your voice heard now:**
**Do you approve of Donald Trump’s first six months back in the White House?**

| | **_Meet Russell:_** Born and raised in Surfside Beach, SC, Congressman Russell Fry is the proud and homegrown Representative for South Carolina’s 7th Congressional District. Growing up in a cinder block home with no heating or air conditioning, Russell learned at an early age that hard work and perseverance pave the only true path to the American Dream. He watched his parents work day in and day out to make ends meet. And the values they instilled in him during his upbringing led Russell to self-fund both his undergraduate education at the University of South Carolina, and later his law studies at the Charleston School of Law. At Charleston, Russell served as the President of the Student Bar Association and even helped the school achieve its American Bar Association accreditation. He went on to practice law in the Grand Strand area for over a decade before entering the political arena to serve in the South Carolina House of Representatives for State House District 106 (Horry County). During his seven-year tenure in the SC House, Russell fought to safeguard Constitutional liberties, lower taxes, and put the best interests of South Carolina families above all else. He climbed the ranks to become Chief Majority Whip, and also chaired the House Opioid Prevention Study Committee. Under Russell’s leadership, 18 policy initiatives to combat the opioid crisis were signed into law. Since the first day he stepped foot in Washington, Russell has strived to shake up the corrupt status quo and deliver real change for the American people. He believes adamantly that so long as the American people stand united, we can keep the American Dream alive for every citizen of our great nation. Russell is a dedicated husband to his wife, Bronwen, and a loving father to his son, James. The family lives in Murrells Inlet with their chocolate lab, Jasper.

body:

Before Congress, I ran a trucking company.
I woke up early, worked long hours, and fought to make ends meet, _**just like you**_.
Now I’m fighting for something even bigger: **the future of the Supreme Court.**

name: Team Lizzie
subject: Gene Wu is standing up for us. It’s time for us to stand up for him.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
State Representative Gene Wu is a patriot and a leader. He is also our neighbor in TX07. As the leader of the Texas House Democratic Caucus, Representative Wu is leading the charge against Governor Abbott and Texas Republicans’ shameful surrender to Donald Trump. He has led with courage and conviction at a moment where our state and our country need it most.
How are Republicans responding? Well, the Governor is trying to remove this duly elected State Representative from office. Governor Abbott filed a petition directly with the Supreme Court to remove Representative Wu from office, even though he has been elected to represent his community overwhelmingly for years. (Last year, he won more than 76% of the vote!)
This isn’t just unprecedented. It’s un-American.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/0PkEDcniaEemNUEfDm12ZA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/0PkEDcniaEemNUEfDm12ZA2]
Representative Wu always shows up for everybody. And now it’s time for us to show up for him.
Our team is collecting notes and cards from people across our community to thank Representative Wu for his courageous leadership and we will deliver them to his office here in Houston.
Will you add your name to our digital THANK YOU CARD today, and we will deliver it with the cards and notes we have collected tomorrow? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/0PkEDcniaEemNUEfDm12ZA2]
These are challenging days. But we get through them with principled courageous leaders like Gene Wu and the Texas House Democrats who are fighting for us today and every day in every way they can.
Thank you for standing with us!
Team Lizzie

This isn’t politics as usual. This is a siege.

George Soros just dropped **$52 million** into his radical PAC, and Susie Lee’s one of his prime investments. They’re already flooding Nevada’s 3rd with ads, bought-and-paid-for headlines, and political operatives to silence YOUR voice.

The Cook Political Report has declared this a top race — meaning one thing: if we don’t hold the line, we lose the House. We lose our leverage. We lose our country.

****I’m not some career politician. I’m a conservative fighter who’s built a life standing on principle, speaking truth, and never backing down. But Soros and Lee are unloading everything they’ve got to bury us before we can even fight back.****

This isn’t just my campaign — this is YOUR future, YOUR fight.

If we’re going to stop Soros and Susie Lee, it has to start today.

Let’s move.

Marty O’Donnell
_America First Republican for Congress
_

**ABOUT MARTY**
**Marty O’Donnell isn’t a politician** and he’s not taking any corporate PAC money. Marty will give us a voice – not special interests or Wall Street. It’s time to turn our nation around to make life better for Nevadans.

**Marty O’Donnell has an ear for solving problems.** He’s an award-winning composer who wrote the iconic soundtracks for the video games Halo and Destiny. Marty will cut through the noise in DC.

**Marty O’Donnell will be a champion for Nevada families.** As a husband, father, and grandfather, Marty can’t sit on the sidelines as local families struggle because of the problems created by Big Government.

Peter, Last month, Derrick Van Orden made a truly shameful move. After backing a MAGA budget that would gut Medicaid and threaten access to hospital care across Wisconsin, **Van Orden is now scrambling to claim credit for the very programs he tried to defund.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112932688/562091908/-2083379535?refcode=em-8.7.25-all-rs-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjM1MWM1My1lOTczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Xjm01avUnwYAybzjODcWTAB2xQW2RPXLlhQeaKfjK0=) Here’s what happened:
* **First:** Van Orden cheered Trump’s budget cuts that would’ve cost Wisconsin hospitals over $1 billion in funding.
*
* **Now:** he’s lying to voters, hoping to re-write his record onto the right side of history.

We’re not going to let him gaslight us, and we’re sure as hell not going to let him off the hook for this shameful disinformation. This race is winnable. But we need the resources to counter his lies and win over every voter in WI-03. If you believe WI-03 deserves someone who will actually fight for our hospitals and the people they serve, not MAGA photo ops and political theater, now’s the time to step up.
